subject: 2024 April e-newsletter
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
# 2024 April e-newsletter
---
|
---
|
---
| **Ending loneliness campaign will be a model for entire nation**
---
| Dear friends, I was honored to be a panelist at the ninth event in the Peninsula Family Service (PFS) Thought Leader Series with the theme of Overcoming the Epidemic of Loneliness: A Community Challenge Wednesday, April 3 following San Mateo County being the first in the nation to declare loneliness a public health crisis in January. This is the beginning of a broad campaign to overcome loneliness and connect those living in isolation like never before that I imagine will be a model for the Bay Area, state and even the nation to follow. We know that loneliness is detrimental to the mental and physical wellness of many people of all ages and our efforts in the county have been applauded by the U.S. Surgeon General Dr. Vivek Murthy who last year identified loneliness in the United States as an epidemic.
---
Although I’m not an expert on loneliness others are and I see it as my mission to uplift their work and fight for the resources necessary to help all of us overcome loneliness. This thought leader event brought together experts including UCSF professor of Geriatrics Dr. Carla Perissinotto, Peninsula Family Service CEO Heather Cleary, Peninsula Health Care District CEO Ana Pulido and UCSF assistant professor of Medicine Dr. Ashwin Kotwal to discuss the challenges we face related to loneliness and solutions to overcome loneliness and the issues that relate to it. Read the Mercury News article about the event here: [https://www.mercurynews.com/2024/04/03/isolation-san-mateo-county-million-to-fight-loneliness-april-2024/](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=646d3eec92&e=c0babbc643)
---
| **New crosswalk improves safety for students at two schools ** It was exciting to host a ribbon cutting Wednesday, March 26 to unveil the completion of the $2 million Broadmoor Safe Routes to School Pedestrian Improvements Project between two neighborhood-serving schools. I was able to help secure the funding as I serve on the Metropolitan Transportation Commission, which funded the project. The project was prompted by Garden Village Elementary School Principal Nuala O’Sullivan-Haley, pictured above, who advocated for the safety of her students and families who walk to school. Some motorists have been treating the streets around the schools like racetracks and hopefully this project will put an end to that. This is the first major infrastructure project in unincorporated Broadmoor in decades. But we’re not done yet, the next step I’m working on is to reduce the speed limit in the area when school is in session down to 15 mph. The Broadmoor Safe Routes to School Pedestrian Improvements Project includes a raised midblock crosswalk, bulb-outs, ADA curb ramps, pedestrian and traffic signals, as well as road surfacing treatment and striping improvements near Garden Village Elementary School and Benjamin Franklin Intermediate School to increase visibility, shorten crossing distances and serve as traffic calming features to slow traffic.
---
---
| **Fierce advocate for older adults honored by county as she retires** The county was proud to present an honorary resolution to the longtime Director of Aging and Adult Services Lisa Mancini at a retirement party March 21. The work she did at Aging and Adult Services, for the Commissions on Aging and Disabilities has been phenomenal and impacted thousands of lives over her 25 years with the county. I remember my first year in office in 2017 when we were exploring the Age-Friendly Cities concept and how to bring it to the county. Mancini helped our office get the concept off the ground. And now 7 years later most cities in the county are now certified Age-friendly by the World Health Organization This initiative will continue to address the pressing needs of older adults and create environments in every city to be more welcoming to our rapidly aging population. And then there was COVID and a global pandemic that especially put older adults at risk of serious illness and death. Mancini rose to the occasion recognizing that the shelter in place order would create a serious need to feed our older population, who were stuck at home and often isolated. She championed the Great Plates Delivered program, a $50 million investment that rescued 80 local restaurants from closure and helped 4,500 older adults stay healthy with fresh hot meals. It was a rescue program to keep older frail adults from going hungry while rescuing small restaurants from certain closure. When the County studied the impact of Great Plates Delivered on these businesses, we found that 87% would have gone out of business if it wasn’t for Great Plates Delivered. I believe feeding the hungry in this manner saved hundreds of jobs but most importantly helped to save lives. Congratulations to Lisa on her retirement and welcome to Lee Pullen, who was named the new director of Aging and Adult Services on March 25.
---
| **A message to social media companies: Follow your own rules to end hate speech** The San Mateo County Board of Supervisors passed a resolution I sponsored urging social media platforms such as Facebook and X to enforce their own community standards and guidelines to prevent and eliminate content promoting guns, violence, hate and other content that may be harmful on March 26. My office collaborated with Dr. Karen North, professor of Digital Social Media at the USC Annenberg School on the presentation of the resolution to the Board of Supervisors. The rabbit holes on social media run deep and are filled with content that promotes violence and hate that not only harms children as is widely noted but also adults who find refuge in consuming and spreading hateful and divisive content. Facebook has community standards and says it will remove content that is inauthentic, unsafe or degrading to others but its simply not following its own rules. The consequences of not enforcing these guidelines can lead to violent outcomes and have severe mental health impacts on all of us. Dr. North previously worked in the Clinton Administration in the White House Office of Science and Technology Policy, and before that she worked for Rep. Edward Markey, Chairman of the U.S. House of Representatives Subcommittee on Telecommunications and Finance. Dr. North said to the Board: “... thinking about today’s resolution, we should all consider the consequences of portraying guns, violence, and gun violence in a manner that amplifies violence, hatred, and vindictiveness, and ask ourselves if we could take steps to address the use of social media to promote violence.”
---
| **Interns wanted to join our team ** We are looking to add to our great group of interns we are currently working with. If you or someone you know may be interested in applying to my Internship Program, submitting this form is the first step: [https://forms.gle/hiKqtn7Rird5vXwB9](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=82b884400b&e=c0babbc643). You can also reach out to Mike Richardson on my staff directly with any questions at [mrichardson@smcgov.org](mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org)
---
| **Battling food insecurity **
Food insecurity is a problem some residents may still face as we continue to emerge from the pandemic. Here are some resources residents can access: **CalFresh:**
Is a program for people with low-income who meet federal income eligibility rules and want to add to their budget to put healthy and nutritious food on the table. Website: [https://www.cdss.ca.gov/food-nutrition/calfresh](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=cd66236f05&e=c0babbc643) Contact: (650) 802-6576, [antorres@smcgov.org](mailto:antorres@smcgov.org) **Daly City Partnership:**
DC Partnership is a local partnership that was formed to guide collaborative efforts and connect our community to services that promote well-being. Check out their website for times and locations. Website: [https://www.dcpartnership.org/covid19/](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=1c8a9c395c&e=c0babbc643) **Second Harvest Food Bank:**
Second Harvest offers food at various locations throughout San Mateo County listed on its webpage. Website: [https://www.shfb.org/get-food/](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=249c3bb58a&e=c0babbc643) Contacts: Call (800) 984-3663 or text GETFOOD to (408) 455-5181 In friendship,
David J. Canepa
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---

You can [update your preferences](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=28d2fe484a) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&t=b&e=c0babbc643&c=28d2fe484a).

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Donald Trump just attacked me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
| I just wanted you to hear it from me first, Peter:

Donald Trump just endorsed my MAGA megamillionaire opponent at his rally in Wisconsin.

**Then, he attacked me directly.**

The road to the Senate majority and the White House runs right through Wisconsin, which is why Republicans are targeting our campaign with everything they’ve got. We need to fight back right away.

Hi there, friend, did you see me on _MSNBC_ earlier this week?
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82476914/465412209/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1043-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTQxMzdlNjctYWJmMy1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kgpcP2obzJDu4MyI8BwTk0Wo20zL6PRiV5TD1nF_hjQ=)
The Florida Supreme Court just issued a decision to uphold our state's 15-week abortion ban. That means Ron DeSantis' brutal six-week ban with almost no exceptions for rape or incest will automatically take effect on May 1. But they also just ruled to officially put abortion rights on the ballot this November, which means that Florida voters could _overturn_ the GOP's extreme bans. This is a HUGE victory in the fight to defend reproductive freedom — but it's just the beginning. Now, we need to get this initiative across the finish line, defeat Rick Scott at the ballot box, and codify abortion rights.** **
The Sunshine State is ready to flip blue this fall. **I've seen it firsthand while talking to voters who are fed up with far-right radicals and in the polling data that shows my race for Senate is a statistical tie. Now, we're seeing this momentum for change materialize at the ballot box.**
There's huge energy behind us right now, but Rick Scott has already spent $3 MILLION running attack ads to smear my campaign — that's more than any other GOP Senate candidate has spent so far! _And, as a mega-millionaire, he has plenty more where that came from._
**[The election year is now well under way, and we can't be caught empty-handed as we head into the second quarter. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Trump just tore into me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
I need your help to fight back.
| Donald Trump just visited Michigan to rally his supporters – and he called me out. He knows that our campaign is the only thing stopping Republicans from flipping the Senate, and this is unfortunately just the start of his attacks.

I would deeply appreciate your help to fight back and keep Michigan blue in November. [_Please, use this link to donate now to our campaign and the Voter Protection Project »_](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65405?t=6&akid=13660%2E878179%2Eik4QmM)

At his event this week, Trump stood with Mike Rogers directly behind him and emphasized how important this Senate race will be to him taking back the White House in November. In between a fountain of misleading and downright falsehoods, Trump also said that, with his support, Mike Rogers will have “tremendous success” against me in this race.

I’m counting on you to help prove him wrong.

This week’s event is an indication that Republicans are gearing up to throw everything they can at Michigan, and that Michigan Democrats can’t take anything for granted.

No matter what anyone may tell you, Michigan is a swing state – full stop. And just as we have swung toward Democrats, Michigan is known for swinging right on back.

[_We can't let that happen. Want to help? Chip in what you can to our campaign and the Voter Protection Project and help send a message that Michigan is sure as hell not ready to swing back to Trump._](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65405?t=7&akid=13660%2E878179%2Eik4QmM) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Elissa Slotkin and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65406?t=8&akid=13660%2E878179%2Eik4QmM)
---

[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65410?t=12&akid=13660%2E878179%2Eik4QmM)
Thank you,

Elissa Slotkin
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=13660%2E878179%2Eik4QmM). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=13660%2E878179%2Eik4QmM).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=13660%2E878179%2Eik4QmM) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=13660%2E878179%2Eik4QmM). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=13660%2E878179%2Eik4QmM)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=13660%2E878179%2Eik4QmM)

body:
Millions of Americans will have their Social Security benefits delayed
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=21178%2E4449941%2ElMoiF9)
---
_**We have HORRIBLE news:**_ [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/raise-retirement-poll?source=FFR_20240405_EMPOLL_E5_T0_GM-30D-AC_RS&t=7&akid=21178%2E4449941%2ElMoiF9) If the GOP is successful, _millions of Americans will have their Social Security benefits delayed and will be faced with a terrifying and uncertain future._ | _So we’re launching a MASSIVE poll to see where Democrats stand:_
**[_Do you approve of the GOP’s plan to raise the retirement age?_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/raise-retirement-poll?source=FFR_20240405_EMPOLL_E5_T0_GM-30D-AC_RS&t=8&akid=21178%2E4449941%2ElMoiF9)** | **[YES, OF COURSE! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/raise-retirement-poll?source=FFR_20240405_EMPOLL_E5_T0_GM-30D-AC_RS&t=9&akid=21178%2E4449941%2ElMoiF9)**
---
**[NO, I DON’T »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/raise-retirement-poll?source=FFR_20240405_EMPOLL_E5_T0_GM-30D-AC_RS&t=10&akid=21178%2E4449941%2ElMoiF9)**
**[I’M NOT SURE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/raise-retirement-poll?source=FFR_20240405_EMPOLL_E5_T0_GM-30D-AC_RS&t=11&akid=21178%2E4449941%2ElMoiF9)**
**_WE NEED 250 LOCAL RESPONSES FOR ACCURATE DATA_ – PLEASE RESPOND PROMPTLY BEFORE OUR POLL CLOSES TOMORROW AT 9AM.**
Thank you for sharing your thoughts! We can’t protect Social Security without your response.

Thank you,

– FFR

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c32716%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zYjj17nJNvr%2fToqMN%2b8RTQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c32717%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lHMj0g3%2fDJwaekxHxpHk0w&sysid=1)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c32717%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lHMj0g3%2fDJwaekxHxpHk0w&sysid=1)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |
---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions. These efforts include: Teaching bright and principled students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, classical liberal arts education, including a required course on the Constitution Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our National Survey on the Department of Justice and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice , which you can access at this secure link: ** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | Your America News Your America News • PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Justice, weaponized
body:
Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0e2jqss41utb4u24fe9t1kn1vcj14v0tsbf965g_rp22sh2s8i6ep32cpieeor1cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email—I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zt7k6rass50emq3b151pq3sipi4c4qd6jivvoi5g_rp22sh2s8i6ep32cpieeor1cjh2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights—to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more—are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight—in which Hillsdale College is a leader—is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** —on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.—who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcmvj0nip4cchma525l4f1v1q93d3ac4ffs373b0_rp22sh2s8i6ep32cpieeor1cjh2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |
---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1lfv3m1bdlt52emvr4qs938qodloqtdejl81cu0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8oj3c1ieeo3246h22sh2s8i6ep32cpieeor1cjh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2shf6985dkpe6cnvpv7lou0sv09ev5dcbbrhcog_rp22sh2s8i6ep32cpieeor1cjh2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbepouhuvnvargl9aoknrmafeuaq99h7fv892888_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr4c9j69pr3c5ie49fg)

Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8c7i9f65fjcnap0p3e2a8a52o2o3fvekvoinlm0_rp22sh2s8i6ep32cpieeor5c1h2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights—to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more—are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight—in which Hillsdale College is a leader—is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** —on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.—who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze0r00k1vl2efdtqvdjlf2phitbea0m6uvmb3ar0_rp22sh2s8i6ep32cpieeor5c1h2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. Reaching grassroots supporters directly is CRITICAL if we're going to Save America from Joe Biden and the Left. But in order to do that, we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts. It's because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. ICYMI News PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: American Briefing
subject: Justice, weaponized
body:
Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice.

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z78e44c68vqlmko8c2o0nc4s3b1va7heq2si3is8_rp22sh2s8i6ep32cpie9ob4clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email—I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdqinbgmigf90n8vj4lgmeo79n9954o50ro2pha8_rp22sh2s8i6ep32cpie9ob4clh2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights—to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more—are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight—in which Hillsdale College is a leader—is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** —on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.—who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmp1m8ddg5thc0n481hmtm46i2qq64ak2pb7rnj0_rp22sh2s8i6ep32cpie9ob4clh2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |
---

American Briefing
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrjroraku4rhfbfn36tqdee8fd50nsbd6rg4aqoo_rp22sh2s8i6ep32cpie9ob4clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jm8p79d9j6iprect66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni64or0cjjm6oh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhhsgi7irrc3n5kmjh673jnaq17dsb0g5nn4mg4o_rp22sh2s8i6ep32cpie9ob4clh2bs)_

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2q1oesh3dfsjs934mv6a1jr2jo97unp054qobn8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr4c9j69p71chim49fg)

name: Larry Klayman
subject: TORTURED: January 6 Peaceful Protesters Beg for Water
body:
Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

[ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c699966%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2f7yxIY7AkiqMK3t%2ftOpzFA&sysid=1)
---
[ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c699967%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aDuwJ1BOj3l7F2iRQUE6hw&sysid=1) Dear Patriot,

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c699968%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OVDGEEEW8oGZ%2bfAZeC8Uvw&sysid=1)**

Over a year ago, I wrote an urgent email to patriots just like you about what’s really happening to January 6 Peaceful Protesters in the Washington, DC jail.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba ...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* **Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy****through a 4 inch by 10 inch window of cold metal doors**
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

But there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water, and keep them from going to court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for years ... in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban and Islamic terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on.

**That’s why I’ve filed crucial lawsuits to FREE January 6 peaceful protesters. Including a critical new lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP.**

I’m Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 41 years.

You’ve seen me on CNN, Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

**I’m the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime. I _guarantee_ Bill Clinton still remembers me!**

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.****And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS!**

Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

**[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $$25, $50, $100, or even more.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c699969%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pcyEXJC4vFgWFObnvpDcHA&sysid=1)**

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can **now**.

In Justice,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, innocent Americans are begging for water in the Washington, DC jail. These innocent men and women are being tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

**[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $25, $50, $100, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Every dollar counts.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c699960%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2b4FkYKTfXgQG0aiA0EIlyQ&sysid=1)**

name: Majority Leader Steve Scalise
subject: rushing to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
House Democrats JUST released a list of what they’re calling their “RED TO BLUE” targets.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans:

I'm rushing to you because House Democrats JUST released a list of what they're calling their "RED TO BLUE" targets. These are 18 highly competitive districts that Joe Biden won in 2020 but Republicans currently hold.

Our Conservative Majority is hanging on by a thread so whoever wins these seats, wins control of the House. _**[Take a look at the list- you may live in, or close to, at least one of them. And if you can spare it, please send 18 bucks to help Republicans hold the line in ALL OF THEM.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpa7g21a7c6hhlg7je9h5k2lhvukuvf7v1vpfv2g_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c5g68oj2c5h2bs "Take a look at the list – you may live in, or close to, at least one of them. And if you can spare it, please send 18 bucks to help Republicans hold the line in ALL OF THEM.")**_
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu2n3e5p59uqqkgcgafi626nuitostn1br5h83qo_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c5g68oj2c5h2bs "“RED TO BLUE” Targets")
---
House Democrats launched their "RED TO BLUE" program to funnel massive amounts of Liberal cash to these battleground races.

This money will fund vicious attack ads against Conservative candidates, beef up Democrat campaign staff, and help recruit an army of volunteers to mobilize Liberal voters. **If we can 't keep up, the probability of holding these key districts will drop like a LEAD BALLOON. **

If we want to win, we need a massive show of strength from our grassroots network right here and right now.

_**[That's where you come in. Defending 18 competitive districts is extremely expensive - but if we can rally EVERY Conservative in America to pitch in 18 bucks, we can send badly needed reinforcements directly to these battleground districts.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zejpkdbstapom39jl72q05c98jgff5lguf9g70i0_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c5g68oj2c5h2bs "That’s where you come in. Defending 18 competitive districts is extremely expensive – but if we can rally EVERY Conservative in America to pitch in 18 bucks, we can send badly needed reinforcements directly to these battleground districts. ")**_

The fate of our Conservative House Majority hangs in the balance. If you can, PLEASE step up here:
---
| | | [ADD 18 BUCKS HERE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zievqt64oh6ins9mgntboh7njl99gbsebe0fv4q0_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c5g68oj2c5h2bs "ADD 18 BUCKS HERE")
---
| | | [ADD ANOTHER AMOUNT](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr4lilmmi52mnlm6sgdoj9o8aq91g8r2bscj4rto_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c5g68oj2c5h2bs "ADD ANOTHER AMOUNT")
---
Democrats are over the moon we have so many Biden-won districts to defend - especially because they're winning the fundraising race.

They have the advantage. But we're not giving up. Not for a second.

_The only way we lose is if Conservatives like us don 't rise to the occasion._ Are you in? We really hope so. Our House Majority depends on it!

Thanks for all you do for freedom,
House Republicans

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq5j4p54j45k8bpur40itoa4sui5liejg1vtrd98_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c5g68oj2c5h2bs "Please take my Election Year Check-In!")
---

It's House Majority Leader Steve Scalise.

I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqtv5avcr15td97b3qeo0m4km50msh5r4g7caf2g_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c5g68oj2c5h2bs "ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN")**_ at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

_What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats?_
---
| | | [START HERE >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjsort0259o7ql0e0mgo27d2rdbsugn6q1420760_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c5g68oj2c5h2bs "START HERE")
---
| | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC.
---

Team Scalise is committed to defending our Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement.

Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year.

I'm writing you this letter because I know you're a TOP PATRIOT!

---
Dear Friend,
Through thick & thin, I've always known that you'd never give up.
You're truly a TOP PATRIOT - THANK YOU!
_**Your Patriotic Support is what gives me the energy to KEEP FIGHTING TO SAVE AMERICA!**_
It's because of you & you alone that I will **NEVER SURRENDER!**
When the Deep State, the Fake News Media, & the corrupt Biden Regime hit me with everything they had, you could've given up.
**BUT YOU NEVER LEFT MY SIDE!**
Only because of your continuous support, we're closer than ever to WINNING BACK THE WHITE HOUSE!

Love,

name: Terry Schilling, American Principles Project
subject: More great news!
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nBIuVmocD-SA2HsFSE9P160p2tgZCKRWXvp74psmczPIMTm6UO-FBlCHL-J7YlU5ZMMrLRnqXCmQpKHRA4ALQUgiMvO1biSVynGBNBejQI76NsAurSPj4Inh-cdkceVbtmfxx16Z8J4ktNaDFrMcFvrxPM_TVHTIdlvTH1ZtCMZjh-kSloigK5EEjmgwLFU7T9rjA7XZlHLVc9M4MxfladdCxRuqMurc&c=XsUOTWMcsNQahsq16LroyyF4rd9GXxiE0QRiTEl0EW_hydC6qHRlpg==&ch=KC1KZUoKMpXgj2m2RIFI8TPMBfOr4NdxjSAyOfF8EsQUeC_3wkotLA==)
---
Greetings!
This year is building to be one of the most impactful years for the American family. And we're just getting started!
As our team has been updating you, we're seeing states across the country introduce and pass legislation to protect kids online en masse.
So far, 11 states have passed and signed age-verification laws. And I'm excited to share that Georgia, Kansas, and Kentucky all have sent this legislation to their governors' desks!
If all three of these governors sign, that will bring our total to 14 states -- with many more still working through the legislative process.
This isn't by surprise.
We've diligently worked to make protecting kids online a priority -- and we're seeing pro-family leaders across the country step up! None of this progress would be possible without your support. Thank you!
---
| More to come soon.
For the family,
Terry Schilling President American Principles Project

John Eastman And The Left’s War On The Legal Profession
http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0ccfrsiihf2s2furo11jdh86noae33ek7helq88_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c5g6co32cdh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38ctk6oon9dtjmeqjetjjkorrbdt36kq32tbiekojf8j0c9gmf831cug6apt2muob7dd56gr72tdk6eqq8cth6mgn1d9lk6qj6cbmemjn8cjlkuprb8bgmkqq3d9n6gorb83ieupjadjmeirr7dt24no

John Eastman is a lawyer, legal scholar and a friend. A former clerk
to Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas, candidate for California
attorney general, and dean of Chapman University School of Law, I got

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Liberty Report
subject: Justice, weaponized
body:
Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice.

This sponsored message from Freedom Liberty Report is on behalf of Hillsdale College

[](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkb9u3DAMh59G3mTQkmydBw8HOJ4uadEMHQ2dRPt00D9Icou8feE22bvyB37kR_58XV-VdTbsb8rjtLm85rIGtT6sc9TEJy3K0XLklQETFASFYeWNmaAbjRANTp3sGB970XXNY5J4Hwxe5Chg1BfFJKAU-r6Jvr9rI4fGTicHBAwgxdD3ba-3ywBskwDdxkZDBCiHubZbRjTRq2CcvWOuHxlTzLXV0TduetSaCuFXwhbCFpfac99ilMMWzUHYYjCpXD2GSuNGn0epVuMp8gs_zia-FE34DB0IeAMm2A2u87f55eWdsOGofi3xyBoJn1OOJaGuNuyfkUdjD0_4jF5Z91nUyidl90D4bOLza9C_KIaKoRI-v19v6_crXW4_6NcdmjyZ9Ns6Z8sgiYD9ZP61rP_7jj8BAAD__6HFkZw) Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email—I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkb9u3DAMh59G3mTQkmydBw8HOJ4uadEMHQ2dRPt00D9Icou8feE22bvyB37kR_58XV-VdTbsb8rjtLm85rIGtT6sc9TEJy3K0XLklQETFASFYeWNmaAbjRANTp3sGB970XXNY5J4Hwxe5Chg1BfFJKAU-r6Jvr9rI4fGTicHBAwgxdD3ba-3ywBskwDdxkZDBCiHubZbRjTRq2CcvWOuHxlTzLXV0TduetSaCuFXwhbCFpfac99ilMMWzUHYYjCpXD2GSuNGn0epVuMp8gs_zia-FE34DB0IeAMm2A2u87f55eWdsOGofi3xyBoJn1OOJaGuNuyfkUdjD0_4jF5Z91nUyidl90D4bOLza9C_KIaKoRI-v19v6_crXW4_6NcdmjyZ9Ns6Z8sgiYD9ZP61rP_7jj8BAAD__6HFkZw)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights—to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more—are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight—in which Hillsdale College is a leader—is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** —on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.—who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkb9u3DAMh59G3mTQkmydBw8HOJ4uadEMHQ2dRPt00D9Icou8feE22bvyB37kR_58XV-VdTbsb8rjtLm85rIGtT6sc9TEJy3K0XLklQETFASFYeWNmaAbjRANTp3sGB970XXNY5J4Hwxe5Chg1BfFJKAU-r6Jvr9rI4fGTicHBAwgxdD3ba-3ywBskwDdxkZDBCiHubZbRjTRq2CcvWOuHxlTzLXV0TduetSaCuFXwhbCFpfac99ilMMWzUHYYjCpXD2GSuNGn0epVuMp8gs_zia-FE34DB0IeAMm2A2u87f55eWdsOGofi3xyBoJn1OOJaGuNuyfkUdjD0_4jF5Z91nUyidl90D4bOLza9C_KIaKoRI-v19v6_crXW4_6NcdmjyZ9Ns6Z8sgiYD9ZP61rP_7jj8BAAD__6HFkZw)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |
---

Freedom Liberty Report
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Larry Klayman
subject: TORTURED: January 6 Peaceful Protesters Beg for Water
body:
Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

[ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c32735%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5s4BXduOzdk2BNT7o9V0AQ&sysid=1)
---
[ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c32736%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GRGtvmHVIVyDHgE82YpOOA&sysid=1) Dear Patriot,

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c32737%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6Z5duVqHsO5kGmg%2bMXQ8uA&sysid=1)**

Over a year ago, I wrote an urgent email to patriots just like you about what’s really happening to January 6 Peaceful Protesters in the Washington, DC jail.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba ...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* **Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy****through a 4 inch by 10 inch window of cold metal doors**
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

But there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water, and keep them from going to court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for years ... in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban and Islamic terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on.

**That’s why I’ve filed crucial lawsuits to FREE January 6 peaceful protesters. Including a critical new lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP.**

I’m Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 41 years.

You’ve seen me on CNN, Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

**I’m the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime. I _guarantee_ Bill Clinton still remembers me!**

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.****And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS!**

Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

**[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $$25, $50, $100, or even more.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c32738%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m1PM49DW%2fUsDSV9ee%2bJzlA&sysid=1)**

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can **now**.

In Justice,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, innocent Americans are begging for water in the Washington, DC jail. These innocent men and women are being tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

**[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $25, $50, $100, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Every dollar counts.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c32739%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eCcWOiUGruae18WYgIpFxA&sysid=1)**

Your America News

name: Larry Klayman
subject: TORTURED: January 6 Peaceful Protesters Beg for Water
body:
Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4bl26mh089eomccisvmsb0fcjd07cjimgppe5do_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c5g62o75cjh2bs)
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvtlf91ocdvvtq3mgcs4v681dpcr3o1eol2k4f1o_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c5g62o75cjh2bs) Dear Patriot,

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmjv16chvnppgvfb8sj5hbp0phck7s70vr9v4k0o_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c5g62o75cjh2bs)**

Over a year ago, I wrote an urgent email to patriots just like you about what’s really happening to January 6 Peaceful Protesters in the Washington, DC jail.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba ...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* **Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy****through a 4 inch by 10 inch window of cold metal doors**
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

But there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water, and keep them from going to court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for years ... in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban and Islamic terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on.

**That’s why I’ve filed crucial lawsuits to FREE January 6 peaceful protesters. Including a critical new lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP.**

I’m Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 41 years.

You’ve seen me on CNN, Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

**I’m the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime. I _guarantee_ Bill Clinton still remembers me!**

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.****And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS!**

Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

**[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $$25, $50, $100, or even more.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z00nnf1pqi3ll6rriqhd0k76co46si8ghvaprnp8_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c5g62o75cjh2bs)**

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can **now**.

In Justice,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, innocent Americans are begging for water in the Washington, DC jail. These innocent men and women are being tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

**[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $25, $50, $100, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Every dollar counts.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2udk1bt9p5u20esufkt4gkvbvqmiar32k92tvn0_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c5g62o75cjh2bs)**

1600 Daily
---

body:
House Democrats JUST released a list of what they’re calling their “RED TO BLUE” targets.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans:

I'm rushing to you because House Democrats JUST released a list of what they're calling their "RED TO BLUE" targets. These are 18 highly competitive districts that Joe Biden won in 2020 but Republicans currently hold.

Our Conservative Majority is hanging on by a thread so whoever wins these seats, wins control of the House. _**[Take a look at the list- you may live in, or close to, at least one of them. And if you can spare it, please send 18 bucks to help Republicans hold the line in ALL OF THEM.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdu4bk7085a2sbg872bueicq8fkv276nr9rfg82o_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c5g6apr4c9h2bs "Take a look at the list – you may live in, or close to, at least one of them. House Republicans

And if you can spare it, please send 18 bucks to help Republicans hold the line in ALL OF THEM." | "“RED TO BLUE” Targets" House Democrats launched their "RED TO BLUE" program to funnel massive amounts of Liberal cash to these battleground races. This money will fund vicious attack ads against Conservative candidates, beef up Democrat campaign staff, and help recruit an army of volunteers to mobilize Liberal voters. If we can 't keep up, the probability of holding these key districts will drop like a LEAD BALLOON. If we want to win, we need a massive show of strength from our grassroots network right here and right now. "That’s where you come in. Defending 18 competitive districts is extremely expensive – but if we can rally EVERY Conservative in America to pitch in 18 bucks, we can send badly needed reinforcements directly to these battleground districts. " The fate of our Conservative House Majority hangs in the balance. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: It doesn’t make any sense
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWy5WkFiN3
American Cornerstone Institute

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWy5WkFiN3

Dear
Fellow Patriot,

I believe
that America stands at a crossroads. Our individual freedoms, the
nation's respect for the Constitution, and the legacy of our
Founders are all enduring relentless assaults. Shifts in our
society threaten to dilute our nation's character while biased
media and divisive politics amplify it greater than ever.

The
people that this impacts the most are not you and I-It is our
future generation. Our children and grandchildren are being
taught that that is their skin that defines them, not the content
of their character. They are being taught that our nation's
history is something to be ashamed of.

Candidly,
it just doesn't make any sense.

But, I
believe we can change this. I believe we can build a future that
upholds the values of faith, liberty, community, and life - a
future where all Americans are free to pursue their ideas, goals,
and faith.

This
won't be possible without your involvement. I've created a simple
pledge; a way to align us all around a set of shared beliefs. I
want to invite you to take the Common Sense Pledge.

We cannot
bring about this necessary change without you. By signing this
pledge, you are committing to uphold the principles our nation
was founded on and teach them to the next generations. Just one
person can make a difference, and it can start with you.

This is
not a passive petition; it's an active pledge to uphold the
common sense values that shaped our great nation.

Sign the
Common Sense Pledge today using this secure link:
https://offers.americancornerstone.org/common-sense-pledge/

Together,
we can shape a future that respects our shared history, protects
our hard-earned freedoms, and prioritizes common sense. Your
involvement is critical - are you ready to take action?

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben
Carson
Founder
and Chairman
American
Cornerstone Institute

Your
donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and
preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our
country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods
to decrease the federal government's role in society and to
improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Copyright
© 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

name: Hillsdale College via Old Glory Today
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice.

This sponsored message from Old Glory Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College

[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Hxi4sMUP2gacwqH70n9BHA~~/AARclAA~~~) Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email—I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Hxi4sMUP2gacwqH70n9BHA~~/AARclAA~~~)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights—to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more—are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight—in which Hillsdale College is a leader—is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** —on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.—who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Hxi4sMUP2gacwqH70n9BHA~~/AARclAA~~~)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

name: American Update
subject: NYC Agrees To Pay Out Millions After Muslim Women Told To Remove Hijabs For Mug Shots
body:
And Judge Blocks Trump Attempt To Subpoena NBC In Hush Money Trial Over Stormy Daniels Movie

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c699983%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wKjM5ckRv0NFiUt9yx%2fm3A&sysid=1 NYC Agrees To Pay Out Millions After Muslim Women Told To Remove Hijabs For Mug Shots

New York City will pay out $17.5 million to settle a lawsuit brought by two Muslim women who claim their religious rights were violated when they were instructed to remove their hijabs for arrest photos, court records filed Friday show.

Read more https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c699983%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wKjM5ckRv0NFiUt9yx%2fm3A&sysid=1
