The judge overseeing former President Donald Trump’s criminal trial in New York City on Friday blocked his attempt to subpoena broadcasting company NBC Universal over a documentary it produced about adult actress Stormy Daniels.

name: Team WisGOP
subject: WisGOP Update 4.5.24
body:
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-e-xkukdul-didthutlhu-jy/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xkukdul-didthutlhu-r/) **April 5, 2024** Friend --We want to thank everyone who showed up to vote in Tuesday's Election. The day was a huge success for the WisGOP and Wisconsinites as a whole, and we look forward to continuing our path to the White House!Read our latest update below!-Team WisGOP | The April 2 Presidential Primary Election was a huge success for the Republican Party! Wisconsinites from all over the state showed up to voice their frustration with the Biden Administration and set a positive tone for the upcoming 2024 election. There were over [20,000](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xkukdul-didthutlhu-y/) more votes cast in the Republican primary than the Democrat primary, and President Trump received [200,000](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xkukdul-didthutlhu-j/)** ** more primary votes in 2024 than he received in 2016. Lastly, [11 percent](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xkukdul-didthutlhu-t/) of Democrat voters voted for a candidate other than Joe Biden, including [8 percent](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xkukdul-didthutlhu-i/) that voted uninstructed. We asked, and the people of Wisconsin answered. Wisconsin citizens do not want the presence of private-money, also known as 'Zuckerbucks,' to influence our elections, and on Tuesday we voted to BAN them permanently! Looks like the Democrats are going to have to find another way to win elections.
---

In an astounding victory for the Republican Party, GOP candidate, Doug Diny [ousted](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xkukdul-didthutlhu-d/) far-left Katie Rosenberg in the Wausau mayoral election. WisDems spend at least [200,000 dollars](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xkukdul-didthutlhu-h/) in a last-minute attempt to boost Rosenberg's popularity. Here are some more of GOP successes:
* GOP candidate Paul Dwyer [defeated](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xkukdul-didthutlhu-k/) Democrat incumbent Mike Murray in the Tomah mayoral election.
* Statewide efforts on county boards of supervisors ended up with just shy of an 80% percent win rate.
* GOP candidates gained seats on county boards in 6 target counties.
* Republican candidates secured an 85 percent win rate in four targeted school board races.
* GOP supported candidates in Kenosha, Racine, and Winnebago defeated three Tony Evers appointed judges.
* Lastly, more than a dozen members of the Young Republicans were elected to local office.

---

# **In Case You Missed It**
**[WisGOP Statement on Referendum Questions 1& 2](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xkukdul-didthutlhu-u/) **
"Victory! Wisconsin has spoken and the message is clear: elections belong to voters, not out-of-state billionaires. Thanks to the efforts by the Republican Party of Wisconsin and grassroots organizing, Wisconsinites have turned the page on Zuckerbucks and secured our elections from dark money donors." --WisGOP Chairman Brian Schimming
**[WisGOP Statement on Wausau Mayoral Election](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xkukdul-didthutlhu-o/) **
"Congratulations to WisGOP-backed Doug Diny on his triumph in the Wausau Mayoral election. His stunning victory over incumbent Mayor Katie Rosenberg marks an unmistakable repudiation of failed Democrat policies and is a win for Central Wisconsin values." --WisGOP Chairman Brian Schimming
**[WisGOP Invests in Local Candidates](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xkukdul-didthutlhu-b/)**
With municipal elections only four days away, the Republican Party of Wisconsin has made it a top priority to prepare and support local candidates for public office. Since September of last year, the RPW has hosted 29 Farm Team Trainings for prospective local candidates to learn the ins and outs of campaigning from campaign managers, strategists, and organizers.
**[Biden's Border Bloodbath is Coming at the Cost of Medicare and Social Security](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xkukdul-didthutlhu-a/)**
The already-struggling programs are being drained as Biden spends more American tax dollars on welfare for illegal immigrants. Amnesty threatens social security and medicare.
**[A Bloodbath is Coming for the US Auto Industry if Biden is Reelected](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xkukdul-didthutlhu-f/)**
Biden's latest EPA rule will destroy the U.S. Auto Industry, playing right into China's hands. Biden's electric vehicle mandate will sideline America's auto industry. ****

# **Worth the Read**

subject: TORTURED: January 6 Peaceful Protesters Beg for Water
body:
Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

[ ](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyEkL1upDAURp_GdEb2tddAQbESopsttkmJ_HNhHHExMmZQ3j6a_FQp0h4dHX36Xm7TzcY1bss_S9hnmvIxkZvmi5eUy5kxTCBAc6G5MJOqQm86aFpZYS8bCVooDaK697O0QgqDXbAe_WzmVmuju9lJrZsQoIr9syO0MKLTDci6bZQTCiy24CRIz7TIuJ9ujd5uZF9TjuWt3rBUa38vZT-Y-stgZDDOGTEkumzx9zrj41H7xGB0uCxxW_icMr9swczJ8T3tlqnxLDQd6cwemRp-iAzMUyieqeH_jX8P_cKEIZ7E1PDR-mTe0m7jsjE1kGNgLKVzK0wN8KfKfdivuK7xMA3TYiEb19onqsrv_74HAAD__zjfgGg)
---
[ ](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyEkL1upDAURp_GdEb2tddAQbESopsttkmJ_HNhHHExMmZQ3j6a_FQp0h4dHX36Xm7TzcY1bss_S9hnmvIxkZvmi5eUy5kxTCBAc6G5MJOqQm86aFpZYS8bCVooDaK697O0QgqDXbAe_WzmVmuju9lJrZsQoIr9syO0MKLTDci6bZQTCiy24CRIz7TIuJ9ujd5uZF9TjuWt3rBUa38vZT-Y-stgZDDOGTEkumzx9zrj41H7xGB0uCxxW_icMr9swczJ8T3tlqnxLDQd6cwemRp-iAzMUyieqeH_jX8P_cKEIZ7E1PDR-mTe0m7jsjE1kGNgLKVzK0wN8KfKfdivuK7xMA3TYiEb19onqsrv_74HAAD__zjfgGg) Dear Patriot,

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyEkL1upDAURp_GdEb2tddAQbESopsttkmJ_HNhHHExMmZQ3j6a_FQp0h4dHX36Xm7TzcY1bss_S9hnmvIxkZvmi5eUy5kxTCBAc6G5MJOqQm86aFpZYS8bCVooDaK697O0QgqDXbAe_WzmVmuju9lJrZsQoIr9syO0MKLTDci6bZQTCiy24CRIz7TIuJ9ujd5uZF9TjuWt3rBUa38vZT-Y-stgZDDOGTEkumzx9zrj41H7xGB0uCxxW_icMr9swczJ8T3tlqnxLDQd6cwemRp-iAzMUyieqeH_jX8P_cKEIZ7E1PDR-mTe0m7jsjE1kGNgLKVzK0wN8KfKfdivuK7xMA3TYiEb19onqsrv_74HAAD__zjfgGg)**

Over a year ago, I wrote an urgent email to patriots just like you about what's really happening to January 6 Peaceful Protesters in the Washington, DC jail.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* **Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy****through a 4 inch by 10 inch window of cold metal doors**
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

But there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water, and keep them from going to court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for years ... in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban and Islamic terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on.

**That 's why I've filed crucial lawsuits to FREE January 6 peaceful protesters. Including a critical new lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP.**

I'm Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 41 years.

You've seen me on CNN, Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

**I 'm the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime. I _guarantee_ Bill Clinton still remembers me!**

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.****And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS!**

Nobody else is doing what I'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

**[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $$25, $50, $100, or even more.](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyEkL1upDAURp_GdEb2tddAQbESopsttkmJ_HNhHHExMmZQ3j6a_FQp0h4dHX36Xm7TzcY1bss_S9hnmvIxkZvmi5eUy5kxTCBAc6G5MJOqQm86aFpZYS8bCVooDaK697O0QgqDXbAe_WzmVmuju9lJrZsQoIr9syO0MKLTDci6bZQTCiy24CRIz7TIuJ9ujd5uZF9TjuWt3rBUa38vZT-Y-stgZDDOGTEkumzx9zrj41H7xGB0uCxxW_icMr9swczJ8T3tlqnxLDQd6cwemRp-iAzMUyieqeH_jX8P_cKEIZ7E1PDR-mTe0m7jsjE1kGNgLKVzK0wN8KfKfdivuK7xMA3TYiEb19onqsrv_74HAAD__zjfgGg)**

I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can **now**.

In Justice,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch

Dear Patriot, Over a year ago, I wrote an urgent email to patriots just like you about what's really happening to January 6 Peaceful Protesters in the Washington, DC jail. Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots. Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union. Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit): Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy**through a 4 inch by 10 inch window of cold metal doors No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy No Mass or Sunday worship service Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of urine Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells Stuck in Cells for 9 days without shower Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time But there's more. Guards deny them hot water, and keep them from going to court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them. Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency). There's much, much more...all of it horrifying. And this has been going on for years ... in AMERICA. They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban and Islamic terrorists get better treatment! This can't go on. That 's why I've filed crucial lawsuits to FREE January 6 peaceful protesters. Including a critical new lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP. I'm Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch. I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 41 years. You've seen me on CNN, Fox News, and other cable news outlets. I 'm the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime. I guarantee Bill Clinton still remembers me! And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS! Nobody else is doing what I'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people. Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous. I can't do it without you, Patriot. Thank you for doing whatever you can now. In Justice, Larry Klayman Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. Patriot, innocent Americans are begging for water in the Washington, DC jail. name: Senator John N. Kennedy
subject: About as useful as a screen door on a submarine…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I just need a second to explain where I’m coming from

| |

---
| | | Folks - this is John Kennedy.

**It kills me to say this but some of these emails are about as useful as a screen door on a submarine.**

Maybe it's a few Big Tech overlords sending our emails to spam...

Maybe it's the crazies calling good folks like you traitors for ignoring them...

Maybe it's that most of you are a little tired of politics...

And on the last point, that's OK. I completely understand. But I want to explain where I'm coming from: You see, my Conservative friends over in the House have a HUGE deadline closing in, and I just got word they're pacing DANGEROUSLY behind their goal.

_We 'd have a real mess on our hands if they come up short._

I've never been one to dance around an issue when I speak with you. _**[So with all due respect, I'm humbly asking you to pitch in just a few bucks before March is over and done with.](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyUkbFu3DAMhp9G3mRQlCz7Bg8BAgMdUgTo0FFQLdphYkuGJF_u8QsX7dSlncmPPz_y-4t78bxxXL_6nUYuxeXi6t2V2W_y_UOW88fuM0dyCGgkGAnWYRPGDtWwDA2NqldowKBVzduIPUBArXwHgEuvYUEbBm8MgOkIVMPjNQcMWLiZQWFruxtahTQEo9DCIgycR_CVWo6FA5U5peNIG1eeS5vy2mzjW61HEfpJ4CRwKjSfmdpPjplCO6dd4FTJ7_Jy4EJXy5yJogwpZfkeP-RxkXrKF5k5rkI_13ySQHvW3c1-PzyvUejn38sa9_okv3x7Va1S2mrjqjL2NgBI1XdWoKWHqxz-A_iVk2KlWK_wu-RS5J_TCLSPM97_LjR5DMcnbxsX2wsD6-55u5Sb-s-_-xkAAP__MSuXHA "So with all due respect, I’m humbly asking you to pitch in just a few bucks before March is over and done with.")**_

Look, the deadline was important before but now I'm hearing Joe Biden just raised 40 million bucks last month and compared to Republicans, the DNC has THREE TIMES the cash-on-hand!

I'm afraid this will be enough to put Liberals over the top... That's why I really need your help right now.

subject: TORTURED: January 6 Peaceful Protesters Beg for Water
body:
Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

[ ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xnk9XzMsliUYhCS8aPtBDA~~/AARclAA~/RgRn87WyP0SRaHR0cHM6Ly9mcmVlZG9td2F0Y2gucmV2di5jby9iZWdnaW5nLWZvci13YXRlci1tYi1wb3BhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9YmVnZ2luZy1mb3Itd2F0ZXImdXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDI0MDQwNiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXBvcGEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJmFtb3VudD0yNVcDc3BjQgpmEGMaEWaIcDZUUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xnk9XzMsliUYhCS8aPtBDA~~/AARclAA~/RgRn87WyP0SRaHR0cHM6Ly9mcmVlZG9td2F0Y2gucmV2di5jby9iZWdnaW5nLWZvci13YXRlci1tYi1wb3BhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9YmVnZ2luZy1mb3Itd2F0ZXImdXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDI0MDQwNiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXBvcGEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJmFtb3VudD0yNVcDc3BjQgpmEGMaEWaIcDZUUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

Over a year ago, I wrote an urgent email to patriots just like you about what's really happening to January 6 Peaceful Protesters in the Washington, DC jail.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* **Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy****through a 4 inch by 10 inch window of cold metal doors**
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

But there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water, and keep them from going to court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for years ... in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban and Islamic terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on.

**That 's why I've filed crucial lawsuits to FREE January 6 peaceful protesters. Including a critical new lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP.**

I'm Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 41 years.

You've seen me on CNN, Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

**I 'm the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime. I _guarantee_ Bill Clinton still remembers me!**

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.****And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS!**

Nobody else is doing what I'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

**[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $$25, $50, $100, or even more.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xnk9XzMsliUYhCS8aPtBDA~~/AARclAA~/RgRn87WyP0SRaHR0cHM6Ly9mcmVlZG9td2F0Y2gucmV2di5jby9iZWdnaW5nLWZvci13YXRlci1tYi1wb3BhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9YmVnZ2luZy1mb3Itd2F0ZXImdXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDI0MDQwNiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXBvcGEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJmFtb3VudD0yNVcDc3BjQgpmEGMaEWaIcDZUUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can **now**.

In Justice,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, innocent Americans are begging for water in the Washington, DC jail. These innocent men and women are being tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

**[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $25, $50, $100, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Every dollar counts.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xnk9XzMsliUYhCS8aPtBDA~~/AARclAA~/RgRn87WyP0SRaHR0cHM6Ly9mcmVlZG9td2F0Y2gucmV2di5jby9iZWdnaW5nLWZvci13YXRlci1tYi1wb3BhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9YmVnZ2luZy1mb3Itd2F0ZXImdXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDI0MDQwNiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXBvcGEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJmFtb3VudD0yNVcDc3BjQgpmEGMaEWaIcDZUUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots. Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union. Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit): Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy**through a 4 inch by 10 inch window of cold metal doors No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy No Mass or Sunday worship service Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of urine Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells Stuck in Cells for 9 days without shower Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time But there's more. Guards deny them hot water, and keep them from going to court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them. Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency). There's much, much more...all of it horrifying. And this has been going on for years ... in AMERICA. They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban and Islamic terrorists get better treatment! This can't go on. That 's why I've filed crucial lawsuits to FREE January 6 peaceful protesters. Including a critical new lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP. I'm Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch. I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 41 years. You've seen me on CNN, Fox News, and other cable news outlets. I 'm the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime. I guarantee Bill Clinton still remembers me! And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS! Nobody else is doing what I'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people. Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous. ~~ I can't do it without you, Patriot. Thank you for doing whatever you can now. In Justice, Larry Klayman Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. Patriot, innocent Americans are begging for water in the Washington, DC jail. These innocent men and women are being tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship! ~~ Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~_

# SATURDAY, APRIL 6, 2024
---|---
**Happy Saturday**! On this date in 1917, the United States [formally declared war against](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuhSAUANCvgU0Dlys-BoYubq9rR0Ph8rwNPowSjX_fpHN_4CTn6zk_Axd-vz7DSr7lOofY-KQZO9sBziiTz0RARpLXowbUajAoF69jHBC1I0dudJjBaWseaEJ2YRwwSvagABUqq9xgjenxGx7JqQwPk4fRJoGKEre69z-V322hXO560t7Husril9a2Q5gPAZOA6bquvtTYv-opYOJGq4Cp1RTujt_dwker-y1gCtvOpVNW7j5tF5fChx0FqtcauPzJ7b_mbwAAAP__c09Seg) Germany and entered WWI. The war began in the summer of 1914, and Britain, France, and Russia welcomed the declaration as they needed American troops and supplies for the Allied war effort. It starting to feel like Spring! The Editor has been slaving away at an overly-ambitious gardening project, including an indoor seedling-starting station, grow lights and all. Let us know if you're working on your own garden project today, and check out [this great video](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjz1vgzAUAH-NvQWZ54eBwUOrio2uHZE_nmNHJo6IA-LfV-nc9U466X7mZTYpp_v126ykayiLcTXttOBFXQAX5F4HIiDJSbd9C9iKTiKPGgZjDbXSDdSa3gfjgrNDJwwqC7YfedIgAAUKJcZOSdmghcGPIsAgQ9crz1CQT7Vsza2ke40U8ll22hpXVp51rPXxZPKDwcRgOo6jOcurviy9_ZuY6iKT087kV7zZzzwHOgn5pv3jSDmnp-oZiutqUv5L1v_-fgMAAP__OKdRcg) on starting seeds indoors, if you have a green thumb (or wish it was a bit greener). Have you signed up for _The Flyover_ yet? If not, you can fix that [with one click](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7turDAQANCvsbtFw8xgoHBxpRXVJW1KBH7AJAavWGej_H0Upcz2pzmv4zTOkuRYX-Y92BLzNLsijzDxxVyQJ9bexhAwkA62bmvkGhpivVmITVwiLriwY8-xh75riRbnnYfG1VosAjIwGOgbQ1Txgp3vIWJHsWmNVwzBS8ln9ZblKFuI6Ss_wlm5vOtkt1Jud0X_FA4Kh79E4TDOq7j_crz_GBqCoqu_fUpKcjetYlj3WdKvNR9lV3Rl0Kd9bnR59v8OAAD__6JFWv0). [NativePath](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFutDAQhJ9m6UDr3cU-Che_hOjur05KiczZPhxxgMC5KG8fOUqZZkajmeLTvF3Hq0tLWh__3TPYHLfR3XN6hVFqXZOMUnkbQ6DAVbDKKBKFLUs1WwlaTRhEpugii9bGdSzKmU7MpVNTlSwhCQpq7FrN3MhEF99hpAvH1mgPgsGnvB3N-5bWPIe4fG2vcDT37Vktds55P4H_AQ1AQ5ya1RWy3eW5LICGwxdp9nkHHs7kgXuFugXS-8cE3JNgaxhI31VJvzT1bYjpOHOtWsRSEnBfnIH721Ad1u-faVnSqQ0IPp4uLT9I-a9_vgMAAP__sc5eeg) is paying the bills for us today. ## Friday Morning Earthquake Felt by Millions
An estimated 42 million people between the D.C. area and the New York-Canada border felt Friday morning's [4.8-magnitude earthquake](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGSpCAUAL8GszeFgKiBwSVmc-mFFspDuAVx4c248_dbs_HGXdXV1f_uy92EGI79r0k4kcuL2Sg8cVGgQahFNXZyiAJlg1Pbt0K1vJOq8dOwoeFjq9q1G1xrZd-vq5Lo9CYRrR6bMAkuFFdc87HTUt7UKgY7cicG6bpeW6Y42kC53P7ncJBHF1_5ieW25dTEyROdlck_TMxMzOTRhxjfjInZ54QHXpWJ-cCvSqYsCW0wyxUKMjGrrtc97wBNIf_5MB8IDiPB-gIlIIUYQz7gxHxGhEfdK2ClkAxhhWROqD5fFS6PBSEQXKZCpZKPHSsxMTdlsuf1tlTdM8X3ZMJPWkO_PfwOAAD__1C8dco), according to the U.S. Geological Survey. Officials determined Lebanon, New Jersey, to be the epicenter of the seismic event that started at 10:23 a.m. (EST) and struck 4.7 kilometers below the surface. [Four aftershocks followed](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuwyAQxvGnwZuty3EmeGDo4i1dO1rYPmISYlKgQXn7Kuna7S_9hk_f12k6WR_8fv60NzbFxckuxT94ola1SBM1q3HMyLJhczgekA7QS2o2M_RApAarZq3RwuBmq1k7QLnIFXrdeIOABAQKhl5J2dGMeh3AoZauP6pVEPDqS0zdJfq9bOzCMz44dUu8NcFspdyzkB8CR4FjrbVb5rxzzS8XOO5cnzFd_yoLHNmmsn3_2Cu3O9f2he-4cMr8FDg2yaz36kPwWR0FwflmfXivlf-u_wYAAP__rvJatw) in the next five hours. [Homes were damaged](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FurDAQQNGvsTuQGQ9mKVy8hm5fmxIZPF4mazAxXtD-fZTUqa90pfNxH--OI2-P_24lW0Ia3Vz4pBErUwGOKL0NREBakm26BrBRrUa5WBOw9S0END10swu9cmYK3UTaz8E0jWQLClChMqpvjdY1TnDzvQpw06HtjBeoyHNJuf5MvJWFQnynk3I9p1VGu5SyH0L_EzAIGNy-0XX8JAFD5JMEDORyWb5e7knVRlf1TvlZvXbvCh0yW79fHCMfphOoHqvj-Dsufym_AwAA___9AVQU) in New Jersey, and air traffic at John F. Kennedy, Newark Liberty, and LaGuardia airports was affected. New York City tunnels, bridges, buildings, and subways were also assessed for damage. Officials believe the earthquake to be one of the largest on the East Coast in the last century.
## A Rare Total Solar Eclipse Monday
A rare total solar eclipse will move across North America on Monday, giving millions an opportunity to experience [temporarily darkened skies](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOwyAQBb8GOiK8YGwKimvc5dorLWIvYU84WGYVK39_Supr35NmpPm5ztdIhR7377hh4FTnuDA9cbbKKbCzlWtIiIBGYuiGDmyne2NlDqNPndNGO-9tj-MyaO81mjG6Lt1gWSUF0GC11U773hlzsTcYV68TjCb1g1uF1bgS1-PyW-nBGVN51Scel6VusoTMvDdhvgRMAibOmKmU9ydgynXDB55NwNQ4Mqoz8pIFTLYf3DB26rM2hUuhvaHaI2fFlWMhfik-4hOLYtrfAHmEdT-pFGpuEFbft0gfj-T_gvwFAAD__17eYZo) as the moon blocks the face of the sun. The eclipse's path is expected to cast the moon's shadow over Texas, Oklahoma, Arkansas, Missouri, Illinois, Kentucky, Indiana, Ohio, Pennsylvania, New York, Vermont, New Hampshire and Maine. Other states will be treated to a partial solar eclipse. [You can see a map here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGunDAQRb_GdIPMYBsoKPIKupc2JRrwsDgyNoLZJfx9tFu_6l7pNEfnz_f4TSGG9PhNG_ey5JFmCS8eDThAM5rC9wszcl1wXzUVmkrb2hRrP1l0EzqLle6qWqNxSNZ2DTW-bezki9CjRqONdrqzrq5LM2HrO71gWy-2cV4ZzT5IPsq_OSRZeYl3fvFRznkrYr-K7KeqfykcFA7XdZXbmd5M4cAJnqfCIfH1ns_fcvJ0wwlnjnQAzzHsJ8NOskJeQLJQDHLDRjekLDAx8D-aBa6VBCSDzxAWuPMT6GDICWRlYP9ghQMd8PVVRSvtVhy9368QYzhdo4x-bBTix1l-Cvg_AAD___Mdcb8). Experts advise those viewing the phenomenon to [wear special eclipse glasses](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGupCAUQL8Gu2vwgqiFxU4mdrPtloaRq7APwQAzxr9_mVe_6hSnOTn_HvNDO-_C9lfvNJY1znop7k2zBAUoZ1mZcSVCEhWNTdegbHgrZGVHtaDplF47qdondYL3AyIOskE5KCn6yo3IUXLJFR9aJUQtn9ibga_Yi7XtlGGSk3Elpvp_dKFYWv0V35TqJe6VH20pR2biD8OJ4XSeZ73n8HEMJwrwygynQOcHhRYboo_bxXCylCiDjSeUCF9EB1zxlYAuyrBY502iADoYOKhkyHolMK_kwgbFEpRYtIccvU5Ai3dHJoaTTnC7Nb7H-71KozlO573LqmOSb7t2_ie5_PbvOwAA___I-HIH), make and use an indirect viewing device like a pinhole projector, or view live footage on a screen. The [next total solar eclipse](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAURb_G3rDggQkZGLpkS9eOFoGH_VoMlkFx8_eVu3Tpdq_OcnQ-7tPdUaI8v7sVbYtlcr7REyfFNAM1qT7YiAgoe7TiIkAJPkrVL9brKIw0AF75MajgXIjGXIUEj0KH0JMFDoorrvl11FIO6gEmXHkEI-N40aFTHAO1sg-fhXJbMKZXeeI--LL2yS6tbbWTbx3cOrgdxzHkh8941JN3cKueMHv8W-yE5y3J7Qx9oq0iOyUYPnF_tYXyzL5yOdicXK1YWaMVWSvNJWovht9bcpQxsN1nJ5SWBvrdhu2glKjqS6f4vDpKv4btv1w_AQAA___tL23v) will occur in 2026. It will mostly pass over the Arctic Ocean, with some visibility in Greenland, Iceland, Portugal, and northern Spain.
## New Shows and Movies to Stream
After a slowdown of new content in late March, streamers have put together [an impressive list of new](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFvpDAQBeBfY7pZmfHgxQXFNXR77ZXI4PEydwYj8C6X_Poom5RpXvOkT0_vz224eUmy3n_7hbsS8-CnIk8eCCwgDVSFLjIjm4q7-loj1boxVM2d8cGOk8cWsXaOyBgbnHWmdTqODqmSDjWSJm21a6wxFxqxDU5HbE1srjYo0hyk5P3yN8taZo7pLT95v0x5qVI3l7IdyvxS2CvsA08SvjqF_aessNevaBT2Ix8FVj5hyU_hA445nweczP94DbByiUn-w_xID_CLf88rbLssDPOYwW-7JCD4Rqu9C9spKclhr4r0ffGSXpvKTwd9BAAA__-LQmSj) shows and movies to carry us into May. Apple TV has [two solid entries](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxszz1uhDAQQOHTmM7IjIefLVykodu0KZEXj5dJDF7hEVZuHyV1-ic9fR_35e458fF89zs5iXnxq_BFC-pBAy7YBBeJgGxDrhs7wM70FpvNPda-7-I4dYg3IrOSjX41wViKFKYQGnZgAA2awdz6wdoWHzCFm4kw2diPQ1BoKLDks_3MfMhGMX3ni852zXuT3CbyKsq-KZgVzLXWNvCTxSc56Qjlt1Iw7_liKgrmBxXRB1VdtlyLlqyLnOR3LRsXXYm-FMzN6cKrckpchlGhee6e099P_sP_BAAA__-LFVzk) with the noir detective series _Sugar_ led by Colin Farrell, and _Manhunt_ , a historical drama about the hunt for presidential assassin John Wilkes Booth. For those that prefer music history, Hulu has a documentary about Brian Jones, one of the founding members of the Rolling Stones. Instrumental in the band's early success, Jones found himself out of the band days before his tragic death. The start of Spring has the Flyover staff talking about our favorite baseball movies, and an impromptu poll produced the following movie suggestions: _The Natural_ , _Field of Dreams_ , _Moneyball_ , _Major League_ , and _Fever Pitch_ --all of which are available on Amazon Prime.
* * *

On this date in 1917, the United States Germany and entered WWI. The war began in the summer of 1914, and Britain, France, and Russia welcomed the declaration as they needed American troops and supplies for the Allied war effort. It starting to feel like Spring! The Editor has been slaving away at an overly-ambitious gardening project, including an indoor seedling-starting station, grow lights and all. Let us know if you're working on your own garden project today, and check out on starting seeds indoors, if you have a green thumb (or wish it was a bit greener). Have you signed up for The Flyover yet? If not, you can fix that . is paying the bills for us today. Check them out! | Friday Morning Earthquake Felt by Millions An estimated 42 million people between the D.C. area and the New York-Canada border felt Friday morning's , according to the U.S. Geological Survey. Officials determined Lebanon, New Jersey, to be the epicenter of the seismic event that started at 10:23 a.m. (EST) and struck 4.7 kilometers below the surface. in the next five hours. in New Jersey, and air traffic at John F. Kennedy, Newark Liberty, and LaGuardia airports was affected. New York City tunnels, bridges, buildings, and subways were also assessed for damage. Officials believe the earthquake to be one of the largest on the East Coast in the last century. A Rare Total Solar Eclipse Monday A rare total solar eclipse will move across North America on Monday, giving millions an opportunity to experience as the moon blocks the face of the sun. The eclipse's path is expected to cast the moon's shadow over Texas, Oklahoma, Arkansas, Missouri, Illinois, Kentucky, Indiana, Ohio, Pennsylvania, New York, Vermont, New Hampshire and Maine. Other states will be treated to a partial solar eclipse. . Experts advise those viewing the phenomenon to , make and use an indirect viewing device like a pinhole projector, or view live footage on a screen. The will occur in 2026. It will mostly pass over the Arctic Ocean, with some visibility in Greenland, Iceland, Portugal, and northern Spain. New Shows and Movies to Stream After a slowdown of new content in late March, streamers have put together shows and movies to carry us into May. Apple TV has with the noir detective series Sugar led by Colin Farrell, and Manhunt , a historical drama about the hunt for presidential assassin John Wilkes Booth. For those that prefer music history, Hulu has a documentary about Brian Jones, one of the founding members of the Rolling Stones. Instrumental in the band's early success, Jones found himself out of the band days before his tragic death. The start of Spring has the Flyover staff talking about our favorite baseball movies, and an impromptu poll produced the following movie suggestions: The Natural , Field of Dreams , Moneyball , Major League , and Fever Pitch --all of which are available on Amazon Prime. name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Justice, weaponized
body:
Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a0f26a5a7ff14666aaf45078dcefa9b8&_e=wdKlm318fQjDIM5gEJi8Zt0jZzYLfW-R4upvDHUa4vV5XDX8ZFEZc_7wxmkLip97HVs0MTWzLgiq56TEEhal9FW-xyrIXPLFKLFcEnHuq2szifoHuOT4WdRc5h7fm16t3XrFGpFmCOd5RnY9EXaxFPSDM8LcAF2tZrkD_2Jn1ItCpWdR30o4i-VK38AFinAEzZptBJaAXnn7dCczcOlRCLCh1xrItlyYCzGCsa9BzBMhjSrCDRRUSGutXBsnJZEP8qi9uw7vev5vrCM3O0k8qvcIp9aupSP2APdVBNuLqiWU4AVaZLnL55uxg-Pu71muaYEn64xQPyrdswzAS0lqKM70rDQIquNUmmtzNH-4TjtkkgnXyKW996cyO6cNRB4hrsb_jtSwgJ7NTUMDfC-2CQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a0f26a5a7ff14666aaf45078dcefa9b8&_e=wdKlm318fQjDIM5gEJi8Zt0jZzYLfW-R4upvDHUa4vV5XDX8ZFEZc_7wxmkLip97HVs0MTWzLgiq56TEEhal9FW-xyrIXPLFKLFcEnHuq2szifoHuOT4WdRc5h7fm16t3XrFGpFmCOd5RnY9EXaxFPSDM8LcAF2tZrkD_2Jn1ItCpWdR30o4i-VK38AFinAEzZptBJaAXnn7dCczcOlRCLCh1xrItlyYCzGCsa9BzBMhjSrCDRRUSGutXBsnJZEP-M1ExYnqJAJzsiuhCBODlY0VphSptVdgdMDk7KbS2pWuHBwedqrhCB6IFns8KMBSTxLHZy46HrD3JrgdtCZfuD-WbwAFgCJfq2E57nizsNNGlT4Bg8Rc-yxvhK3SEhRMMsyOjxdo1EHABvGVanPKow%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a0f26a5a7ff14666aaf45078dcefa9b8&_e=wdKlm318fQjDIM5gEJi8Zt0jZzYLfW-R4upvDHUa4vV5XDX8ZFEZc_7wxmkLip97HVs0MTWzLgiq56TEEhal9FW-xyrIXPLFKLFcEnHuq2szifoHuOT4WdRc5h7fm16t3XrFGpFmCOd5RnY9EXaxFPSDM8LcAF2tZrkD_2Jn1ItCpWdR30o4i-VK38AFinAEzZptBJaAXnn7dCczcOlRCLCh1xrItlyYCzGCsa9BzBMhjSrCDRRUSGutXBsnJZEPWzcU9feL1wuHGL9XyfQSTHFWL5_7pxfFmyLfnuFc1MC7BzY9Ak7tICHx3r8rwvqKXedNXzSw2yBbK9eg4IwzKtr8ZYFTyNFZXlv3SFpIAxRWlIu22kvvTF6zQ7dzQzc74Rc896krVeIE7r4HhnejBQ%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |
---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[**unsubscribe**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_s=a0f26a5a7ff14666aaf45078dcefa9b8&_t=1IVeBpeD36RXEZ3PSvKVwo-lMgkpjY8QM6EywTflcGd47w54jxwt0LN6WQ92lcL4scSySYDd48dVAn4f_AlJq5rb6TrtGrisqibHhD1U_pA%3D)

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5418093167a84ee4b4ac1d982a319426&_e=S_Xo_s5p0Db9sAHMSkYLeC5vEFy5Et1r329dVKewzu_SLtvx_ZNM-FgbSopLbdpB4LDCq9A5A8VsRNFGzEv8l3O0r9TIG_UrSqu0rodMHy5gDUezvlwKS3zvKNp96p-huZz-R3PdP6reNsW9gC73vOJl6PffZ-QpIDzlOSEQNr--7pbxsdRDgaXCueVy0huS_74PsFq5oQHUhWQ0JWWd6YBVRzFYfhEQ4lEc6TtkGCwp2VgPx6d7LdQj_t6-UIlvEBRO53ZDCnXgdsy6fWqEyd1vkDWqo6A3u9OvZGGm2OFsnmfS-saKmcb-p9bwUrnQP65EY8SRASTvO6opUIySai33vkcjUaYI-9EjRt27K9wdnTfDEAw1GPPbyNBWc07l7P62bY8C9EbbAJNqYSDe8w%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5418093167a84ee4b4ac1d982a319426&_e=S_Xo_s5p0Db9sAHMSkYLeC5vEFy5Et1r329dVKewzu_SLtvx_ZNM-FgbSopLbdpB4LDCq9A5A8VsRNFGzEv8l3O0r9TIG_UrSqu0rodMHy5gDUezvlwKS3zvKNp96p-huZz-R3PdP6reNsW9gC73vOJl6PffZ-QpIDzlOSEQNr--7pbxsdRDgaXCueVy0huS_74PsFq5oQHUhWQ0JWWd6YBVRzFYfhEQ4lEc6TtkGCwp2VgPx6d7LdQj_t6-UIlvqrL1oXXQ2PngHNB6V6-4hvxpqf32qu5DqCpG1y3Y4CMDUIthOkMUFuue3kASHaNjcFydMyoGINntCxTjgXfPZobnhSMWcakeezG6XgOmy50A3AVa5CA6uj_YXSuz5JJ2C9fRleOFyCzyUg5ExwHpIA%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5418093167a84ee4b4ac1d982a319426&_e=S_Xo_s5p0Db9sAHMSkYLeC5vEFy5Et1r329dVKewzu_SLtvx_ZNM-FgbSopLbdpB4LDCq9A5A8VsRNFGzEv8l3O0r9TIG_UrSqu0rodMHy5gDUezvlwKS3zvKNp96p-huZz-R3PdP6reNsW9gC73vOJl6PffZ-QpIDzlOSEQNr--7pbxsdRDgaXCueVy0huS_74PsFq5oQHUhWQ0JWWd6YBVRzFYfhEQ4lEc6TtkGCwp2VgPx6d7LdQj_t6-UIlvGcc1V4uFW7r7Xrpda4z5hM0ba_l4Yn25vUv51U9qKQP9jgWmEFB7Hfae5dJjTKYS23f6U9cZUIGkrpswNby7ZBTF2E89LPIJA8IpUwniS8TVQh7tlmX8Bck5Vt_X9MGI0XqfNOiY0QZqWyz_nAHGOg%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. body:

[ ](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkD2PnDAQQH-N6YyMbWwoKCIhqmyKNCmRPwbWko3RYBbl3592b6-65tqnN08z8-8230yIYVv_mATDEnHGY052Xi5aMpYTwc-ccUmZpEzNovIDa3ovZQVDoxsumWq6proPtndWmrbTnWLScc7B9ky3ve9l12ptqzA8O-w5wKTirG4WDp1tvTZay15ZIpmJgKVeEMDnZDYfgwUs_xH2jKV2OVVxuJeyH0T8InwifHq7lynuXiM8HrXLhE8W1jVsK10y0ssUQJos3fNuiJjOkuYjn-iAiPGbSLh6CsURMU6__9Kvpd88gQ9nImJ8xT6ZM2k3Yd2IGJMlXJmUz60QMfK2wsHvV4gxHEoTydZkQnwdUn7w7I8AAAD__30bhVw)

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkD2PnDAQQH-N6YyMbWwoKCIhqmyKNCmRPwbWko3RYBbl3592b6-65tqnN08z8-8230yIYVv_mATDEnHGY052Xi5aMpYTwc-ccUmZpEzNovIDa3ovZQVDoxsumWq6proPtndWmrbTnWLScc7B9ky3ve9l12ptqzA8O-w5wKTirG4WDp1tvTZay15ZIpmJgKVeEMDnZDYfgwUs_xH2jKV2OVVxuJeyH0T8InwifHq7lynuXiM8HrXLhE8W1jVsK10y0ssUQJos3fNuiJjOkuYjn-iAiPGbSLh6CsURMU6__9Kvpd88gQ9nImJ8xT6ZM2k3Yd2IGJMlXJmUz60QMfK2wsHvV4gxHEoTydZkQnwdUn7w7I8AAAD__30bhVw)**

Over a year ago, I wrote an urgent email to patriots just like you about what's really happening to January 6 Peaceful Protesters in the Washington, DC jail.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* **Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy****through a 4 inch by 10 inch window of cold metal doors**
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

But there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water, and keep them from going to court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for years ... in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban and Islamic terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on.

**That 's why I've filed crucial lawsuits to FREE January 6 peaceful protesters. Including a critical new lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP.**

I'm Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 41 years.

You've seen me on CNN, Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

**I 'm the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime. I _guarantee_ Bill Clinton still remembers me!**

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.****And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS!**

Nobody else is doing what I'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

**[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $$25, $50, $100, or even more.](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkD2PnDAQQH-N6YyMbWwoKCIhqmyKNCmRPwbWko3RYBbl3592b6-65tqnN08z8-8230yIYVv_mATDEnHGY052Xi5aMpYTwc-ccUmZpEzNovIDa3ovZQVDoxsumWq6proPtndWmrbTnWLScc7B9ky3ve9l12ptqzA8O-w5wKTirG4WDp1tvTZay15ZIpmJgKVeEMDnZDYfgwUs_xH2jKV2OVVxuJeyH0T8InwifHq7lynuXiM8HrXLhE8W1jVsK10y0ssUQJos3fNuiJjOkuYjn-iAiPGbSLh6CsURMU6__9Kvpd88gQ9nImJ8xT6ZM2k3Yd2IGJMlXJmUz60QMfK2wsHvV4gxHEoTydZkQnwdUn7w7I8AAAD__30bhVw)**

I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can **now**.

In Justice,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, innocent Americans are begging for water in the Washington, DC jail. These innocent men and women are being tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

**[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $25, $50, $100, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Every dollar counts.](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkD2PnDAQQH-N6YyMbWwoKCIhqmyKNCmRPwbWko3RYBbl3592b6-65tqnN08z8-8230yIYVv_mATDEnHGY052Xi5aMpYTwc-ccUmZpEzNovIDa3ovZQVDoxsumWq6proPtndWmrbTnWLScc7B9ky3ve9l12ptqzA8O-w5wKTirG4WDp1tvTZay15ZIpmJgKVeEMDnZDYfgwUs_xH2jKV2OVVxuJeyH0T8InwifHq7lynuXiM8HrXLhE8W1jVsK10y0ssUQJos3fNuiJjOkuYjn-iAiPGbSLh6CsURMU6__9Kvpd88gQ9nImJ8xT6ZM2k3Yd2IGJMlXJmUz60QMfK2wsHvV4gxHEoTydZkQnwdUn7w7I8AAAD__30bhVw)**

name: Patti Reilly
subject: Criminals over cops?
body:
I know you and I have never met. But I’m praying that you’ll help me save my son, Officer Terence Sutton.

Dear friend,

I know you and I have never met. But I'm praying that you'll help me save my son, Officer Terence Sutton.

This is a picture of Terence and me at a dinner celebrating his graduation from the Police Academy.
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7RYNwmGHWBZPElyUmiVwcg~~/AARclAA~/RgRn88C2P0SWaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi82NzQ5MjkyYi03YzU2LTQwOWYtYWJjNy02ZDQxMjdiMzUwNzU_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwNDA2X0JER19MRUxERl9TTUxQX1JFTl9QQS1VU0NOVwNzcGNCCmYQBCgRZmuqLLNSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
I was so proud that night. But I was also terrified.

Terence was going to be patrolling the streets of Washington, DC, where crime is sky-high and politicians side with criminals over cops. But never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **- murder of a criminal my son didn't even touch.**

The story is so shocking that if it didn't happen to my son, _I wouldn 't even believe it._ **[And I'm praying you will help me save my son](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7RYNwmGHWBZPElyUmiVwcg~~/AARclAA~/RgRn88C2P0SWaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi82NzQ5MjkyYi03YzU2LTQwOWYtYWJjNy02ZDQxMjdiMzUwNzU_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwNDA2X0JER19MRUxERl9TTUxQX1JFTl9QQS1VU0NOVwNzcGNCCmYQBCgRZmuqLLNSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** - **but first, let me explain what happened.**

Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang's territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long - including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he had been seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

So when Terence saw him illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull Karon over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

And then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here's where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd's death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon's death.

The pressure campaign worked, and prosecutors charged my son with _**Second-Degree Murder.**_

When Terence called to tell me about the charges, I was in disbelief. Any sane person could see that Karon's death, while tragic, was no one's fault but his own.

_He_ chose to run from the cops.

_He_ chose to not wear a helmet.

_He_ chose to speed through that alley without looking where he was going.

So, when I learned that Terence could be sentenced to **_sixty_ _years_** in prison for Karon's death, my head started spinning. And it only got worse when the trial began.

You see, the judge refused to allow Terence's legal team to present all of the facts in his defense.

The jury never got to hear that Karon was a known member of a violent gang...

They never got to hear that he was wearing an ankle monitor because of a violent assault he had committed just weeks before...

They never got to hear that he had drugs and thousands of dollars in cash strapped to his leg...

And they never got to hear about the drugs in Karon's system at the time of the crash.

Sitting in the courtroom, I couldn't believe my ears when the jury filed out and declared Terence _**" guilty."**_

He's currently awaiting sentencing.

Now you understand why I'm so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them.

He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

And at the same time the bleeding-heart DC politicians are letting shoplifters, carjackers, and drug dealers walk away scot-free...

...they're trying to put my son - a decorated officer who has received 60 awards and commendations - away for 60 years for something he _didn 't_ _do._

I had almost lost hope, but then we learned about the **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** -or LELDF for short.

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops - and their families - at their lowest moments. And when I got the call from their president, Jason Johnson, I was at my lowest moment.

Not only did LELDF decide to help my son get the legal defense he deserves. They're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys and expert witnesses for Terence.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone:

**[Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7RYNwmGHWBZPElyUmiVwcg~~/AARclAA~/RgRn88C2P0SWaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi82NzQ5MjkyYi03YzU2LTQwOWYtYWJjNy02ZDQxMjdiMzUwNzU_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwNDA2X0JER19MRUxERl9TTUxQX1JFTl9QQS1VU0NOVwNzcGNCCmYQBCgRZmuqLLNSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

To fund his defense, Terence had to sell his home, his car, his beloved motorcycle, and most of his personal belongings. Everything he owns now fits in just nine small boxes. He has almost nothing left.

If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. And it makes me cry when I think of how he would feel about what Terence is being put through right now.

I simply can't bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

**[So if you are at all able, would you consider following this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7RYNwmGHWBZPElyUmiVwcg~~/AARclAA~/RgRn88C2P0SWaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi82NzQ5MjkyYi03YzU2LTQwOWYtYWJjNy02ZDQxMjdiMzUwNzU_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwNDA2X0JER19MRUxERl9TTUxQX1JFTl9QQS1VU0NOVwNzcGNCCmYQBCgRZmuqLLNSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

**Any amount - $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more - will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Terence's team is currently looking at every available option to keep his case alive.

**[And you and your $35 contribution could make the difference in Terence being acquitted or spending the next 60 years behind bars.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7RYNwmGHWBZPElyUmiVwcg~~/AARclAA~/RgRn88C2P0SWaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi82NzQ5MjkyYi03YzU2LTQwOWYtYWJjNy02ZDQxMjdiMzUwNzU_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwNDA2X0JER19MRUxERl9TTUxQX1JFTl9QQS1VU0NOVwNzcGNCCmYQBCgRZmuqLLNSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you - in advance - for doing what you can to help all the wrongly-accused officers LELDF is working with. Like Terence.

Sincerely,

Patti Reilly

P.S. I know a few kind words from someone like you will help lift Terence's spirits. This guilty verdict has been so devastating for him. **[So if you choose to make a $35 gift to LELDF, would you also please include a little note-maybe a prayer?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7RYNwmGHWBZPElyUmiVwcg~~/AARclAA~/RgRn88C2P0SWaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi82NzQ5MjkyYi03YzU2LTQwOWYtYWJjNy02ZDQxMjdiMzUwNzU_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwNDA2X0JER19MRUxERl9TTUxQX1JFTl9QQS1VU0NOVwNzcGNCCmYQBCgRZmuqLLNSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** There's a field on the page for you to do this. Thank you -from the bottom of my heart.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_

Peter –
This week, I called out Joe Biden's absurd ultimatum on Israel and his support for a ceasefire in their war against Hamas. I also introduced legislation to block onerous new regulations from Biden's EPA, and slammed the continued march toward irreversible gender transition surgery for minors.
Your support is appreciated more than you know. Donations from committed patriots like you across the country helped me win my primary election last month, and now I am pivoting my attention to ensuring Republicans maintain control of the House in the upcoming election. Every dollar you send my campaign is put to immediate use growing our conservative movement, winning the messaging battle against the left, and helping conservatives win up and down the ballot. If you're willing to donate - even a small amount - it will go a long way to support this mission.

| Know-nothing activists -- who think a transgender flag and Hamas flag go well together -- have unfortunately infiltrated Biden's thinking. Let's put this idea of a ceasefire into perspective. You want Israel to stop fighting against an enemy that has no intention of ever stopping. You know when there was a ceasefire? October 6th. You know what happened on October 7th? The biggest massacre of Israelis in recent history. The rape of countless women. The burning of infants. The ruthless killing of civilians.
War is always ugly, but the blood of every civilian death is on Hamas. Not Israel. The demand should be simple: Hamas must surrender totally and completely and allow a transition of power. Hamas can never have power again. If you care about Palestinian lives, that is what must happen.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| LEGISLATION TO STOP ONEROUS REGULATIONS FROM THE EPA
---

| Yet again, EPA is creating a costly 'solution' for a problem that doesn't exist. Why? Because the radical environmentalists of the Biden Administration believe modern science and civilization are a scourge, not a benefit.
The latest rule from the EPA requires burdensome reporting requirements on facilities working with and housing hazardous substances. This rule is unnecessary because the facilities that would be covered by this rule have a proven record of incident prevention already - there has been an 80 percent reduction in incidents required to be reported to the EPA, proving that risk management efforts are already effective under current regulations. This unnecessary rule will increase compliance costs for facilities, and estimates put the total annual cost of this rule at over $250 million.
That is why I introduced legislation to block the new regulation, so the EPA cannot burden facilities - including those along the Houston Ship Channel - with unnecessary reporting requirements.

# This Land is Our Land...
_Tell Them So On May 14 at the Polls_.
Dear , I'm freaking fed up. We have a Republic, and we will keep it. And you and I have our homes in the Free State of Maryland, but the Left wants to steal our home values with outrageous taxation and spending, and woke "green new deal" policies.

Too many wishy-washy Republicans and woke Democrats are putting our country in jeopardy.

_**The good news is, I'm running strong and ahead to be your next America First Congressman.**_

The bad news comes every day: the U.S. House passed a horrific $1.2T spending pork bill just last month which raises the debt to $56 trillion over the next 10 years, placing us as the worst modern nation on earth for debt to GDP ratio (150%) which even liberal economists warn will be our downfall; and now, yesterday, the Maryland legislature just passed a $63 billion dollar budget with...yes, new TAXES.

Remember when I was running for Governor and warned you that the Democrats would raise your taxes?! Many establishment types mocked and said it was not true. Let them eat crow.

After 97% of all Maryland property tax assessments [jumped 20.6% in 2022](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=51420f37a7&e=5bb5efcda7), the State real property assessments this year in 2023 have jumped [another ](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=ee7ee656c4&e=5bb5efcda7)**[average of 26%](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=0e57b1115a&e=5bb5efcda7)(with many increasing at over 36%).** _That's a 46.6%- 56.6% increase in property tax assessments and taxation in little more than two years!_

This in the face of massive inflation and - wait for it, just-passed tax increases by the Maryland legislature on transportation at a time when we are experiencing skyrocketing "Bidenomics" increased costs in gas, food, housing and energy prices at a 46.22% inflationary increase.

[](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=2559ae1d2c&e=5bb5efcda7)

IT'S ALMOST AS IF THE LEFT DOESN'T WANT HARD-WORKING MARYLANDERS TO LIVE AND WORK HERE ANYMORE.

**THAT TICKS ME OFF - THIS LAND IS OUR LAND, NOT THE GOVERNMENT'S AND EVEN LESS THOSE INVADING US VIA THE SOUTHERN BORDER.**

And what does Biden do yesterday? He came to Maryland and gave the BILLION DOLLAR FOREIGN shipping company and its insurer a complete pass for destroying our Francis Scott Key Bridge in the recent collapse, promising instead that you and I have to pay for the entire rebuild.

This is not right. It is offensive to hardworking Marylanders.

I'm sick and tired of wishy-washy Republicans and woke Democrats in Congress pretending to "do the people's work" while selling us down the river and smirking away with our hard-earned money. **They are leaving the future of our children and grandchildren indebted to Communist China.**

**As the only candidate to endorse President Trump in this race,_I am the sole VICTORY candidate who will win this fall_. President Trump will be re-elected President, and he is running ahead in the Sixth District and needs a team in place in Congress to support the America First agenda without finger-to-the-wind equivocation. **

As the only candidate with the highest GOP unity vote in the history of Maryland's contested gubernatorial primaries, I am the unifier without compromising on principle. I will never bow to the woke mob - and I will never sell you out. No one else in this race can honestly claim that truth.

Will you[ join me in this effort ](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=7b4ab5d56b&e=5bb5efcda7)to win for America and bring balance in Maryland to the liberal tax and spend and woke policies that are crushing our economy and families?

I need to raise $25k immediately to fund our win with urgent purchases to reach 100,000 voters. THE TIME IS NOW.

If you can [chip in at least $25, $50, or even $100 ](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=8b62144740&e=5bb5efcda7)or more, with God's grace we will win.

Thank you for standing with me in support of freedom - and not being easily mislead by politicians who have signed on to woke policies that destroy our families and community.

Freedom and Victory,
[](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=a237dbc6bc&e=5bb5efcda7)
Dan Cox, Candidate for U.S. Congress (R-MD6) [](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=d34936122e&e=5bb5efcda7)
P.S. Please forward this e-mail to your like-minded conservative, pro-Trump friends and tell them to sign up on the email list if they haven't already. Thank you!
P.P.S. Mail-in voting has already begun - your donation now is much appreciated!

body:
I just need a second to explain where I'm coming from

| |

---
| | | Folks - this is John Kennedy.

**It kills me to say this but some of these emails are about as useful as a screen door on a submarine.**

Maybe it's a few Big Tech overlords sending our emails to spam...

Maybe it's the crazies calling good folks like you traitors for ignoring them...

Maybe it's that most of you are a little tired of politics...

And on the last point, that's OK. I completely understand. But I want to explain where I'm coming from: You see, my Conservative friends over in the House have a HUGE deadline closing in, and I just got word they're pacing DANGEROUSLY behind their goal.

_We 'd have a real mess on our hands if they come up short._

I've never been one to dance around an issue when I speak with you. _**[So with all due respect, I'm humbly asking you to pitch in just a few bucks before March is over and done with.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e374672a06534a5191d4315910afcc46&_e=CVjw_ZZFqjJY3jo_k76vvR3KQ7VYa1kel0OegF5KfVQ1doz7HMnddMf8Qtcyy7fi_r1EmENK3LWUAryBaEpp6vrFvGcgA7f6EjdEFI9uEQjoJYY0L_i71OvXm8mxq4pEUUXMtSZQu_tQE6Ei9TnKXJPoV-e7bhoOBKXt50sVEI9QYlPKeRZbywPa41VeRop2mi_9TCKx3sFA6VvsGBianlOVSi2gXyRk5KAAnQ5WTEFUNqyQfIlX5YbawQ_q0BYblks0es0NXAI07BfEJUM-tiYatFaOrKk1dWKTRwWWWyjoRXmWSRi98fO6QtpYQIrljV_yHvWVVHEPOHLUVrZo1Rghd_vKx6VsJmMU7qdsUv32dp9zfJs-vcN1z0uGNnsKmTdZVYNyculjFhepOgZO6MdiTT2pyL85k9E0e0MXtRddlzCVaKP1wAoYpl_oMwumtVtnPq6IFHvDiNaKzs3jKA%3D%3D "So with all due respect, I’m humbly asking you to pitch in just a few bucks before March is over and done with.")**_

Look, the deadline was important before but now I'm hearing Joe Biden just raised 40 million bucks last month and compared to Republicans, the DNC has THREE TIMES the cash-on-hand!

I'm afraid this will be enough to put Liberals over the top... That's why I really need your help right now.

clean_body: I just need a second to explain where I'm coming from | | | | | Folks - this is John Kennedy. It kills me to say this but some of these emails are about as useful as a screen door on a submarine. Maybe it's a few Big Tech overlords sending our emails to spam... Maybe it's the crazies calling good folks like you traitors for ignoring them... Maybe it's that most of you are a little tired of politics... And on the last point, that's OK. I completely understand. But I want to explain where I'm coming from: You see, my Conservative friends over in the House have a HUGE deadline closing in, and I just got word they're pacing DANGEROUSLY behind their goal. We 'd have a real mess on our hands if they come up short. I've never been one to dance around an issue when I speak with you. "So with all due respect, I’m humbly asking you to pitch in just a few bucks before March is over and done with." Look, the deadline was important before but now I'm hearing Joe Biden just raised 40 million bucks last month and compared to Republicans, the DNC has THREE TIMES the cash-on-hand! I'm afraid this will be enough to put Liberals over the top... That's why I really need your help right now. | | | "SEND IN TEN BUCKS HERE" | | | "SEND IN THIRTY BUCKS HERE \(MOST FOLKS GIVE THIS MUCH\") | | | "SEND IN FIFTY BUCKS NOW" | | | "SEND IN FIFTY BUCKS NOW" James Comer reached out ... Mike Johnson reached out... Byron Donalds reached out... Kellyanne Conway reached out... Sean Spicer reached out... Steve Scalise reached out... Sorry for following up AGAIN but we just don't have time to stand around - not if we want to win! "I’m humbly asking you for a few bucks before the end of the day to help save our Conservative friends and defeat Liberals up and down the ballot." God bless you, John N. Kennedy | "John N. Kennedy" | | | "Please take my Election Year Check-In!" It's House Majority Leader Steve Scalise. I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my "ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN"** at your earliest convenience.
