name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Where’s the beef? Update From Mississippi’s Conservative Think Tank.
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/successsequence-11572118?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**Mississippi is now surrounded by states that have either passed, or are in the process of passing, laws that will give every family school choice.** A proposal to do something similar in our state never even made it to a full vote in the legislature.
---
|
---
_Mississippi is now surrounded by states that have universal school choice._
| How odd that there has been so little progress towards school choice in such a solidly conservative state. **School choice, surely, is one policy that unites every wing of the conservative movement across America more than any other. **

**School choice appeals as much to blue collar Trump conservatives as it does to conservatives in the country clubs.** Donald Trump has spoken passionately in defense of universal school choice. His Education Secretary, Betsy De Vos, has fought heroically – both in office and afterwards - for school choice.

**Universal school choice has universal appeal for conservatives – except, it seems, in Mississippi.**

Even more odd, perhaps, is that it is not only school choice that has failed to advance in the Mississippi state legislature in 2024. **A whole raft of solid conservative measures have failed this session. **
---
|
---
_Where’s the beef?_
| Two months ago, there were high hopes that the legislature might give back to voters the right of initiative. **This measure died in the Senate. **

**Most conservatives, you might think, would oppose the DEI (Diversity, Equity & Inclusion) agenda that has run rampant across US university campuses.** A modest bill was put forward to prevent your tax dollars funding DEI programs at our public universities. **This measure was killed off in committee.**

At the start of the session, many leading lawmakers agreed that something needed to be done to deal with the mismanagement of Mississippi’s Public Employee’s Retirement System (PERS). **A modest proposal to change the way PERS was overseen was shot down in the Senate.**

Most people accept that healthcare in Mississippi is not as good as it needs to be. HB419 could have removed some of the intentionally restrictive red tape that limits the number of healthcare providers able to treat patients**. It was killed off. **

**At some point, I put it to you, the voters might start to notice. **It is not sustainable to have voters repeatedly vote conservative but to get so little conservative policy in return.

**The U.S. South is flourishing.** For decades now, there has been what you might call the Southern Success Story. Texas, North Carolina, and Florida have taken off. Tennessee, Alabama, and even Arkansas are seeing strong, sustained growth, too. **Why not Mississippi?**
---
|
---
_Governor Reeves with Speaker Jason White unveiling another massive inward investment project. _
| To be fair, we are starting to see signs of the kind of growth we need. **Our Governor has helped attract so much inward investment that there is a danger we grow blasé about yet another billion-dollar announcement.** It seems that there are now more people moving to Mississippi than leaving. Every time I visit Hattiesburg, Laurel, Starkville, Oxford, or the Coast, I see evidence of growth all around.

Nor is there anything pre-ordained about Mississippi being ranked 50th out of 50 states. **It is a choice to not emulate the reforms that have helped transform other southern states for the better.**

**If a conservative were to run for office today against tax cuts, they’d be unlikely to get very far.** It wasn’t always that way, and it took people like Grover Norquist and Americans for Tax Reform to make being a conservative synonymous with wanting lower taxes.
---
|
---
_Rockefeller, Bush Snr, Reagan: not every kind of conservative used to favor tax cuts._
| We need to do something similar when it comes to school choice. **We need to make it unthinkable to run as a conservative unless you favor universal education freedom accounts.**

The good news is that this is beginning to happen. In Texas, for example, a few weeks ago, almost all anti-school choice conservatives lost out in their primary elections. **It would be impossible for anyone to run as a conservative in Texas to be Governor or Lieutenant Governor without unequivocally supporting universal school choice. **

Why stop with school choice? I doubt it will be possible to run as a conservative unless you oppose spending tax dollars on divisive DEI or favor giving citizens back their right of initiative either.

**Sooner rather than later, conservative folk will start to say “No more BS, please. Where’s the beef?”**

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=b03d394a11&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=42a55f10a3) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=42a55f10a3).

Friend,

President Trump is under attack - and Georgia is the **FRONT LINE** in this fight.

The woke-left will say and do ANYTHING to defeat him to ensure another four years of Joe Biden and the D.C. Democrats' disastrous agenda...

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: We are campaigning hard.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1300%2E135344%2EqDanLJ)

No one person can win a race for U.S. Senate by themselves.
There are some things I can do -- like make sure I am campaigning hard and talking to voters every single day.
But there are a lot of things I can’t do on my own – which is why we’re building a grassroots team of volunteers who are knocking doors, making calls, and talking to voters as early as possible.
Here is a photo from our first “Snow Boots on the Ground” of 2024 from last month. We’ve done similar events rain, snow, or shine in every one of my campaigns since 2018 because I believe a ground game -- knocking doors, making calls, sending texts, and registering voters -- is critical to win in our very swingy swing state. The goal is to train up volunteers to make sure they have what they need to talk to voters early.
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-apr24.UpsRlZ&refcode=em240406-1-30&t=2&akid=1300%2E135344%2EqDanLJ)
But there’s another thing I can’t do myself, and that’s fund a winning campaign with personal resources. While some of our opponents can write themselves big checks, our campaign is relying on a whole lot of people chipping in a little at a time.
If we're going to keep this Senate seat blue, and if we're going to make sure Joe Biden wins Michigan (and the White House), it will take all of us.
Our average online donation is around $40.
Some give more, some give less. All that matters is that you're chipping in what you can to help us meet the fundraising goals we need to reach in order to win.
[**Can I count on you to use this link to contribute $3, or whatever you can afford today, directly to my campaign for U.S. Senate in Michigan?](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-apr24.UpsRlZ&refcode=em240406-1-30&t=3&akid=1300%2E135344%2EqDanLJ)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

Elissa Slotkin

If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | | | | | | | I am sure you didn't wake up this morning thinking you'd be making a donation to my campaign, but I really appreciate you doing it. It means a lot. Elissa Slotkin ** PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN P.O. Box 4145 East Lansing, MI 48826

| In the heart of South Memphis, where I spent my childhood, our neighborhood was a tapestry of life and community spirit. Small businesses flourished—florists, bakeries, drive-in theaters, and local eateries painted a picture of American resilience and ingenuity. Our streets were alive with the laughter of children playing, the smells of freshly baked bread, and the sights of neighbors supporting each other. [Yet, a shadow loomed over this vibrant community. Just a stone's throw from my schools, the Army Defense Depot cast a long and ominous shadow. It was here, in 1995, amidst the innocence of nurturing my newborn son, that my grandmother—our beloved Ma' Dear—was taken from us by cancer, a loss that echoed through our community like a chilling wind.](https://l5vsmw.fg98.fdske.com/ec/gAAAAABmET6bn8misfssuYefHsk8g36oF2E31KXloNGeDT9lVqZMSHp0gs2uqVRMbTbS8pRLAf1-VgxKJop7dgJ3jmH63G8y6fwxh1ukf9EIdVxHdP4J-JKd5UmNBHzJIP5e8sgWdlv3VfbvOZMJRONV0MC589_ghtS2OzrPdN4hi0w4PJ3YXY2p1TiSRgoSSWRfWvM0oNjWTEvS_ImDk9c_bkpv6ph9Q-ikZbSLrEI6W_gWR5Eyzfqu42Af4I0mZfQPMJrk7V5H-oL_Rb4ZcT2-VXprSYmimcg7A2j-hledk7ksCRzmdD6--LaiFNkLsKcYnfkabG4mt8EKD1oNRXi76fzE-QLk7Fi7yLSoE6YTk45JMZyfADzyM7ylYX4U4aF9cuSyK0wy1JgmSwcusB1F8f-dCi-XGnIsMtkJB9vTypQE95Sb-NpcJ8gugEnxBq78kTTZXMg7wSwlJDY3XX-2Gp5scoxgNsAEIJ-1pZxePNRT9x7Odm54_HQrpa0bclwXgYDUTxY7) Our pain was not isolated. Many of our neighbors faced similar tragedies, battling a silent enemy. The Depot, a behemoth of war's leftovers, had poisoned our air, our water, and our very lives with chemicals linked to a harrowing array of ailments. This blight on our community claimed too many, too soon. It was in these moments of grief and outrage that my journey towards advocacy and change began. Inspired by my mother's relentless spirit, who rallied thousands to demand justice, I found my calling in the realm of environmental policy. We stood united against the invisible threats that besieged our community, yet, our current leaders have turned a blind eye, allowing Tennessee to become a dumping ground for dangers unseen. [The time for change is now. We stand on the precipice of opportunity—an opportunity to redefine our legacy, to invest in jobs that sustain our planet and our people, and to champion the cause of the environment with the ferocity it demands. I am stepping into this battle to be a beacon of hope and transformation for Tennessee, but this journey is not mine alone.](https://l5vsmw.fg98.fdske.com/ec/gAAAAABmET6bDZEP9iYVSschKLUghjIuUM8KFdbrmletVZtWSjhkaRO6B7ZGDCT5adYErSESMy52zWeus3rVcshn_cqi8Fo_f50cPrunn7wM23Ra9lKGp9k9PDB1RCPGA8Uc_99jQsw-gz8jd788eNAaYObIRASvFba-6E5tJM9LvA1SNc2gEuk_Fw5X90Le2FyztKMFFFxYZKGQpdK5dNidHMnZwUMu6V84M6_FUqHAnrbS8i4WoseyGuD-l9T2ieHyPZwMg4T_VENzRn3pmSjzfESyfmyA6lP0jVdLt6jguZAxFzoe6jYtMfaHKfs5K5bDBHKL051nwcwIRa7xuHPgigGhXrl-WvJtfPLWh-9mPyMfZBZ293-Nm7VmhgDGSG8MiJP_XVk0) Our campaign is a collective endeavor, fueled by the passion and commitment of people like you. We are at a crucial juncture, and I am reaching out for your support. We need to raise $8,560 before the week ends tonight. This is more than a donation; it's a declaration of our shared vision for a brighter, healthier future. Your contribution, whether $27, $50, $100, or any amount, propels us forward, strengthening our grassroots movement with every dollar. Together, we can turn the tide. Your support is not just a gift; it's a testament to our collective resolve to fight for what is right. Join me in this noble cause. Together, we will not just dream of a better future; we will build it. Thank you for standing with me, for believing in our mission, and for acting with courage and compassion. body:
I can’t explain how grateful I am that you chose to read this email. Only about 30-40% of folks open these messages, and look I get it – there are a lot of political emails being sent these days.

| |
---
| | | Friend,

I can't explain how grateful I am that you chose to read this email. Only about 30-40% of folks open these messages, and look I get it - there are a lot of political emails being sent these days.

Unfortunately, I rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to stay in touch with conservatives like you.

**With that being said, could you do me the simple favor of just reading this all the way through to the end?** If you get to the end and still don't think you have the power to make a difference, then I just want to thank you for your time.

While roughly 35% of supporters open these messages, only an average of 1% of supporters will step up to donate, which makes it difficult since I rely on Americans like you receiving this message to hit my fundraising goals.

I refuse to rely on billionaires and Wall Street executives for money. I want our conservative values fueled by the people who believe in them most - you and me.

**And you know what?** If everyone who opened this email gave just $1 - __one single dollar__ - we'd be able to hit all of our goals.

Growing up, my mom worked at a factory that made aluminum chairs and my father was a bartender. Their wages combined with their hard work allowed for them to buy a home and live in a good community.

**I 'm trying to restore America to the time when it wasn't unusual that a factory worker and a bartender could afford a home. I'd appreciate it if you could go above and beyond and donate the price of a roll of aluminum foil! [Democrats rely on billionaire megadonors who give thousands at a time. clean_body: I can’t explain how grateful I am that you chose to read this email. Only about 30-40% of folks open these messages, and look I get it – there are a lot of political emails being sent these days. | | | | | Friend, I can't explain how grateful I am that you chose to read this email. Only about 30-40% of folks open these messages, and look I get it - there are a lot of political emails being sent these days. Unfortunately, I rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to stay in touch with conservatives like you. With that being said, could you do me the simple favor of just reading this all the way through to the end? If you get to the end and still don't think you have the power to make a difference, then I just want to thank you for your time. While roughly 35% of supporters open these messages, only an average of 1% of supporters will step up to donate, which makes it difficult since I rely on Americans like you receiving this message to hit my fundraising goals. I refuse to rely on billionaires and Wall Street executives for money. I want our conservative values fueled by the people who believe in them most - you and me. And you know what? If everyone who opened this email gave just $1 - one single dollar - we'd be able to hit all of our goals. | | "DONATE $1 >>" | | "DONATE WHATEVER YOU CAN >>" Growing up, my mom worked at a factory that made aluminum chairs and my father was a bartender. Their wages combined with their hard work allowed for them to buy a home and live in a good community. I 'm trying to restore America to the time when it wasn't unusual that a factory worker and a bartender could afford a home. I'd appreciate it if you could go above and beyond and donate the price of a roll of aluminum foil! "Democrats rely on billionaire megadonors who give thousands at a time. I rely on folks like you, who can give $3, $9, or even $18.25 to reach my goals." | | "CHIP IN THE PRICE OF ALUMINUM FOIL >>" Democrats hope I give up on you and stop sending these emails. They also hope you stop reading these emails. They'd love it if we both give up on our conservative values altogether. I won 't give up on you, and I hope you won't quit on me or our shared values either. I know a lot of folks are going to ignore this, but I need patriots like you to see what's at stake. If you think you're better off than you were 5 years ago, then I understand why you don't want to donate today. name: Senator John N. Kennedy
subject: About as useful as a screen door on a submarine…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I just need a second to explain where I'm coming from

| |

---
| | | Folks - this is John Kennedy.

**It kills me to say this but some of these emails are about as useful as a screen door on a submarine.**

Maybe it's a few Big Tech overlords sending our emails to spam...

Maybe it's the crazies calling good folks like you traitors for ignoring them...

Maybe it's that most of you are a little tired of politics...

And on the last point, that's OK. I completely understand. But I want to explain where I'm coming from: You see, my Conservative friends over in the House have a HUGE deadline closing in, and I just got word they're pacing DANGEROUSLY behind their goal.

_We 'd have a real mess on our hands if they come up short._

I've never been one to dance around an issue when I speak with you. _**[So with all due respect, I'm humbly asking you to pitch in just a few bucks before March is over and done with.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fd223a6b7ba2421596ae803da212f1fe&_e=dE8A6b7JUTOuqLgoahPDffKM_lMNMN72w_RYhrJcw0FyUQuy_qp3jijNEYi52O3_YjONEL45RVxHcOVAp9DE68JdqxTQ4Wh-sAmwitYMeQdHk0HnvnJhWPmLdqdmAmqpWCTdwUDi1dBNCrmZeqyFg2IAKGayXNq1vOFNson1E5Ln0uEBVxoKgAP1mpaTjXSDB0HReodYNNwd5jyXQeYs9Bp6p_LGmEI6THpycddzXjT5Nk5nJBNwMdeWwaF6MFDcR4cQD21MeJANnJmd45r_vtnuZN_NlkxqFdUF2FIznipXGsDwH6D-_1r0CV2dtkHE1u1DgceulBks0VfkpKAMYJ5Zp52GtQRzNcIw4fHG4I0NvMTp-wMiNyQ_YjUdt9hh0dKSQ9ED7VOpGWNYkbySMAyBUzLjVHBw3kzZCrd-ZVPAfGbHiC8wqgNiXsZs94t3dh01FpCxAKJcV-YRilDuxw%3D%3D "So with all due respect, I’m humbly asking you to pitch in just a few bucks before March is over and done with.")**_

Look, the deadline was important before but now I'm hearing Joe Biden just raised 40 million bucks last month and compared to Republicans, the DNC has THREE TIMES the cash-on-hand!

I'm afraid this will be enough to put Liberals over the top... That's why I really need your help right now.

clean_body: I just need a second to explain where I'm coming from | | | | | Folks - this is John Kennedy. It kills me to say this but some of these emails are about as useful as a screen door on a submarine. Maybe it's a few Big Tech overlords sending our emails to spam... Maybe it's the crazies calling good folks like you traitors for ignoring them... Maybe it's that most of you are a little tired of politics... And on the last point, that's OK. I completely understand. But I want to explain where I'm coming from: You see, my Conservative friends over in the House have a HUGE deadline closing in, and I just got word they're pacing DANGEROUSLY behind their goal. We 'd have a real mess on our hands if they come up short. I've never been one to dance around an issue when I speak with you. "So with all due respect, I’m humbly asking you to pitch in just a few bucks before March is over and done with." Look, the deadline was important before but now I'm hearing Joe Biden just raised 40 million bucks last month and compared to Republicans, the DNC has THREE TIMES the cash-on-hand! I'm afraid this will be enough to put Liberals over the top... That's why I really need your help right now. | | | "SEND IN TEN BUCKS HERE" | | | "SEND IN THIRTY BUCKS HERE \(MOST FOLKS GIVE THIS MUCH\") | | | "SEND IN FIFTY BUCKS NOW" | | | "SEND IN FIFTY BUCKS NOW" James Comer reached out ... Mike Johnson reached out... Byron Donalds reached out... Kellyanne Conway reached out... Sean Spicer reached out... Steve Scalise reached out... Sorry for following up AGAIN but we just don't have time to stand around - not if we want to win! "I’m humbly asking you for a few bucks before the end of the day to help save our Conservative friends and defeat Liberals up and down the ballot." God bless you, John N. Kennedy | "John N. Kennedy" | | | "Please take my Election Year Check-In!" It's House Majority Leader Steve Scalise. I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my "ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN"** at your earliest convenience. name: Carrier for Congress
subject: PRESS: JAMISON CARRIER SUPPORTS INDY FOP CALLS FOR JUDGE STONER'S RESIGNATION AND FOR OVERHAUL OF MARION COUNTY'S JUSTICE SYSTEM
body:
| | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: April 6, 2024
---
| Contact: Mark Warner mark@ascent-strategic.com; 317-417-7556
---
| JAMISON CARRIER SUPPORTS INDY FOP CALLS FOR JUDGE STONER'S RESIGNATION AND FOR OVERHAUL OF MARION COUNTY'S JUSTICE SYSTEM
---
| Greenwood, IN \- Today, Jamison Carrier, a businessman from Greenwood, announced his support for President Rick Snyder and the Indy FOP's calls for Judge Stoner's resignation and for a complete overhaul of Marion County's justice system. [This week, Judge Stoner announced the sentencing for Elliahs Dorsey, which started as a death penalty case but was reduced to time served, which was a little less than four years for the reckless homicide of IMPD Ofc. Breann Leath.](https://fwpz5zgbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PW1iAAx2ZktKvbFo0IbJ3bB8zzlbSXkhRs-Y8FstsCvL1B0pP0j-Z81n3GTW2frrK1rOq1iGODvAArjQQlDEM4d4ouGlzGh_9Xx_30oE8EpgtbVt60sSuFc6-ZN32lwlyc0hm1D19AkxE5twRvVO6Jn_ymBhvakJXfUfxQwz9wL1D_VGXwrbhaG6b42EWlrLSKrOTgtYYMOBRlRLGdGcDAkzTshwKYr6ie0JpT442FVzy0iCo-b-eqAdyQi3cqDTlve7ofCKPy-cyI8ILxkVRYhM_TZq0M1HkXH8nvUYmjRsk-99K_qDl_0zXjhNHU7Y3szqq7A6WeGNQIbWOKuLWKy1UjyXWPy0brs5A4ZyCDcMktSeMJslcw==&c=0RzVP3Y5E3432ZT9xfGaMRt12blW0bfhB0rBAxWxSTZhcTEtCFyxdQ==&ch=uIXKEvNcfLC2Qf1bzBsC_HyuWA7JYRCvkqpwqALzPxl-QXAsOMHtRA==)
Jamison Carrier Statement:
"I stand with our police officers, and fully support Rick Snyder and the Indy FOP's call for the Judge Stoner's resignation and for a complete overhaul of Marion County's justice system. This decision is an injustice to Officer Leath's family, police officers across the country, and creates a revolving door of unaccountability. We must hold criminals accountable for their actions if we want to keep our communities safe. In Congress, I will always have the backs of those who protect us."
---
| ###
---
| [www.CarrierforCongress.com](https://fwpz5zgbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PW1iAAx2ZktKvbFo0IbJ3bB8zzlbSXkhRs-Y8FstsCvL1B0pP0j-ZzPUxz2dvV_D8zk4lcbtYUGYf2bG96p53YDsZkvO3hWvbVx-HSpJb6XcNJt5SDofsva7yKt6q4HJBn4OBpZswl7qlG2dF6cIN3hWtBcPLujc7HSv5ZEBLtM=&c=0RzVP3Y5E3432ZT9xfGaMRt12blW0bfhB0rBAxWxSTZhcTEtCFyxdQ==&ch=uIXKEvNcfLC2Qf1bzBsC_HyuWA7JYRCvkqpwqALzPxl-QXAsOMHtRA==)

This decision is an injustice to Officer Leath's family, police officers across the country, and creates a revolving door of unaccountability. We must hold criminals accountable for their actions if we want to keep our communities safe. **Donald Trump is down in Florida today raising money from a bunch of hedge fund billionaires who want him to cut Social Security and Medicare and give them tax cuts. So, I figured there was no better day to send you an email about exactly who is funding our campaign than today.** Over 1.6 million grassroots donors have contributed to my campaign so far. And, in the last quarter alone, grassroots supporters helped this campaign raise over $187 million. That’s incredible, Peter. **I’ve always said this campaign is Scranton versus Palm Beach, but these numbers really show that.** Our campaign is a grassroots movement made up of nurses and teachers. Meanwhile, Donald Trump is collecting checks from a couple of billionaires who are looking for a tax cut. Real people like you who know the stakes of this election are rolling your sleeves up to pitch in what you can. And, whether you give $1 or $100 to our campaign, you’re making a real difference. **And that is exactly why I need you to get involved today. If you’ve been waiting on the sidelines for the right moment to contribute to this campaign, now is the time.[Lots and lots of grassroots donors are already chipping in to our campaign. And they are counting on you to do the same so we can defeat Donald Trump and his billionaire backers come Election Day. Simply put: Our campaign is in a strong position heading into the general election because of your support. But we cannot lose our momentum now.
Our campaign is putting up ads on television and online, opening hundreds of field offices across the country in critical states and districts, and Kamala and I are crisscrossing the country -- all in an effort to get our message out. And we have to keep it up to win come November.
**Last quarter, more than 1.1 million donors contributed to my campaign. And 310,000 made their first donation ever in the past three months.**
[I’m counting on this team to help us start this month equally as strong. clean_body: Donald Trump is down in Florida today raising money from a bunch of hedge fund billionaires who want him to cut Social Security and Medicare and give them tax cuts. So, I figured there was no better day to send you an email about exactly who is funding ou | | | Donald Trump is down in Florida today raising money from a bunch of hedge fund billionaires who want him to cut Social Security and Medicare and give them tax cuts. So, I figured there was no better day to send you an email about exactly who is funding our campaign than today. Over 1.6 million grassroots donors have contributed to my campaign so far. And, in the last quarter alone, grassroots supporters helped this campaign raise over $187 million. That’s incredible, Peter. I’ve always said this campaign is Scranton versus Palm Beach, but these numbers really show that. Our campaign is a grassroots movement made up of nurses and teachers. Meanwhile, Donald Trump is collecting checks from a couple of billionaires who are looking for a tax cut. Real people like you who know the stakes of this election are rolling your sleeves up to pitch in what you can. And, whether you give $1 or $100 to our campaign, you’re making a real difference. And that is exactly why I need you to get involved today. If you’ve been waiting on the sidelines for the right moment to contribute to this campaign, now is the time. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Simply put: Our campaign is in a strong position heading into the general election because of your support. But we cannot lose our momentum now. Our campaign is putting up ads on television and online, opening hundreds of field offices across the country in critical states and districts, and Kamala and I are crisscrossing the country -- all in an effort to get our message out. And we have to keep it up to win come November. Last quarter, more than 1.1 million donors contributed to my campaign. And 310,000 made their first donation ever in the past three months. We are working to make the choice this November as clear as day, and it costs money to do it.That’s why we could not be more grateful for your support. Joe Joe Biden President of the United States

Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

name: Cory Booker
subject: My friend Bob Casey
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240406-1?refcode=em20240406-1&recurring=1&refcode2=2593_552475_fFL1HX&akid=2593%2E552475%2EfFL1HX)
Can I tell you about one of the hardest workers in the Senate, Peter? His name is Bob Casey.
Throughout our time working together, I’ve seen firsthand how his deep love for Pennsylvania drives his work. No one cares more for PA than Bob does, and no one is more dedicated to improving the lives of Pennsylvanians than him. He truly is a shining example of what it means to lead with love and integrity, and we can’t afford to lose his voice in the Senate.
But here’s the thing, Peter. Bob is facing his toughest race yet. Mitch McConnell has listed Pennsylvania as one of his top 4 targets, we need to win this seat to defend the Senate majority in 2024.
One of my favorite proverbs goes, _“If you want to go fast, go alone. If you want to go far, go together.”_
We need to bring that same spirit to Bob Casey’s race, because he’s going to need all of us working together to win in Pennsylvania. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter, to ask if you’ll step up for Bob.
**[Can I count on you to chip in $5 or whatever you can to Bob’s re-election campaign? Every dollar makes a difference.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240406-1?refcode=em20240406-1&recurring=1&refcode2=2593_552475_fFL1HX&akid=2593%2E552475%2EfFL1HX)**

In the rapidly evolving world of digital currencies, Bitcoin and Central Bank Digital Dollars (CBDCs) have emerged as two prominent contenders in the race to define the future of money. As we delve into the intricacies of these two forms of currency, it becomes increasingly clear that Bitcoin holds a distinct edge over CBDCs, offering a myriad of benefits that are simply unmatched by its counterpart. We will explore the key advantages that Bitcoin presents, shedding light on why it is the superior choice.
**Decentralization: A Pillar of Financial Freedom**
At the heart of Bitcoin's superiority lies its decentralized nature. Unlike CBDCs, which are issued and controlled by central banks, Bitcoin operates on a peer-to-peer network, free from the shackles of a single authority. This decentralization ensures that no single entity can manipulate the currency, preserving the financial freedom of its users. Furthermore, it eliminates the risk of a single point of failure, making the system more resilient and less susceptible to censorship or control by governments or other powerful institutions.
**Security and Transparency: The Twin Pillars of Trust**
Bitcoin's underlying technology, the blockchain, offers unparalleled security and transparency. Transactions on the Bitcoin network are recorded on a public ledger, accessible to anyone, making it virtually impossible for fraudulent activities to go unnoticed. This level of transparency fosters trust among users and eliminates the need for intermediaries, reducing the risk of fraud and corruption. In contrast, CBDCs may not provide the same level of transparency, as they are subject to the discretion of central banks and may be susceptible to manipulation.
**Global Accessibility: Bridging the Financial Divide**
Bitcoin's borderless nature enables it to transcend geographical boundaries, making it an ideal currency for international transactions. By eliminating the need for currency conversions and reducing transaction fees, Bitcoin facilitates seamless cross-border transfers, fostering global financial inclusion. CBDCs, on the other hand, are limited to the jurisdiction of the issuing central bank, potentially hindering their ability to facilitate international transactions and bridge the financial divide.
**Limited Supply: A Hedge Against Inflation**
Bitcoin's fixed supply of 21 million coins ensures that it is immune to the perils of inflation. Unlike fiat currencies, which can be printed at the discretion of central banks, Bitcoin's scarcity provides a hedge against the devaluation of money, making it an attractive store of value. In contrast, CBDCs may be subject to the monetary policies of the issuing central bank, potentially exposing them to inflationary risks.
**Privacy: A Fundamental Right in the Digital Age**
Bitcoin offers a degree of privacy that is unmatched by CBDCs. While transactions on the Bitcoin network are publicly recorded, users can maintain a level of anonymity by using pseudonyms. This privacy is essential for protecting individuals from surveillance and ensuring that their financial activities remain confidential. In contrast, CBDCs may be subject to increased monitoring and surveillance, posing a potential threat to privacy and civil liberties.
**Conclusion**
In conclusion, Bitcoin's decentralized nature, robust security and transparency, global accessibility, limited supply, and privacy features make it the superior choice over CBDCs. As the world continues to embrace the digital revolution, Bitcoin stands as a beacon of financial freedom, offering a secure, transparent, and inclusive alternative to traditional currencies. By embracing Bitcoin, we can pave the way for a more equitable and resilient financial system that empowers individuals and fosters global prosperity.
_**PS - Do not take this as advice, I am a horrible investor. This is my attempt to better understand current topics.**_

clean_body: In the rapidly evolving world of digital currencies, Bitcoin and Central Bank Digital Dollars (CBDCs) have emerged as two prominent contenders in the race to define the future of money. As we delve into the intricacies of these two forms of currency, it becomes increasingly clear that Bitcoin holds a distinct edge over CBDCs, offering a myriad of benefits that are simply unmatched by its counterpart. We will explore the key advantages that Bitcoin presents, shedding light on why it is the superior choice. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? from the desk ofDana Criswell | | | Apr 6 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Photo by on In the rapidly evolving world of digital currencies, Bitcoin and Central Bank Digital Dollars (CBDCs) have emerged as two prominent contenders in the race to define the future of money. As we delve into the intricacies of these two forms of currency, it becomes increasingly clear that Bitcoin holds a distinct edge over CBDCs, offering a myriad of benefits that are simply unmatched by its counterpart. We will explore the key advantages that Bitcoin presents, shedding light on why it is the superior choice. Decentralization: A Pillar of Financial Freedom At the heart of Bitcoin's superiority lies its decentralized nature. Unlike CBDCs, which are issued and controlled by central banks, Bitcoin operates on a peer-to-peer network, free from the shackles of a single authority. This decentralization ensures that no single entity can manipulate the currency, preserving the financial freedom of its users. Furthermore, it eliminates the risk of a single point of failure, making the system more resilient and less susceptible to censorship or control by governments or other powerful institutions. Security and Transparency: The Twin Pillars of Trust Bitcoin's underlying technology, the blockchain, offers unparalleled security and transparency. Transactions on the Bitcoin network are recorded on a public ledger, accessible to anyone, making it virtually impossible for fraudulent activities to go unnoticed. This level of transparency fosters trust among users and eliminates the need for intermediaries, reducing the risk of fraud and corruption. In contrast, CBDCs may not provide the same level of transparency, as they are subject to the discretion of central banks and may be susceptible to manipulation. Global Accessibility: Bridging the Financial Divide Bitcoin's borderless nature enables it to transcend geographical boundaries, making it an ideal currency for international transactions. By eliminating the need for currency conversions and reducing transaction fees, Bitcoin facilitates seamless cross-border transfers, fostering global financial inclusion. CBDCs, on the other hand, are limited to the jurisdiction of the issuing central bank, potentially hindering their ability to facilitate international transactions and bridge the financial divide. Limited Supply: A Hedge Against Inflation Bitcoin's fixed supply of 21 million coins ensures that it is immune to the perils of inflation. Unlike fiat currencies, which can be printed at the discretion of central banks, Bitcoin's scarcity provides a hedge against the devaluation of money, making it an attractive store of value. In contrast, CBDCs may be subject to the monetary policies of the issuing central bank, potentially exposing them to inflationary risks. Privacy: A Fundamental Right in the Digital Age Bitcoin offers a degree of privacy that is unmatched by CBDCs. While transactions on the Bitcoin network are publicly recorded, users can maintain a level of anonymity by using pseudonyms. This privacy is essential for protecting individuals from surveillance and ensuring that their financial activities remain confidential. In contrast, CBDCs may be subject to increased monitoring and surveillance, posing a potential threat to privacy and civil liberties. Conclusion In conclusion, Bitcoin's decentralized nature, robust security and transparency, global accessibility, limited supply, and privacy features make it the superior choice over CBDCs. As the world continues to embrace the digital revolution, Bitcoin stands as a beacon of financial freedom, offering a secure, transparent, and inclusive alternative to traditional currencies. By embracing Bitcoin, we can pave the way for a more equitable and resilient financial system that empowers individuals and fosters global prosperity. PS - Do not take this as advice, I am a horrible investor. This is my attempt to better understand current topics. body:
| | | | | 06/04/24
---
[Support John’s Campaign](https://vote4edgar.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3a666e5996be881f1745f2f&id=4a7b3e8f47&e=add163c1a3)
Good Morning Peter,Happy Assembly Day! I want to personally thank you and all the delegates for your contribution to this important democratic process. As a freshman in high school I’m concerned about my future and what our country will look like when I’m older. Involved citizens like you and your fellow delegates have stepped up to defend my future and make our world a better place. Thank you!
**Today’s Assembly will kick off at 9:30 am, but you can join the Zoom as early as 8:00 am. You MUST be on the Zoom by 9:30, so don’t be late.**
**If you are having technical issues with the Zoom, please reach out to the party directly:[**Chandra.Wilkins@epcodemparty.org**](mailto:chandra.wilkins@epcodemparty.org?subject=Assembly%20Tech%20Issue&body=)[**Lisa.Wilkes@epcodemparty.org**](mailto:lisa.wilkes@epcodemparty.org?subject=Assembly%20Tech%20Issues&body=)
Finally, I want to say good luck to my Uncle John. I’m really proud of you and what you are doing.
**Heidi**

If you are having technical issues with the Zoom, please reach out to the party directly:mailto:chandra.wilkins@epcodemparty.org?subject=Assembly%20Tech%20Issue&body=mailto:lisa.wilkes@epcodemparty.org?subject=Assembly%20Tech%20Issues&body= Finally, I want to say good luck to my Uncle John. I’m really proud of you and what you are doing. Heidi | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | Spread the Word | | | | | | | | | | | Meet the Newsletter Director! | | | | | | | | | | Heidi is a freshman dance major at the Kinder High School for the Performing and Visual Arts. She is excited to be working on her Uncle John’s campaign, writing the newsletters, and doing other odd tasks! Heidi believes we need to elect officials who will set the tone for other leaders and improve issues that will affect the next generation. Let’s work together to choose common sense over chaos! | | | John Edgar for Colorado 1764 Creek Edge View Colorado Springs, CO 80905 USA or |

We’ve defied the odds before in Nevada, and we can do it again
| | | Friend, with _FiveThirtyEight_ predicting that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, all eyes are on us to defend this must-win battleground seat.

subject: Need your signature!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
| | | [](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=f62850af8f1d43fe8d02714511da3443&_e=ZfhkxNQ1QCz9uPyPo1mei3RTdoruGDCf6BVMUn7-34zpR7uHyOEkAgwijghSs01uSwznmLNWLkTnDjmQIjqJI5fodUSVEDadZCehSWSXB65OCqkqL9SHRRdJqFvNDzqCchFJweF6iBiR4PxHAMaGUIudcsPKz5IV2fjn1PoCgVJI6aEdPIhV-5CuhDwM0tkRd3QIVfv8zRz1pG3afCGt4DYpq9oIc15ZHyfB1bDLIQNvwb8ad0-YbLt-oeFsy5qcvHOGcqooR91byIi0PNjIBYCrWCjG0Aq7GO6nix5M-4kes4LN-0FtcfiEgxCm7XsWNOzNc3TQdcr0DT8AfeOzAbQ9JRiNUwSN7Wr7lqwwsG_M5DjFZJGGPq3X8RtHv9ZB)
---
| | Peter,
---
It’s CAPT Hung Cao, and I’m running for U.S. Senate in Virginia to defeat career politician Tim Kaine. I hate to interrupt your Sunday, but I’ve got to be honest with you: **[**I need your endorsement.**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=f62850af8f1d43fe8d02714511da3443&_e=ZfhkxNQ1QCz9uPyPo1mei3RTdoruGDCf6BVMUn7-34zpR7uHyOEkAgwijghSs01uSwznmLNWLkTnDjmQIjqJI5fodUSVEDadZCehSWSXB65OCqkqL9SHRRdJqFvNDzqCchFJweF6iBiR4PxHAMaGUIudcsPKz5IV2fjn1PoCgVJI6aEdPIhV-5CuhDwM0tkRd3QIVfv8zRz1pG3afCGt4NY_zf2XerthIv_xFq0yrwq1z6uh22hqZKq86tCKrM7TPnTgqqfXJBWXionFyeqOLexQINwbsXNtxANFPCXFvdOYeoUfq4aov7hWEsgKyIE3T3iXkn6OmlIjx24QJztrufDw3Me0vq5HJIzmdlQEN7gt4XWgsuU_5fGsB3BPmTS6)**

I’m a father of five, a devoted husband, a 25-year Navy veteran, and an unapologetic conservative. After I returned home from my last deployment, I saw the state Joe Biden had left our country in, and I wasn’t going to sit by idly and let him destroy America.

I didn’t want to get involved in politics, Peter. But I love America too much to watch career politicians throw our liberties away in the trash.

I’m running against one of the most entrenched heavy-hitters in Washington DC, and Tim Kaine will do **anything** to hold onto power. This race is going to be close, and I need all the grassroots support I can get.

**[**Can I count on your endorsement to take back the Senate this November?**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=f62850af8f1d43fe8d02714511da3443&_e=ZfhkxNQ1QCz9uPyPo1mei3RTdoruGDCf6BVMUn7-34zpR7uHyOEkAgwijghSs01uSwznmLNWLkTnDjmQIjqJI5fodUSVEDadZCehSWSXB65OCqkqL9SHRRdJqFvNDzqCchFJweF6iBiR4PxHAMaGUIudcsPKz5IV2fjn1PoCgVJI6aEdPIhV-5CuhDwM0tkRd3QIVfv8zRz1pG3afCGt4AJQMPL3JlfEuIKwdqMBLVX2t0wSIXSDS_t6K7cY66jSioVFEYZfHTzQqTfs5MoRAHymgQNV6ZikBpFoj7SFZ6m51VHI9rSRLitmyUwIAdaXtvwwV41wP2Rw6Ok64ziGbZGZ5azL7SxR1JvxSUvqSCMTvpOcv0f6Gay7frJBphQa)**

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, It’s CAPT Hung Cao, and I’m running for U.S. Senate in Virginia to defeat career politician Tim Kaine. I hate to interrupt your Sunday, but I’ve got to be honest with you: I’m a father of five, a devoted husband, a 25-year Navy veteran, and an unapologetic conservative. After I returned home from my last deployment, I saw the state Joe Biden had left our country in, and I wasn’t going to sit by idly and let him destroy America. I didn’t want to get involved in politics, Peter. But I love America too much to watch career politicians throw our liberties away in the trash. I’m running against one of the most entrenched heavy-hitters in Washington DC, and Tim Kaine will do anything to hold onto power. This race is going to be close, and I need all the grassroots support I can get. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao Please mail checks made out to "Hung Cao for Virginia" to this address: PO Box 652 Purcellville VA 20134 | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [ ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=61ae573d222e4efb9defab8ddd2b7142&_e=te6jycx7tbtLCJu8bE2uRcc-yXdMq-Gkj6qc8GKDvED71DI0WmjFy_JPptIFJsI96rfaGEz5i1mkAO7Ze401_wWRMtNU1z9xjJ8INBHBu9USo0oanJGbUy1A7Onhg3OvnDD-Rv2Sd5WL2SVYcrWV2GDWAcBhMwdOxHsm3rFIgwqUP-VYN_3oQF4Q53Cof-fm9sciK41GaB4WU9Rul54zIynB_4zlekM2ow0SXIKpELOlhTqN_kRjWh4E_GG_pSdYWFl9-yKTKjjXKMPcQeRBEtSxoLDMl9KOwbtscEtSeulkJsrdr-HprFAmATjsDcYxQk5VSJMgYsoazd-eZg4KARVeKXyiQF4xbs_uYovzNH-9DFh_D185l8MbG5TC3LgJgkfiRv5osP6mdKyKkdYTzznZy_jS-h5kIAVdaQoz-0A%3D) That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=61ae573d222e4efb9defab8ddd2b7142&_e=te6jycx7tbtLCJu8bE2uRcc-yXdMq-Gkj6qc8GKDvED71DI0WmjFy_JPptIFJsI96rfaGEz5i1mkAO7Ze401_wWRMtNU1z9xjJ8INBHBu9USo0oanJGbUy1A7Onhg3OvnDD-Rv2Sd5WL2SVYcrWV2GDWAcBhMwdOxHsm3rFIgwqUP-VYN_3oQF4Q53Cof-fm9sciK41GaB4WU9Rul54zIynB_4zlekM2ow0SXIKpELOlhTqN_kRjWh4E_GG_pSdYB0SH7UWQgnof2KD6WgMC0Ys58JIZHrLOopoNj0GtOZed9ybKI50II76rdSBl5ac3ZN9wik7AU2jPNYfANOlmrIZXQGYA05RXv-2Kudo1i49dISktbC4EH-Ga6F3f2m0vzBh9rn-VNKo1vnOCVUoyUHOTy3ANPE1iing-oFvuySo%3D)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Summer Lee has been a tireless advocate for our community — and we refuse to let extremists distort her record of fighting for the people of PA-12. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from The Collective PAC, please .

GOP Nominee for Senate, Ohio

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7aaa9b00650e4a36834ee16f5f191253&_e=qaM9JsEmyJRzv7Mmb_ecpTeAtB2A0crnRJVtO6b6lX2AKC9uqzRkEHZzVmxCLeXKRoEPxXRG7hkUEyqjO7NYRlGfa1Fob9pOrg35RZtc7-eHSx_OBNlJsvDXc9V-xY4Sd9aPzADj4ROrFulzbjnuXPmqaH53qQrvhSwXYdXnSbpQoo4AVK3t2bl95r3kQOefpy5Qit5jNYhlQbBlt18ocvUSLlCnzbbtN9ISst_IywTlObb-pX_NAW-vfkrHaGyE4bykCtEZH-DpQJoRGCxZSBC5K68D2TXBsed1PBQdD_vYRvkIPNZ50TdHTDot2Yw39tafJRkBpVZ14YvAUCFScVknHPXjgTnNG78eAsPcdq05URgZk3Uas_eCMusi8hfec-PFUvvrNXHM7sZq9O9jttjD2XN7SA9mgad6QMxf6k8%3D) Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

clean_body: It’s extremely clear that we can’t let up or lose a single day in this fight, not when Brown and the Left are putting up these kinds of numbers. | | Peter, My Democrat opponent, Sherrod Brown, had a MASSIVE fundraising haul last quarter – he’s announced $12 million! Even though we also had a very strong quarter – spurred by winning the primary election last month – we’re behind the Democrats in this race, there's no denying it. It’s extremely clear that we can’t let up or lose a single day in this fight, not when Brown and the Left are putting up these kinds of numbers. We must keep donations flowing non-stop into our campaign to stay in this fight and maintain our path to victory. This means we need any support you can send. The Senate majority and the ability to reverse the disastrous Biden agenda hinges on this race in Ohio – we can’t rest on our laurels. Thank you, Bernie Moreno GOP Nominee for Senate, Ohio Meet Bernie Moreno: | Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18. Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America. In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board. After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation. Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First. Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has. body:
Your support truly means so much to me.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82496661/465472784/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1053-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjkxNDk1NTktMWZmNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VfSUPSL5T5vJW6bdbRGHvTPuawrjPKElVi7qnC5PvoA=)
Hi, friend, thank you for being a part of this grassroots team to flip Florida blue. Your support truly means so much to me.
**I want to take a moment to tell you a bit about my record and why I'm in this race.[(Recent polling has me 4 points above Rick Scott, so if you're already all in to flip Florida blue, you can make a gift here.)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82496662/465472785/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1053-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjkxNDk1NTktMWZmNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VfSUPSL5T5vJW6bdbRGHvTPuawrjPKElVi7qnC5PvoA=)**
My mother brought my sisters and me to America when I was 14 to give us a chance at a better life. It took long hours, hard work, and a whole lot of hope, but we were able to win our American Dream. **That's why I made the decision to spend my career giving back to this incredible country and the state that gave me so much.**
I worked at several nonprofit organizations across Florida, helping to protect our wildlife and preserve our coral reefs. During my time working at Florida International University, I helped lead a new **program to** **improve access to affordable health care** for more Floridians.
In 2018, I decided to take these fights to Washington. I ran for Congress in a tough battleground district — and I won. In the House, **I wrote the bill to expand seniors’ Medicare Advantage coverage,** to ensure that more Americans could get the vital care they deserve. I also worked with Republicans to provide **economic relief to families and small businesses** and secured $200 million for **Everglades restoration. **
Throughout my time in Congress, **I fought tirelessly for commonsense gun safety reforms** , serving as the vice chair of the Gun Violence Prevention Task Force. This issue is deeply personal to me: When I was 24, my father died from gun violence. After leaving Congress, I joined Gabby Giffords' advocacy group as a senior advisor and continued to fight for safer communities and an end to the gun lobby's grip on Washington.
I'm incredibly proud of the work that I've done to uplift and protect my community. I'll never hide from my record. But I don't think that my opponent can say the same. **Rick Scott has spent his time in power writing the plan to cut Social Security and Medicare, attempting to undermine our elections, attacking our rights, and making it harder for working families to get ahead**. It's no wonder his approval ratings are tanking.
**My opponent is ranked as one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot this year, but I can only defeat him with strong, early grassroots support.[So please, if you have anything extra to spare, will you make a donation to help me hit my critical $300,000 weekly fundraising goal so we can defeat Rick Scott and win a better future for Florida? I'm counting on you to have my back right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82496663/465472786/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1053-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjkxNDk1NTktMWZmNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VfSUPSL5T5vJW6bdbRGHvTPuawrjPKElVi7qnC5PvoA=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82496664/465472787/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk1053-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjkxNDk1NTktMWZmNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VfSUPSL5T5vJW6bdbRGHvTPuawrjPKElVi7qnC5PvoA=)

body:
Early money goes the furthest.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82496635/465472729/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJmMTQ5NTU5LTFmZjQtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kxGBSiximIkaVV0KNHwdGy6XbvHSkXj_YsE5alMUkJA=&emci=afadd0e0-7bf3-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=2f149559-1ff4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=8431045)
---

There’s an age-old saying for political insiders. **Early money goes the furthest. ** The earlier progressive campaigns and organizations like ours have financial resources, the more equipped we are to win. Generally, if someone makes a donation in April instead of October, that contribution has an outsized impact. That contribution can help reach more voters, recruit more volunteers, and make it easier to plan investments in outreach and organizing for the rest of the campaign. This election year will be no different. In addition to the most consequential presidential election in our lifetimes, there are literally hundreds — if not thousands — of other important races happening across the country that could impact our democracy for generations to come. **The NDRC is working day and night to fight for fair maps and preserve our democracy, but we need your help.[Can we count on you to make an early investment in our efforts today by making a donation of just $30?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82496636/465472730/-803236760?refcode=don_ndrc_trddnrs_email_aprfun_email_20240406-NDRC-Red-Insiders_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20240406-NDRC-Red-Insiders_&utm_campaign=aprfun&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJmMTQ5NTU5LTFmZjQtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kxGBSiximIkaVV0KNHwdGy6XbvHSkXj_YsE5alMUkJA=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Early money goes the furthest. | There’s an age-old saying for political insiders. Early money goes the furthest. The earlier progressive campaigns and organizations like ours have financial resources, the more equipped we are to win. Generally, if someone makes a donation in April instead of October, that contribution has an outsized impact. That contribution can help reach more voters, recruit more volunteers, and make it easier to plan investments in outreach and organizing for the rest of the campaign. This election year will be no different. In addition to the most consequential presidential election in our lifetimes, there are literally hundreds — if not thousands — of other important races happening across the country that could impact our democracy for generations to come. The NDRC is working day and night to fight for fair maps and preserve our democracy, but we need your help.= | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Honestly, November will be here before we know it. And Donald Trump has tens of millions of dollars in his campaign warchest already — not to mention all his MAGA allies running in races across the country right now. The NDRC needs to be prepared to counter their attacks on our democracy — and early donations right now can be difference-makers this November. name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Response requested from Mark Kelly
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Support for Ukraine is widespread and bipartisan — but that aid is still stuck in the House.
#

Friends —
Mark’s been to Ukraine twice over the last two years. He’s advocated for a response that meets the moment and the great need of the Ukrainian people.
And he’s done it because the alternative is too dangerous to consider: An emboldened Putin threatening to invade another country and put the peace of the entire world at risk.
Support for Ukraine is widespread and bipartisan — but that aid is still stuck in the House.
So today, he’s coming to you.
[**Can you add your name and show that the American people still support Ukraine and their fight to defend themselves from Putin’s aggression?**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mk_ukraine_april24_em/?source=em240406-1-60&akid=5740%2E6688874%2E6oOaWa)

Team Kelly

name: Gloria Johnson (via Defeat Republicans)
subject: I had an abortion, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
|
---
Peter, as a young woman, I had an abortion.

It’s not a secret. It’s not shameful. And I share it because I want the millions of other women who’ve made the decision to seek abortion care to know that they’re not alone.

When I was 21, I found out I was pregnant. I was married and wanted to start a family, but a devastating medical diagnosis changed all my plans.

My doctors told me I had an aortic aneurysm at risk of rupture. To treat it, I first needed to have an abortion. **That abortion saved my life.**

My right to make the decision that was best for me, my health, and my future was protected by _Roe v. Wade._ Women in Tennessee and other GOP-controlled states are now denied _any_ choice in their reproductive futures. It’s abhorrent.

Let me be clear, the right to make our own reproductive health care decisions is fundamental. Women _cannot_ be equal if we don’t have control over our own bodies.

**I’m running for U.S. Senate from Tennesssee because we need more champions for abortion rights in Washington.** And when I get there, I won’t hesitate to use every power available to demand a restoration of our reproductive freedoms at the federal level. We have to secure our rights and prevent radicals like Marsha Blackburn from enacting a national ban.

[_I’m asking you to split a small grassroots donation between Defeat Republicans and my campaign to help me fight for reproductive rights as Tennessee’s next Senator. Can I count on your support?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82497866/465475788/1508853620?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240404_2_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUwMWU1NWJjLTIwZjQtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DVbbb7_do8TYypi86-UMiHfHBdsvpPYFBrIX1JFB3O0=)

subject: breaking news from the Florida Supreme Court

body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2024_abs_em_dmp.yWg4Pk&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240406_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1003&akid=6154%2E5257348%2ERB5kD3 ]Debbie Murcarsel-Powell

Derek, the
Florida Supreme Court just issued a ruling to uphold our state's 15-week
abortion ban. That means that in just under 30 days, Ron DeSantis' 6-week
ban will take effect — with almost zero exceptions for rape or incest.

This ruling is not the end of our fight for reproductive rights. We can
still defend our pro-choice Senate majority and codify reproductive
freedom nationwide. Or things could go very differently: We could lose our
Senate majority and Rick Scott could win enough votes to pass his
nationwide ban on abortions, ending reproductive freedom across the
country.

I'm fighting every day to defeat Rick Scott and save our Senate majority.
But I need your help to win: Please, will you rush
$10 —
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2024_abs_em_dmp.yWg4Pk&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240406_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1004&akid=6154%2E5257348%2ERB5kD3 ]split between my campaign and Adam Schiff — to help me flip Florida
blue? The stakes are higher than ever now, so I've launched an emergency
$100,000 goal and I'm counting on your support to hit it.

donation between Adam Schiff and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell will go through

Rick Scott is one of the most dangerous Senators in Washington. He
co-sponsored a nationwide ban on abortions, and he proudly said that, were
he governor of Florida, he would've signed that extreme 6-week ban.

Ya no más — enough is enough. I will always fight for our right to choose
and defend our reproductive freedom. And polling shows that the majority
of Florida voters are with me. Rick Scott has been living in a far-right
extremism bubble — everyday families simply do not support his extreme,
cruel, anti-choice agenda. That's why he's panicking and lying to voters
about his horrible record.

Reproductive rights are a winning issue — we've seen it in almost every
election since Roe v. Wade was overturned. That's why I'm working every
single day to make sure that voters know the truth about Rick Scott and
his extremist ideology.

But Rick Scott is a mega-millionaire who can spend practically anything to
bankroll his attack ads and lie about our records. [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2024_abs_em_dmp.yWg4Pk&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240406_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1011&akid=6154%2E5257348%2ERB5kD3 ]I need your

| | Friend, Are you as furious as we are about Biden's electric vehicle (EV) catastrophe? It's more than a policy misstep; it's a full-blown circus, threatening our economy and the very fabric of our American way of life.
The evidence is roaring in like a V8 engine at full throttle: Apple axing its EV project and [cutting jobs](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=73b15eafc6ac45c3928811ea1bbb3984&_e=FueUIap83wQb133koxN0gwc5yfY9RQrho9tkP_gbF8XpLDZaBe8JxtTHVeHDHDfG_x64sShhzfbTxmlMqpHM3XMwXSs6hAOcWJ1xjc5t89r29O_tEpbKJkAEU8_3VSsC09nZwUyP6YidjnHTlx6HSKswnekk_XjxE-3AbgDwLqjV8bygcaRYuUE-G-kXS8sK-uI_ZtffHYQ0C_muWpfYEGRpt8MmN4xIq7l-sFmDshH1Uv4oUvXdbnKrSMBPuPRzHM8ep7_kEF9DQaCt-AKXrBKj4rqdRIkLkNh1tsy74yZT3Vxo4ZuSSvEVL9B-D9KY), Consumer Reports blasting EVs for being [less reliable](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=73b15eafc6ac45c3928811ea1bbb3984&_e=FueUIap83wQb133koxN0g1QEkEW518aB3C9YmaPFdbxnk8AnKlsK1fWHYRmCNGpXyv-j50-Sul1vk9vBhIp54W6-D1TNuW5Y9CIkJAL_DG4TbufS0sR8Qk2rPPjjN4XgRRm5gC7F6wGI9McOH3Mn99c5KRlRzbgt_VHVsY1ku9JFryZxVW9bI9_4xCVEWalmX7Yl5p3qcm2nWyg-lT_HLCEa8FNE3L58pLSqb2j7pCKSmwPc9OV0s6765JWJtCUs6_OPxJR1TVy4hWbF-EFOrA%3D%3D) than gas-powered cars, and the whole country being railroaded into a future [we aren’t ready for](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=73b15eafc6ac45c3928811ea1bbb3984&_e=FueUIap83wQb133koxN0gwc5yfY9RQrho9tkP_gbF8UvgL3Svs8lj_79kwoIHhvbQPZvi8Mzf7w6l1vxD0zzp6C9bsGBj3JzUx6RfWru7mLdPCl-sDFFAMPq7kqS8hbI6RXK429qgN52hU8Wd6b0QkaWDW8o47ibT4oY2GoW1f6Xq2IpEmfhvXkU-HhLZfXPCrevo81liQU158aHcZuAzpr39B-FyPbgOPCHU9h1DODqMQ_VMBFLYQAF7zUsrhy3). Biden's EV mandates are a [disaster on wheels](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=73b15eafc6ac45c3928811ea1bbb3984&_e=FueUIap83wQb133koxN0g0a32d1If0jUxHl2YEqVEaB--g-EmFY7FPbXApaGQyZA61GHKPkzBlDySDv9fhhcbxd5PkJEESU8JMT1ELtLZBYTn2XYPYU4j7BhntRv695A6LRbWp8VIUXcYcHha585DzXCujuqVKHwdc0XaIXiaKJTiNqet2VzPQ8uAM4xc7lJ5PDWuax313j9jnSswjYr9Ezm8qjRbGOpShCVCtRrNFYa2eH7LHyiEOFJ69unloa1Kr0r5mH8LJrhwnUpcc7uZi6Mrzjq7cY_IuOSVi5bX8FaFTOvy5zm5HVAmqwP-FtZvbh7YLZ6RGViCrkBvXadsQ%3D%3D), forcing an unreliable and unproven technology onto the American people while [costs skyrocket](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=73b15eafc6ac45c3928811ea1bbb3984&_e=FueUIap83wQb133koxN0g7UVEqsVmZ_jR9kRZXUnkKuVkea3_hgoIdhCROz0BhrjJJSs2xJkoz7m2RdUW2FOUxFayLIzIxjOyihfyKMMAomeWvjzUuxh4JFQYYzMCR49dTOj5hNaxQht6RIkSyRCBhOxHBrhIGkFM0WhOdwd9pzBg4Cr-s3PUDMsW8w30SLr9vOuvkR6rcectukIbxM3v6hoInTsepY__jmg8m6qv78QkpppdgVubjco2TEBXH5AfhM1UZT0sWwEr2WjvygT7ciq9Eciv_RcMEeqD8pZEhvy-x51B25QoeZPrGkoWr1S). It's a reckless joyride at our expense, and it's time to yank the keys away from an administration drunk on [green fantasies](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=73b15eafc6ac45c3928811ea1bbb3984&_e=FueUIap83wQb133koxN0g7UVEqsVmZ_jR9kRZXUnkKvildr-XNMg7Qy-JKiSBhuFaKoL4RND56chpSST8AdSkmCEEDDWddVuIhDEcpfPo6xDxltZLOlIKt_3uVbs8oj5uR9B3VdzozDUVvw2rEnrh2jTGRZ8it_K22vt50aKrNA9Cfre6360_iar_-rAwx8AHZaStDPqiBiJ_9q2bi9jGoVv0SOgdi1jFfkeS4fNwN-aj2A_tinMyc-STYzqEack9043c51VCZZ7wIDUWQSN_9YtS4KBmgktTw1aDr1oG5-JXGjHOnr8pCyc6XPcxsIeQkU3yTZEsd3FQQTKMD0hSg%3D%3D). We’re rallying a conservative movement to combat this EV insanity, and your support is the turbocharge we need. name: Hill Harper
subject: $4. 4 months.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
That’s all I’m asking.
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/421?t=1&akid=1139%2E62735%2EkDt45x)
Peter,
**Four months from today,** Michiganders will head to the polls in the Senate primary to decide the future of our state, and this much is clear: _the time for change is now._
In a minute, I’ll ask you to **[chip in $4 — just $1 a month — to grow our campaign’s momentum over these next 4 months.](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1138?t=2&akid=1139%2E62735%2EkDt45x) But first, here are 4 things you need to know as we think about Michigan’s future and this election:**
* Michigan **is almost dead last in the nation** for population growth
* We pay **14 times more for a vial of insulin** than our neighbors to the north
* The number of lower-income Michigan families receiving financial assistance from the state fell 94% between 2000 and 2020 — **the fourth-highest social safety net decline in the nation**
* In the last three years, more **small businesses closed their doors for good in Michigan** than in any other state

The status quo isn't working for us, Peter. No matter how you slice it, it’s clear that our leaders in Washington are _not getting the job done._
That's why my campaign rejects the influence of special interests like Big Pharma, corporate PACs, and even establishment politics. I’m pledging to do things differently. No more broken promises, no more smoke and mirrors — Michiganders want _results._ Period.
But here's the truth: I can't do this alone. As a first-time candidate, I'm at a serious disadvantage against opponents backed by the Washington establishment. **That’s why I’m humbly asking for your support today to grow our campaign’s momentum in the home stretch.**
**[With FOUR months to go, will you chip in just $4 — just $1 of support for every month left — to power our grassroots campaign to victory in the August primary?](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1138?t=3&akid=1139%2E62735%2EkDt45x)**
**[CHIP IN $4 NOW »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1138?t=4&akid=1139%2E62735%2EkDt45x)**
Every dollar makes a difference, and with your support, we can out-hustle our opponents, reach more voters, and build the momentum we need to win in August. Your contribution today, Peter, will help us get it done for Michigan.
Thank you for standing with me,
Hill Harper
Democrat for U.S. Senate
[](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1138?t=5&akid=1139%2E62735%2EkDt45x)
* * *
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bax_hh_email?refcode=bax_hh_emailfooter&t=6&refcode2=1139_62735_kDt45x&akid=1139%2E62735%2EkDt45x)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=7&akid=1139%2E62735%2EkDt45x)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.hillharper.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=1139%2E62735%2EkDt45x)

To give by check:
Hill Harper for Michigan
PO Box 13195
Lansing, MI 48901
Email us: [info@hillharper.com](mailto:info@hillharper.com)
PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN

name: Stephen Miller
subject: Maricopa County, AZ Election Lawsuit >>
body:
I have breaking news to share with you...

| | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/fjTRjrNPNdAnybK60vM2Hw~~/AARclAA~/RgRn8_kUP0TXaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9hbWVyaWNhLWZpcnN0LWxlZ2FsLWZvdW5kYXRpb24vbWFyaWNvcGEtY291bnR5LWxhd3N1aXQtcG9wLWE_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1SZXZTaGFyZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249QUZMX01DQVotUG9wQV8yMDI0MDIxMiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV90Yz1VQ04tMjAyNDA0MDYmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9TUNBWi1Qb3BBJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEdXA3NwY0IKZhA6YBFmbL9MqFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
Friend, I have breaking news to share with you... We at America First Legal have just filed an **absolutely momentous** lawsuit in Maricopa County, Arizona against their elections officials for repeatedly and egregiously violating the State of Arizona’s election administration laws. The election interference and systematic election law violations we allege in Arizona are appalling, bone-chilling, and have the most serious consequences for every American. We all know what’s going on. _That’s why we are taking action to expose and punish those responsible!_[_**_DONATE NOW TO SUPPORT OUR EFFORTS_ >>** _](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/fjTRjrNPNdAnybK60vM2Hw~~/AARclAA~/RgRn8_kUP0TXaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9hbWVyaWNhLWZpcnN0LWxlZ2FsLWZvdW5kYXRpb24vbWFyaWNvcGEtY291bnR5LWxhd3N1aXQtcG9wLWE_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1SZXZTaGFyZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249QUZMX01DQVotUG9wQV8yMDI0MDIxMiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV90Yz1VQ04tMjAyNDA0MDYmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9TUNBWi1Qb3BBJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEdXA3NwY0IKZhA6YBFmbL9MqFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**We strongly allege numerous serious violations and criminal activity, including:****#1 -** _Maricopa County refuses to maintain the mandatory chain of custody for ballots.**In 2022, these failures resulted in a discrepancy of over 25,000 votes – larger than the margin of victory in the state governor’s race**_**#2 -** _**Maricopa County ignores mandatory reconciliation procedures to track each ballot printed or issued to a voter.** The law requires tracking and reconciling ballots cast and voters checked in to stop fraud, but the Defendants do not perform any reconciliation procedures at all_**#3 -** _Arizona law requires ballot drop boxes to be staffed by at least two election officials positioned close enough to view each person who deposits ballots into it.**Maintaining an unstaffed drop box is a felony. However, Maricopa County maintains unstaffed, unsupervised ballot drop boxes, facilitating illegal ballot harvesting**_ For many years now, the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors and the County Recorder have consistently failed to lawfully administer elections. We believe these individuals are fully aware of their election law violations.**Make no mistake:** Our lawsuit has been filed to prevent the November 5, 2024, election from being tainted with the same mistakes and maladministration that occurred during the 2020 and 2022 elections and to prevent election interference from occurring._Thank you for your support of our mission and historic legal actions here!_[_**_PLEASE RUSH SUPPORT HERE >>_**_](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/fjTRjrNPNdAnybK60vM2Hw~~/AARclAA~/RgRn8_kUP0TXaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9hbWVyaWNhLWZpcnN0LWxlZ2FsLWZvdW5kYXRpb24vbWFyaWNvcGEtY291bnR5LWxhd3N1aXQtcG9wLWE_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1SZXZTaGFyZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249QUZMX01DQVotUG9wQV8yMDI0MDIxMiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV90Yz1VQ04tMjAyNDA0MDYmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9TUNBWi1Qb3BBJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEdXA3NwY0IKZhA6YBFmbL9MqFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)_** **_ Stephen Miller _President, America First Legal _
|
---
| [**DONATE >>**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/fjTRjrNPNdAnybK60vM2Hw~~/AARclAA~/RgRn8_kUP0TXaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9hbWVyaWNhLWZpcnN0LWxlZ2FsLWZvdW5kYXRpb24vbWFyaWNvcGEtY291bnR5LWxhd3N1aXQtcG9wLWE_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1SZXZTaGFyZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249QUZMX01DQVotUG9wQV8yMDI0MDIxMiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV90Yz1VQ04tMjAyNDA0MDYmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9TUNBWi1Qb3BBJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEdXA3NwY0IKZhA6YBFmbL9MqFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

clean_body: I have breaking news to share with you... | | ~ Friend, I have breaking news to share with you... We at America First Legal have just filed an absolutely momentous lawsuit in Maricopa County, Arizona against their elections officials for repeatedly and egregiously violating the State of Arizona’s election administration laws. The election interference and systematic election law violations we allege in Arizona are appalling, bone-chilling, and have the most serious consequences for every American. We all know what’s going on. That’s why we are taking action to expose and punish those responsible! strongly allege numerous serious violations and criminal activity, including:#1 - Maricopa County refuses to maintain the mandatory chain of custody for ballots.In 2022, these failures resulted in a discrepancy of over 25,000 votes – larger than the margin of victory in the state governor’s race#2 - Maricopa County ignores mandatory reconciliation procedures to track each ballot printed or issued to a voter. The law requires tracking and reconciling ballots cast and voters checked in to stop fraud, but the Defendants do not perform any reconciliation procedures at all#3 - Arizona law requires ballot drop boxes to be staffed by at least two election officials positioned close enough to view each person who deposits ballots into it.Maintaining an unstaffed drop box is a felony. However, Maricopa County maintains unstaffed, unsupervised ballot drop boxes, facilitating illegal ballot harvesting For many years now, the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors and the County Recorder have consistently failed to lawfully administer elections. We believe these individuals are fully aware of their election law violations.Make no mistake: Our lawsuit has been filed to prevent the November 5, 2024, election from being tainted with the same mistakes and maladministration that occurred during the 2020 and 2022 elections and to prevent election interference from occurring.Thank you for your support of our mission and historic legal actions here!~ Stephen Miller President, America First Legal | | ~ America First Legal Foundation is an IRS-approved section 501(c)(3) public charity. Your donation to America First Legal Foundation is tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. | America First Legal Foundation611 Pennsylvania Avenue, SE | #231Washington, DC 20003 US Conservative Network PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 ~ | ~~_
