name: Hope Walz
subject: Help me surprise my dad…
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
Peter, Hope Walz here - Gov. Walz’s daughter! I wanted to reach out because today is my dad’s birthday! He’s turning 60 so it’s kind of a big deal.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82502233/465485901/1932686235?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTQ1MWE3MS0yNmY0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHwY7lC2rGrs4d0XwmXSMs840BUDPpsQurfCklcU3kM=&emci=84451a71-26f4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=89451a71-26f4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=11244133)
---
Peter,
Hope Walz here - Gov. Walz’s daughter!
I wanted to reach out because today is my dad’s birthday! He’s turning 60 so it’s kind of a big deal.
My dad is the best dad I could ask for. He’s a veteran, a teacher, championship-winning football coach (he reminds us all the time), and most of all, a dedicated public servant who loves this state. He works so hard every day to improve people’s lives in every corner of Minnesota, and I’m so proud to be his daughter.
That’s why I’m asking you to sign his birthday card. We’re hoping to give it to him later today, but I had to make sure his biggest supporters all had the chance to sign it.
[**I know it would mean so much to my dad to hear from everyone who has believed in him and supported his work to build a better Minnesota on his birthday. Please take a moment to sign his birthday card, you can even leave a personal note!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82502234/465485902/1932686235?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTQ1MWE3MS0yNmY0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHwY7lC2rGrs4d0XwmXSMs840BUDPpsQurfCklcU3kM=&emci=84451a71-26f4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=89451a71-26f4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=11244133)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82502235/465485903/1932686235?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTQ1MWE3MS0yNmY0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHwY7lC2rGrs4d0XwmXSMs840BUDPpsQurfCklcU3kM=&emci=84451a71-26f4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=89451a71-26f4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=11244133)
Thank you,
Hope Walz
**[SIGN THE CARD](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82502236/465485904/1932686235?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTQ1MWE3MS0yNmY0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHwY7lC2rGrs4d0XwmXSMs840BUDPpsQurfCklcU3kM=&emci=84451a71-26f4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=89451a71-26f4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=11244133)**

He works so hard every day to improve people’s lives in every corner of Minnesota, and I’m so proud to be his daughter. That’s why I’m asking you to sign his birthday card. We’re hoping to give it to him later today, but I had to make sure his biggest supporters all had the chance to sign it. Thank you, Hope Walz

name: American Update
subject: California Building Fewer Homes As Residents Continue Getting Smacked With Astronomically High Rent
body:
And ‘Unacceptable’: Trump Team Files Motion To Replace Judge In Hush Money Trial

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c699911%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QlPhOFAL00Itfq6wFLc1jw&sysid=1 California Building Fewer Homes As Residents Continue Getting Smacked With Astronomically High Rent

clean_body: We’re facing a wave of outside money that will flood our district with attack ads and misinformation aimed at Matt’s record. | Peter, the top GOP super PAC dedicated to keeping the House red just endorsed our opponent. = We’re facing a wave of outside money that will flood our district with attack ads and misinformation aimed at Matt’s record. = The Congressional Leadership Fund (CLF) is a far-right dark money group aligned with radical Speaker Mike Johnson that is dedicated to electing Republicans to the House. Make no mistake: They’re targeting PA-08 because they think they can defeat Matt this November, and they’re willing to do and spend anything to make it happen. This endorsement is a direct threat to our campaign and the future of PA-08. It's a signal that the far-right radicals are mobilizing their forces to pour in millions of dollars in an attempt to defeat Matt. We cannot afford to sit back and watch as outside special interests hijack our democracy and dictate the outcome of this crucial race. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Cartwright HQ In 2022, Matt Cartwright was one of only 5 Democrats to win a House race in a district that Donald Trump carried in 2020. 🔀 Flip the House.
🦸 Secure the Senate.
🏆 Win the White House.
That’s our mission for 2024, team. And to make that mission a success, we’re going to need your help.
Empowering the youth vote will be the key to saving our democracy from right-wing extremists. They’ve proven again and again that they don’t care about us. **So it’s time to vote them out.**
[We’re asking our strongest supporters to let us know what’s driving them to the polls in 2024 and beyond. Whether it’s abortion access, climate action, the economy, or anything in between, we want to know the issues our base is most passionate about. So it’s time to vote them out. | Extremist Republicans across the country have called for a nationwide abortion ban, fought tooth and nail against LGBTQ+ rights, and still don’t believe that climate change is real. NextGen is determined to fight back, but to allocate our resources properly we have to ask: Let's get to work, NextGen PAC | Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; ; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | = |

name: Justice Democrats
subject: An anti-abortion, anti-education, pro-Trump billionaire wants to unseat Summer
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Time is running out and Rep. Summer Lee’s Democratic primary race is
heating up as we get closer to the April 23 election.

Summer took her so-called Democratic challenger [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140416?t=1001&akid=34174%2E1203867%2EHJ-78Q ]head-on at a debate
Thursday night, where she pointed out the hypocrisy of her opponent
attacking her while being propped up by a Super PAC funded by Republican
billionaire Jeff Yass:

“My opponent's outwardly calling for Republicans to vote for her. She's
backed by Jeffrey Yass—the richest man in PA—who's spent all his money
eroding public education & abortion rights. And right now, he’s on the
shortlist to be Donald Trump’s Treasury Secretary. Her entire campaign is
backed by Republicans, yet she says I am not a good enough Democrat. It
feels like she’s implying that there’s enough room for Joe Manchins in the
Democratic Party, but not a Black woman fighting for her own community.”

So far, Moderate PAC has reserved more than $500,000 worth of TV and
digital ads attacking Summer since the year started.

Super PACs bankrolled by anti-abortion, anti-education, and pro-Trump GOP
billionaires have no place in our Democratic primaries or our democracy.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240406-sl.oAKyu6&refcode=em20240406-34174&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=34174%2E1203867%2EHJ-78Q ]Help Summer fight back in these final weeks before her competitive
primary: rush a split donation between her campaign and Justice Democrats
now →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240406-sl.oAKyu6&refcode=em20240406-34174&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1021&akid=34174%2E1203867%2EHJ-78Q ]Contribute $5

Summer will never stop defending our abortion rights, protecting our
public schools, or demanding billionaires pay their fair share. Everything
that billionaires like Jeffrey Yass spend millions trying to stop. Let’s
do everything we can to keep her fighting for the people of Western
Pennsylvania in Congress.

— Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240406-34174-footer&t=1022&refcode2=34174_1203867_HJ-78Q&akid=34174%2E1203867%2EHJ-78Q

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=34174%2E1203867%2EHJ-78Q

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Abortion Action Missouri just endorsed my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Missouri is on the frontline of the fight to protect reproductive rights this year.
#
I have some big news to share with you today, Peter.
**Abortion Action Missouri, our state’s leading abortion rights advocacy organization, just endorsed my campaign for U.S. Senate!**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45141?refcode=em20240406-5212&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5212%2E614464%2EEgfT1p)
**[JOIN OUR MOVEMENT →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45141?refcode=em20240406-5212&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5212%2E614464%2EEgfT1p)**
After the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade in 2022, control-obsessed politicians like Josh Hawley made Missouri the first state in the nation to completely outlaw abortion.
Right after, Hawley co-sponsored a federal abortion ban — and since then, he’s led the fight with his corrupt family business to criminalize access to mifepristone, the most commonly used abortion pill, in all 50 states.
**Now, Missouri is on the frontline of the fight to protect abortion access.**
**[FIGHT BACK NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45141?refcode=em20240406-5212&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=5212%2E614464%2EEgfT1p)**
This year, Missourians have the opportunity to hold Josh Hawley accountable for his crusade against reproductive rights. They’ll also have the power to end Missouri’s total abortion ban directly on the ballot.
**Abortion Action Missouri knows that when I’m in the U.S. Senate, I’ll fight like hell to end the filibuster and enshrine abortion rights into law.** And they know that together, we can defeat Josh Hawley and give everyday Missourians the power to make decisions about their own bodies, families, and lives again.
**[So Peter, will you join our movement to defeat Josh Hawley and protect reproductive rights by making your first donation of absolutely any amount to my campaign today? This is a movement built by everyday people, for everyday people, so I won’t be able to do this without your help.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45141?refcode=em20240406-5212&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=5212%2E614464%2EEgfT1p)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45142?refcode=em20240406-5212&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=5212%2E614464%2EEgfT1p) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45142?refcode=em20240406-5212&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=5212%2E614464%2EEgfT1p) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45142?refcode=em20240406-5212&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=5212%2E614464%2EEgfT1p) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45142?refcode=em20240406-5212&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=5212%2E614464%2EEgfT1p) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45142?refcode=em20240406-5212&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=5212%2E614464%2EEgfT1p) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45142?refcode=em20240406-5212&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=5212%2E614464%2EEgfT1p) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45141?refcode=em20240406-5212&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=5212%2E614464%2EEgfT1p)
---
Corrupt elites like Josh Hawley want absolute power over everyone and everything. That stops with our movement.
Let’s flip this seat and take back power for everyday Missourians,
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240406-5212-footer&t=12&refcode2=5212_614464_EgfT1p&akid=5212%2E614464%2EEgfT1p)**

clean_body: Kirsten Gillibrand is fighting tirelessly in the Senate | | | Hi, friend! As a reliable Democrat in 43614, we’re personally asking you to endorse Sen. Gillibrand’s must-win reelection campaign. Look, Kirsten Gillibrand is fighting tirelessly in the Senate to defend women’s rights, lower the cost of living for families and protect vital programs like Social Security and Medicare. But the GOP still has a clear path to retaking the Senate in 2024, and New York Republicans are going after Kirsten’s seat like never before. That’s why we need 20,000 grassroots supporters to endorse Kirsten’s campaign by midnight tonight. | | Thank you for standing with us, Team Gillibrand | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

Team – can we huddle real quick? I need to relay the level of seriousness this campaign just reached.
1️⃣ Public polling shows me and one of my opponents are neck-and-neck.
2️⃣ But that same opponent just collected a check for $600,000 from a PAC that backs election deniers and insurrection supporters.
3️⃣ So now we're being outspend on ads, and that's a dangerous spot to be in less than 6 weeks out from the election.
Billionaires who donate to Donald Trump, Ron Desantis, Ted Cruz and Lauren Boebert are trying to influence this election, folks. And if I can't raise $50,000 by tomorrow at midnight to renew my ads, they'll dominate the airwaves and crush our chance to defend democracy.
Can you chip in anything between me and Seth Moulton to help me win on May 14? We need someone seasoned at protecting democracy to serve in Maryland's 3rd, and that's me >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]

Together,
Harry

name: David Hogg
subject: Run. Hide. Fight.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
This is what KIDS are taught to do if a gunman comes into their school.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20240406-1&t=1&akid=526%2E587540%2EKm5THF)
Run. Hide. Fight.
This is what **KIDS** are taught to do — Kindergarteners to high school seniors — if a gunman comes into their school and starts shooting.
Instead of changing our gun laws so that we can save lives, shameless NRA-backed politicians have installed those words and that training into our kids' school curriculum.
And after they put the onus of not getting shot at school on our children, they started working double-duty in state capitols across the country to dismantle our already-weak gun laws.
_Truly reprehensible._
So now, through Leaders We Deserve, we’re rewriting the script:
We need to start **running** for office.
We need to stop **hiding** from our responsibility to protect future generations.
We need to start **fighting** for a better future.
[**But we can only grow this movement with your continued support. Can you contribute $5 today and help us fight our way to a better future, where "run hide fight" is left in our history books and not our headlines?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240406-1?refcode=em20240406-1-526&refcode2=526_587540_Km5THF&akid=526%2E587540%2EKm5THF)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240406-1?refcode=em20240406-1-526&refcode2=526_587540_Km5THF&akid=526%2E587540%2EKm5THF)**
There were many who said after Parkland that we couldn’t change anything because we were just a “bunch of kids.” But we proved them wrong — **we passed gun laws in a state “owned” by the NRA.**
There were many who said young people would never vote. But we proved them wrong in 2018 — _defeating more NRA-backed politicians than ever before in U.S. history._ Then, in 2020, we defeated NRA puppet Donald Trump. **Both of these victories enabled us to pass the first federal gun law in 30 years.**
There were many who said Maxwell Frost, March For Our Lives' first National Organizing Director, could never be the first Gen Z Member of Congress. **But we proved them wrong, again.**
**Are you ready to keep flipping the script and fighting the status quo with us, Peter?**
[**Leaders We Deserve is committed to electing young leaders who will fight for the change we know is possible, but we need grassroots support to make it happen. Can you contribute $5 today to help?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240406-1?refcode=em20240406-1-526&refcode2=526_587540_Km5THF&akid=526%2E587540%2EKm5THF)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240406-1?refcode=em20240406-1-526&refcode2=526_587540_Km5THF&akid=526%2E587540%2EKm5THF)**
Thanks for your support, Peter. Together, we can keep proving them wrong.
David Hogg
Co-founder
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20240406-1&t=2&refcode2=526_587540_Km5THF&akid=526%2E587540%2EKm5THF)**

clean_body: Donald Trump and his accomplices have shown time and again that they rank their self-interests over the well-being of Americans. | | | | Here's the situation: Our values and democracy are under threat from the dangerous agenda of Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans. It's crucial that we organize our movement to fight back and build a government that works for the people, not the powerful. The Blue Wave Project is fueled by passionate individuals like you, who are committed and not afraid to stand up against MAGA extremism. Donald Trump and his accomplices have shown time and again that they rank their self-interests over the well-being of Americans. From their relentless attacks on healthcare and reproductive rights to their denial of climate change and efforts to suppress voting rights, the stakes have never been higher. Here's how your support can make a real difference: With your help, we can engage voters to support and elect progressive candidates up and down the ballot – particularly in competitive Senate races across the country – who will stand up to Trump and never back down from fighting for policies that benefit working families. From abortion rights to civil rights to fighting climate change, Trump and his allies will stop at nothing to roll back the progress we've made. Our grassroots efforts and victories are powered by people like you. By pitching in to the Blue Wave Project today, you'll enable us to make sure we have the resources to mobilize voters across the country to support Democrats and fight against the harmful agenda of Trump and his MAGA allies. = = Together, we can elect Senators who put people over politics and prioritize the needs of the people over the interests of the privileged. name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Sign on today to support my resolution recognizing Eid al-Fitr and honoring our Muslim neighbors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
As our Muslim neighbors break daily fasts with family and communities, many Muslims are grieving and horrified as the Israeli government intentionally starves millions of people in Gaza. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWzUOzUNdQEA5K3octjBN0YmB8Q8PrF_0Wap9lBHtsb5TiJ25J6wnONdl4epojCRjFJCDyqXeeoKxng8DjiSGsP0qPBJs25jH8qegg8NKh1qLjgo2iF2UAM0j6vTzcLs1xdJlZZo0B_WbdCtA-QVRWeX423XejYMhgpnYPsWDzkNWgXT4uLQcoitDBQqQFjEg5rxCrQ_C49D_WX5L25wlFmZyWIaKzBAcVFeWyPolzt0mLqrnriWI5FbiXvr7B3sltD_2Cn4xE8AUQ1PQFaE1tJxz8SuqWmy5lmtVuNEf82AhfEV6EY5inEdKOVPZwZcAhQ5fl2iPVoaZOz_t_ZLaCdA/45a/MhgdQc3sQQ67vSsd8x1JnA/h0/h001.KCZi9WJXwVrT3kPY6qSxo9Qg54CTpcPn2iaHkk4-ozg)
---
Friend, For Muslims around the world, we are in the holiest time of Ramadan, which is the holiest month of the year. It has been one of the hardest Ramadan months that I can remember. As many know, Ramadan is a month for solidarity and empathy with impoverished and oppressed people, including taking actions like feeding hungry people. As our Muslim neighbors break daily fasts with family and communities, many Muslims are grieving and horrified as the Israeli government intentionally starves millions of people in Gaza. They can't eat without thinking of starvation being used as a weapon of war in Gaza. We’re seeing images of Muslims in Gaza praying among the rubble because their mosques were destroyed. Even during Easter, seeing the beloved Christian Palestinians in Gaza celebrate among the wreckage. Many have had to bury their loved ones during this genocide. **Last year, I introduced a resolution in Congress to recognize Eid al-Fitr, the observance of the conclusion of Ramadan. It is even more important to bring this recognition to Congress as others use our mere existence in the U.S. for political games and fear-mongering.** I still remember a colleague in Congress from New Jersey yell out, “They are all guilty,” referring to the Muslim community. Our own lawmakers continue to make violent, dehumanizing, and genocidal statements, like the U.S. Congressperson from Michigan who recently called to repeat the unimaginable horrors of Nagasaki and Hiroshima by dropping nuclear weapons on Gaza. **This devaluation of life is not only dangerous for the human beings suffering in Palestine, but it’s also dangerous for Palestinian Americans, Muslim Americans, and Arab Americans, who are facing increased Islamophobia and anti-Arab hate.** My congressional resolution recognizing Eid al-Fitr also recognizes the contributions of American Muslims to our society. It calls on the U.S. House of Representatives to recognize the importance of the Islamic faith, to demonstrate solidarity with and support for Muslims, and to express deep respect and best wishes to Muslims celebrating Eid al-Fitr. [**Will you sign on today to support my resolution in Congress to recognize Ramadan and Eid al-Fitr—and to respect Muslims’ humanity?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5uct1lItBbQw3Sg6Wm_SppASXdZGHgit-UpHyapBEfI76gwZFaTIPn1Ksrdz115b5_WP6hYlZy8XGWApw4zMM1mHFR_E6TfY-EJ1JOT8YcV_VOD690VmM0UNi2UVw11ZHL_9LbxxIW1CdLdIAnupcgvDgPUv36VrKOTZhWwyINBU1AstnRJCTTfJL_fJ2SGyv5qW16gUKd61tk8GAOvmiec9TUhmUi5AlPL4wwu35eldu-Mmd19lTvht4hJWy5yqygekfK1Qk8-HT_DcOuOno-ntYRnZ2GkEMJ-z3DZndaiR4__-tt6_b-ZHPx6yASi38ZhsiLqH9d9BDibyeWbExEQFgvLWn8Yi_U-TX7jfME-PniWTnjC06ECbMDvEmcEC_mWLJCr8Lxc_L27qbcHqdXkFkf8bfrfRwndabwN83R-Op70eyVzMHE53Y6rKOgitzWHHjRSSZv8pJuXS-D6qGCVa9jPjwq-0fD-p3SbE8frgZH1nDzpvWGVO6KpbfqkiwbDKN4yhvSc1S7vMGgLaiwcJaQN2Qear5B0k622xembY/45a/MhgdQc3sQQ67vSsd8x1JnA/h1/h001.Vopf791BLr7FYmat6zRslj6Mc6pF3yi_emUhIopara8) | [SIGN ON TODAY](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5uct1lItBbQw3Sg6Wm_SppASXdZGHgit-UpHyapBEfI76gwZFaTIPn1Ksrdz115b5_WP6hYlZy8XGWApw4zMM1mHFR_E6TfY-EJ1JOT8YcV_VOD690VmM0UNi2UVw11ZHL_9LbxxIW1CdLdIAnupcghLRmuhnfqeDwxj9Vn4NjXjET_yJCENV8970y9EDVtRinUjf_VtotDsi4GY6Q691a8DfkQX3qsbsBObmBGu5VljIUPAMowUy9I2eUGx-JdSgGkoVJz9neyf9oE-eS0SFVWIM0ZDXNQmHjYUEGUDAfKiEbsamBMcF97ZAQ4dpPzDy_TmonYt7SremOre_F2O0z6BwL99xnH6nltOUvkpSkKOTRozqzkq23Bpr9oie1_6BTLyAARl-WVoo32a3T3jQSilMo3i_fd8x0nIvDUnvbiEmOateXY18cyZyFh5i0YnmPyqjSEudumjTbWvQWRmsCqkIcN2JQUenLjs7N-vsD8Hp2X_pEHUNBxzydUyRc2ueh4aZNS0r-6tgq2KyT3zoW8hTpMMoX28N-IfQvKBTeYY/45a/MhgdQc3sQQ67vSsd8x1JnA/h2/h001.QATBHAEZizwpVqOl_D7CS6MvJJ_rymVeJwWC9IznuaA)

subject: BREAKING: ‘Reporting for duty, Mr. President!’ James Judge jumps to Florida’s 15th Congressional District, after claiming victory in FL-12
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Judge for Congress
body:
TAMPA, Fla. – James Judge (R-FL), the Tampa Bay area native, America-first conservative, Iraq war-veteran and Tampa small business owner... | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us16.campaign-archive.com/?e=00028e5542&u=1f416ce0ac5ddfd320ec0ff6b&id=18d070f09f)
---
[](https://judgeforcongress.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1f416ce0ac5ddfd320ec0ff6b&id=79c23e685e&e=00028e5542)
[**‘Reporting for duty, Mr. President!’ James Judge announces jump to Florida’s 15th Congressional District, after claiming victory in FL-12**](https://judgeforcongress.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1f416ce0ac5ddfd320ec0ff6b&id=922a3d8a23&e=00028e5542)
_The firebrand conservative announced that he will challenge struggling Congresswoman, Rep. Laurel Lee (R-FL), who has a failing grade as a conservative in Congress. Just last month, former President Donald Trump criticized Lee and called for a true conservative replacement to step forward._
TAMPA, Fla. – James Judge (R-FL), the Tampa Bay area native, America-first conservative, Iraq war-veteran and Tampa small business owner who lives in Pasco County, announced his move into the Republican primary for Florida’s 15th Congressional District on Friday, claiming a victory in FL-12.
“In just six months, by shining a magnifying glass on my last opponent and holding him accountable, I was able to transform him from a D-rated Republican, a Congressman who voted about 60 percent of the time in-line with the Constitution, to a nearly A-rated conservative, who now aligns with the House Freedom Caucus,” said Judge. “I’m asking voters to imagine what I could do with a full 2-year term in Washington, where I pledge to hold the rest of Congress accountable.”
Judge was so effective at holding Rep. Gus Bilirakis (R-FL) accountable to conservative principles that President Donald J. Trump recently endorsed Bilirakis for reelection.
By making the jump, Judge is answering President Trump’s call for a true conservative to step forward and take on Rep. Laurel Lee (R-FL), the embattled incumbent Congresswoman for Florida’s 15th Congressional District.
According to Judge, Lee’s record is shockingly terrible and even worse than that of Bilirakis, but says the remedy lies with electing God-fearing conservatives like himself. “I believe fixing Congress isn’t as difficult as people make it out to be. We just need to elect officials who realize they will stand before God one day and give an account for their actions and inactions,” Judge said. “It’s important to note my focus remains the same. I am running to end the anarchy at the southern border, restore law-and-order nationwide, balance the budget and pay down our national debt, something the Congresswoman has demonstrated she is adamantly against.”
In March, Lee opposed members of the House Freedom Caucus and voted in favor of the new $1.2 trillion funding package, which included more federal spending for LGBT initiatives and diversity, equity and inclusion (DEI) programs.
According to Judge, Lee, who is still in her first term, has consistently failed to uphold conservative values and adhere to the Constitution. According to conservative watchdog groups like The Freedom Index (50 percent) and the Republican Liberty Caucus (55 percent), Lee has a 52.5 percent average, when it comes to upholding the Constitution.
“When your job is to support and defend the Constitution, these aren’t just failing grades, I’d say she is virtually working as a Democrat,” said Judge. “Equally disturbing are the special interest groups who are funding her campaign.”
According to a recent review of political contributions tracked by the Federal Election Commission, Lee has accepted hundreds of special interest contributions in her short stint, including funding from Meta, Facebook’s parent company, and Google, both of which helped rig the 2020 election against President Trump and have consistently demonstrated their opposition to conservative, family values.
“I look forward to giving to constituents of Florida’s 15th Congressional District a truly conservative option this primary election and I pledge to wage an all out war against the radical progressives when I get to Washington,” Judge said.
**About James Judge:** James Judge, a Florida native, graduated from Eckerd College in St. Petersburg and served in the U.S. Coast Guard in Operation Iraqi Freedom. Additionally, he served in Kabul, Afghanistan as a spokesman for the U.S. Department of Defense from 2010 until 2011. He now owns Judge Public Relations, a Tampa-based public relations, marketing and consulting firm. Judge is married to his wife Danielle, who is also a small business owner. The Judges live on a ranch in Pasco county, with their five dogs, three cats, chickens, cows, goats and horses. Judge is a proud member of the NRA, Veterans of Foreign Wars and the American Legion. The Judges are also longtime, active members at Idlewild Baptist Church in Lutz.
_“Without God, there could be no American form of Government, nor an American way of life. Recognition of the Supreme Being is the first–the most basic–expression of Americanism. Thus the Founding Fathers saw it, and thus, with God’s help, it will continue to be.”_ – Dwight D. Eisenhower

| | Fellow American, It's official. We are through game one of the double header. The voters have spoken, and they chose me to be the Republican candidate for Senate in California. That means you and I will have just eight months to build a 58-county, grassroots campaign capable of defeating Adam Schiff - with his _ActBlue_ allies and the war chest he's assembled during the two decades he spent in Washington, D.C. **[That why I'm humbly asking you to rush and emergency $35 contribution to my campaign today.](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a2ab4c9427e2420aaec58979d2e1f60c&_e=YCVMCcpZn7NvcvEeLP77Gtr5YEzQ4Gg7LtdACb0nXLVHLqFojxtLQfErXCeAD4k56sPP-D5p1j4caBLVLYKm07jPl7QFWRTAQ6jwOYAvYs_xoO_i_Q4Q7TY7qITBIieUhmzjwRPPYR2rgsPjJyk5ZohR2DP4r5o4MeaqH7O22BSyUQiPwj7GnqwXrza2PER2PPkC5t7TS2cCrbn9q-705L9K5CZa1HTDTf8GHElGWBxeUjOKUVxe_zEG56XtEKD3ozDtzL0a_oZtdvrVdKrqLZOVUkGqE5FFtBQEwLGTmgGXUsSdVn5u1yYl43x9ml8NCkkTkg9bsf3QK1a_f8pUwr5B6kEeMU65h87ixskkkmTF8Hw3XT4-bA4nl-IsvRve4rTvlNkeb_e1fJqmrI0-6w%3D%3D)** There's no time to lose. With every day that goes by, you and I are getting more and more reminders why it's so important we win this election. The reality is present-day America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: ► Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. Remember? ► Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. Remember? ► Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. Remember?? Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, **_"It's deja vu all over again."_** Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. You and I _must_ win this race. **[That's why I'm humbly asking you to rush your $35 donation to my campaign today to defeat Adam Schiff in November.](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a2ab4c9427e2420aaec58979d2e1f60c&_e=YCVMCcpZn7NvcvEeLP77Gtr5YEzQ4Gg7LtdACb0nXLVHLqFojxtLQfErXCeAD4k56sPP-D5p1j4caBLVLYKm07jPl7QFWRTAQ6jwOYAvYs_xoO_i_Q4Q7TY7qITBIieUhmzjwRPPYR2rgsPjJyk5ZohR2DP4r5o4MeaqH7O22BSyUQiPwj7GnqwXrza2PER2PPkC5t7TS2cCrbn9q-705L9K5CZa1HTDTf8GHElGWBzRPG4yrvBhuJaB8igEki4W7MU8s_ZIT6P5TIJ2vCskVu55p26s3AKU6tQjua7Kxn47kaE8VlSc_qTx4cm9OcIZhk4u9ENhnWpvRac1dhagiPa5jm0BFKxn0YAyO9w6Mb6AQ7ae4rKrlTazTUV-t1MBpJyt7rPaGxLFI6QGnmhqjg%3D%3D)**

body:
| | | Please see a note from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit this _[link.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=654878e160df4ad1a72d35d8aac00f2b&_t=amHAEjXpMqDd45wgwQ-KUSRGtfeyiVWJIEJFA13qLyhe0O1ZlR_40mF8ewSaGYRt68XExLDDTIm_T9hWsXu-i0KJ4iOO5upDiq2WCs1e2qc%3D)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=654878e160df4ad1a72d35d8aac00f2b&_e=IeUhDZiZ6-wdkE5Pdtk09NOol2ye5P5l5S3nw0ymBiXdE8Onv_PXO_PQKMV0UTu7rMeCFjVAIDPXGR__oW9bUxZP-PjHvLUNyMlq24uKXDSDrhDBHrgZskmF4RLnEf39u_QJESBK4UmG7In0ll3TpStITZsSXKsHnEvuWx1KpVyU5UTkArkhfQjArGYZQTeKAHGCqil91nPjTi-PZTaFqKP3kCRnSOy52d6l7j9jeH28Q7QAyp-y_5UGUJq9FCeH5OnP_QL3b7Ssv3E6IFxNqi8HH97lvSEryDiuRyjBK5pGISsmcjmuLkOV01P9abBfaa8h4gkQT3AdFP8sxyqLu2_UoTUgO6xI3VcnHu_U3JlLqTtsSaxYspJ6uslXNB_05qEVCYudhDkCtVm8jWcJyz-ZBjUdOjPX16dRyviYFQy-4iajRZPWZLDcgJEO0PeB)
---
Peter, Biden and the Democrats know we’ve made progress fighting back against their agenda at the state level. They know we’re restoring law and order, protecting free speech, and keeping the American Dream alive in Virginia. **It’s why national Democrats are hell-bent on turning Virginia blue.** Joe Biden upped his promised spending on Virginia by FIFTEEN-FOLD in the last election cycle. And Peter, they came closer than ever that year. I know that they believe this is the year they win. We can’t let that happen—especially this year. Joe Biden has found the perfect yes-woman in the Democrats presumptive nominee, Abigail Spanberger. How perfect? She voted with him 100% of the time in Congress — that’s right. ONE HUNDRED PERCENT. They think this is the year they will turn Virginia blue — for good. **_But they are not counting on how hard we will fight back, Peter._****_Will you stand up to Joe Biden & national Democrats with me and PRESERVE our progress in Virginia?_**
---
[**FIGHT BACK WITH JASON**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=654878e160df4ad1a72d35d8aac00f2b&_e=IeUhDZiZ6-wdkE5Pdtk09NOol2ye5P5l5S3nw0ymBiXdE8Onv_PXO_PQKMV0UTu7rMeCFjVAIDPXGR__oW9bUxZP-PjHvLUNyMlq24uKXDSDrhDBHrgZskmF4RLnEf39u_QJESBK4UmG7In0ll3TpStITZsSXKsHnEvuWx1KpVyU5UTkArkhfQjArGYZQTeKAHGCqil91nPjTi-PZTaFqKP3kCRnSOy52d6l7j9jeH28Q7QAyp-y_5UGUJq9FCeH5OnP_QL3b7Ssv3E6IFxNqi8HH97lvSEryDiuRyjBK5oMrDHDI_gCfjMe6SqZ-K6_qIAv-0kbi5AXzcyL6wI6ftRcVHTE5nbRO4bzYmJx5KEWYeLzuNTfRiaYL4Dq4UKPSK3MFrTL_3Lo7YoAG3DV6-v_2pX370ra23Z_iRsz3eCyf7Xg_YskYZ2m80aZPsOH)
---
| | Peter, I won’t back down. As Attorney General of Virginia, I’ve been fighting for law and order in the Commonwealth. And we’ve gotten results for every Virginian. Booming prosperity, bright futures, and streets so safe that DC businesses are fleeing across the river to the Commonwealth. But all of this progress is in jeopardy if we don’t stand together.
**I’m ready to stand up to their agenda, in the court of law and the court of public opinion. name: Team McBride
subject: Did you catch this?
body:
Since the start of our campaign, Sarah has been making history...
#
Did you catch Sarah’s recent interview with _The Cut?_
"I'm not running to make history, I'm running to make a difference."
Sarah McBride
Since the start of our campaign, Sarah has been making history – and will make history when we elect her to Congress in November. But that is not why she’s running.
For Sarah, it is way more important to tackle the pressing issues keeping our neighbors awake at night. These issues range from access to good-paying jobs and gun safety measures to affordable health care and protecting reproductive rights. It’s about sound policy solutions that will lower everyday costs for households in Delaware and all across the U.S.
**[If you believe that Sarah's solutions belong in Congress, will you make a $5 donation right now to make sure we send her to D.C. in November?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20240406-1?refcode=em20240406-1-19&refcode2=19_21716_DuAaxd&akid=19%2E21716%2EDuAaxd)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20240406-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240406-1-19&refcode2=19_21716_DuAaxd&akid=19%2E21716%2EDuAaxd)**
Running on the issues is the only way any candidate should be running. Like Sarah said: _“That’s how we guarantee that more and more people from various backgrounds are able to not just run, but win and serve.”_
When she becomes Delaware's next member of Congress, Sarah will be committed to delivering results to Delawareans across the state. Her commitment to the job will not waiver and we know she won't let our neighbors down — not for one second.
**[As an important part of this team, can we count on you to contribute $5 or anything you can afford to help us build up our grassroots campaign right now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20240406-1?refcode=em20240406-1-19&refcode2=19_21716_DuAaxd&akid=19%2E21716%2EDuAaxd)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20240406-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240406-1-19&refcode2=19_21716_DuAaxd&akid=19%2E21716%2EDuAaxd)**
Thank you,
— Team McBride
_P.S. You can read Sarah's full interview in The Cut[**here.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/58?t=1&akid=19%2E21716%2EDuAaxd)_
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=19%2E21716%2EDuAaxd)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=19%2E21716%2EDuAaxd)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=19%2E21716%2EDuAaxd)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)

name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: Democrat support is CRUMBLING
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
Democrats are in trouble - every single poll that I’ve seen/conducted recently shows support for Biden and his allies in Congress is CRATERING. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=3eeb06ea104f4909999f6eff433d4636&_t=2WtOh1oOcY26PVkT3WzrFkWxRxfvHlRLgWEHmyLB72Rq5ziZI6HEJX3GkVvma6T7OT-31UybXGMGm3PQEk5c6VMHNZwe6KibZqE5ByGwjKE%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=3eeb06ea104f4909999f6eff433d4636&_t=2WtOh1oOcY26PVkT3WzrFkWxRxfvHlRLgWEHmyLB72Rq5ziZI6HEJX3GkVvma6T7OT-31UybXGMGm3PQEk5c6VMHNZwe6KibZqE5ByGwjKE%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative,

It's Kellyanne Conway reaching out to have a frank discussion with you ahead of the pivotal 2024 general election. Believe it or not, we are less than eight months until voters head to the polls to help save our nation and get this country back on track.

If you feel like we're living in a time warp and Election Day 2020 just came to an end, believe me, you're not alone.

While so much has changed under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, the cost of living and crime have increased, so much has stayed the same.
1. Americans _still want_ lower taxes. [**tap here if you agree!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3eeb06ea104f4909999f6eff433d4636&_e=IhLpoy1q9Wn6_staBWPuPlNG2NPX_1zXzmuRwqmCPbgR9Li08OaJs60ku03fOS-xrSYohq2bbw16nlRNFO5rygzQui4McOTjeZibbLAWGfhI_6Swtemij2cdOzNzJLddgrS1mliAetPWObmn3V1woCatpOSu13S3obHiQ-U5yAkTzUwG24ZJl5vZctEVUL450MpdLkyH_25Ek9MzlKIsXJAOSMKS1I-ZMM0JddCC2iHSLQaI-oC-EzNc6WxDjT6OytUMN4Novjj2CGiufVUXyqkjLQceSHuzxg6WjxrbVrqrQrrSVXAJZmKuJfzRVPvUe8pLTIged0iC1PyKkUm26GweRzUoimPHWblVlKgQSLVYg0iwyXpOMa20bf6SCZV-v0PNdJvvP8-T71bDg7t-TA%3D%3D)
2. Americans are _still fighting_ for safer communities in which to raise their families. [**tap here if you agree!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3eeb06ea104f4909999f6eff433d4636&_e=IhLpoy1q9Wn6_staBWPuPlNG2NPX_1zXzmuRwqmCPbgR9Li08OaJs60ku03fOS-xrSYohq2bbw16nlRNFO5rygzQui4McOTjeZibbLAWGfhI_6Swtemij2cdOzNzJLddgrS1mliAetPWObmn3V1woCatpOSu13S3obHiQ-U5yAkTzUwG24ZJl5vZctEVUL450MpdLkyH_25Ek9MzlKIsXJAOSMKS1I-ZMM0JddCC2iHSLQaI-oC-EzNc6WxDjT6OfXMbQ67QUcdDKEMSCbv87lkT6Vg38A0i3luIsn9q7opjCN0jfRM60oDR2NBV43JXjBcOIQsgu3P4ECkaXBAgjTyXzk_e80IqK8DBaMJe9qx7XdCRG3XMZ6bdheL-qNKbbWRa7O9TcuKyebj2im8j_w%3D%3D)
3. And Americans simply want enough cash in their bank accounts to pay their bills and have a little fun. [**tap here if you agree!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3eeb06ea104f4909999f6eff433d4636&_e=IhLpoy1q9Wn6_staBWPuPlNG2NPX_1zXzmuRwqmCPbgR9Li08OaJs60ku03fOS-xrSYohq2bbw16nlRNFO5rygzQui4McOTjeZibbLAWGfhI_6Swtemij2cdOzNzJLddgrS1mliAetPWObmn3V1woCatpOSu13S3obHiQ-U5yAkTzUwG24ZJl5vZctEVUL450MpdLkyH_25Ek9MzlKIsXJAOSMKS1I-ZMM0JddCC2iHSLQaI-oC-EzNc6WxDjT6OCEsHKWmuJjT-7dFFg7XUHJnZu0b7vFUyFyeerYXCSEFHRyom4GVJpo1x1NnfvpVnff5zwWbH6H_72GDM2003trWNiviO9rx_foQ3jtyobrNnTBDuaRttfeyO1et2X7-YH5LlzUDAEDnJKKthWFc9YA%3D%3D)

Under President Trump and Republican leadership in Congress, the voting public was more confident in their ability to live out their American Dream. But under the so-called "leadership" of President Biden and Montana U.S. Sen. Jon Tester, Americans are frustrated and fed up with the lackluster economy and weakness on the world stage.

body:
We knew this wasn’t going to be easy, but this is shaping up to be the toughest election in the country. So we’re asking you for your help.
#

Peter,
We’ve got some good news and bad news for you.
**_First, the good news:**_ We had an absolutely incredible fundraising month in March. It was exactly what we needed to close out the quarter and head into the Election Year with a strong foundation to build on.
**_But now, the bad news:**_ At a fundraiser at Trump’s Mar-a-Lago mansion in Palm Beach, Trump attacked Ruben directly and Kari Lake raised $1 million in one night. Just one night. It’s a huge amount of money, and she’s going to use every dollar of it to take the fight to us.
We know you can’t chip in to every email or every text we send. That would be ridiculous. But we need you to chip in to this one, because we have to keep pace with Kari Lake’s fundraising or she will absolutely swamp us with attack ads.
It might not seem like a donation of $3 can compete with Kari Lake’s millionaire and billionaire donors, but with tons of other people joining you it can have a huge impact.
Those donations add up fast when we’re all chipping in.
So, if you can, we really need this now:
[**Contribute $3 — that, or anything you can afford to give — to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for U.S. Senate and help us win back Arizona’s seat.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-apr24.p6MMmT&refcode=em240406-1-90&t=1&akid=2174%2E734936%2EcTnKiO)

subject: FWD: I was instantly hooked
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rapid Resist Action
body:
|
---

| | I am so proud to work alongside folks like Lauren who know that this fight isn't easy, but it's important. Like so many of you, Lauren found the courage and passion, even in truly difficult circumstances, to keep going and fight for a better future. If you find yourself ready for change and ready for something better like she did, [**chip in to support our work at Movement Labs.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82513377/465512957/-327605227?refcode=2024-04-06-cer-fwd&recurring=&amount=14&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=26465ca8-31f4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjQ2NWNhOC0zMWY0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K2CtB3b7LcUYi00TnJYVEtHfTuHVDDrH2SrACUq7Hnw=) Onward to November, _Sarah_ Forwarded Message | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82513378/465512958/855222454?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjQ2NWNhOC0zMWY0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K2CtB3b7LcUYi00TnJYVEtHfTuHVDDrH2SrACUq7Hnw=&emci=36eba459-bcf2-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=26465ca8-31f4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=5534179)
---

Over the last few weeks, I've been inspired by my colleague Sarah Long sharing her story, so I wanted to come on here and share a bit of mine as well.
My story starts in 2008 when I volunteered for Obama's campaign, and **I was instantly hooked.**
The buzz in the air and the possibility of change invigorated me, so I dropped out of a pre-med college program in 2009. After that, I took an unpaid internship with the Missouri Democratic Party, working as an amateur campaign manager for several state legislative races aiming to take back the Missouri House.
That turned into a full-time job in 2010, and then we had the worst election cycle for Democrats in half a century, but the losses solidified my passion to pursue a career **working for the underdogs and fighting to build a more representative and equitable democracy.**
Now, a decade plus later, **this fight is far from over.**
[**So, chip in $14 and help rural county Dems organize and run up the vote totals for Joe Biden in supposed red areas, and let's push him over the top in November!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82513379/465512959/-327605227?refcode=2024-04-06-cer-fwd&recurring=&amount=14&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=26465ca8-31f4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjQ2NWNhOC0zMWY0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K2CtB3b7LcUYi00TnJYVEtHfTuHVDDrH2SrACUq7Hnw=)
[Donate Now](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82513380/465512960/-327605227?refcode=2024-04-06-cer-fwd&recurring=&amount=14&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=26465ca8-31f4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjQ2NWNhOC0zMWY0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K2CtB3b7LcUYi00TnJYVEtHfTuHVDDrH2SrACUq7Hnw=)
This fight hasn't been easy, and every year I see folks across the country lose hope.
**But, my dad motivates me to keep going.**
Since I was five years old, my dad's chronic health issues kept us in and out of the emergency room, and for as long as I can remember, he struggled to get access to healthcare. Until the Affordable Care Act (ACA) came along.
Now, I'll be the first to admit that the ACA isn't perfect, but **it gave me ten more years with my dad. And, for that, I'll always be thankful.**
Those extra ten years wouldn't have been possible without a bench of progressive leaders who fought to reform healthcare, so now, I need your help to keep the fight for a more representative, equitable democracy going.
[**So join me. We need you in this fight. Your contribution not only recruits local candidates and organizes rural and red state folks, but also it lays the foundation to send Joe Biden to a second term and win critical Congressional and Senate races across the country.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82513381/465512961/-327605227?refcode=2024-04-06-cer-fwd&recurring=&amount=14&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=26465ca8-31f4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjQ2NWNhOC0zMWY0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K2CtB3b7LcUYi00TnJYVEtHfTuHVDDrH2SrACUq7Hnw=)
More soon,
_Lauren_
Lauren Gepford
Managing Director

clean_body: | | | I am so proud to work alongside folks like Lauren who know that this fight isn't easy, but it's important. Like so many of you, Lauren found the courage and passion, even in truly difficult circumstances, to keep going and fight for a better future. If you find yourself ready for change and ready for something better like she did, = Onward to November, Sarah Forwarded Message | Over the last few weeks, I've been inspired by my colleague Sarah Long sharing her story, so I wanted to come on here and share a bit of mine as well. My story starts in 2008 when I volunteered for Obama's campaign, and I was instantly hooked. The buzz in the air and the possibility of change invigorated me, so I dropped out of a pre-med college program in 2009. After that, I took an unpaid internship with the Missouri Democratic Party, working as an amateur campaign manager for several state legislative races aiming to take back the Missouri House. That turned into a full-time job in 2010, and then we had the worst election cycle for Democrats in half a century, but the losses solidified my passion to pursue a career working for the underdogs and fighting to build a more representative and equitable democracy. Now, a decade plus later, this fight is far from over. = = This fight hasn't been easy, and every year I see folks across the country lose hope. But, my dad motivates me to keep going. Since I was five years old, my dad's chronic health issues kept us in and out of the emergency room, and for as long as I can remember, he struggled to get access to healthcare. Until the Affordable Care Act (ACA) came along. Now, I'll be the first to admit that the ACA isn't perfect, but it gave me ten more years with my dad. And, for that, I'll always be thankful. Those extra ten years wouldn't have been possible without a bench of progressive leaders who fought to reform healthcare, so now, I need your help to keep the fight for a more representative, equitable democracy going. = More soon, Lauren Lauren Gepford Managing Director Contest Every Race Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Rapid Resist Action. Contributions to Rapid Resist Action, a 501(c)(4), are not tax deductible for income tax purposes. |

body:

Trump and the MAGA-right are on the march.
In November of 2024 we will vote in the most important election of our lifetimes.
So we’re calling on all of our supporters — whether you’ve been with us for a few days or have been following VoteVets for years — to show your community that you will do your part in the fight against authoritarians and wannabe dictators on the right.

Thanks,
The team at the VoteVets PX

subject: Angela Alsobrooks for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17390?t=1009&amount=25&akid=1359%2E52803%2ElhkaOt ][IMG]

Peter, up until this point, I’ve not been actively involved in
the 2024 campaign for Maryland’s soon-to-be-open seat in the U.S. Senate.

I’ve been busy this year debunking the GOP’s fraudulent “impeachment
inquiry” against President Biden and campaigning for strong Democrats all
over America.

But with former Republican Governor Larry Hogan entering the race, it’s an
all-hands-on-deck moment right here in Maryland because we must defend
this seat to maintain our narrow majority in the Senate. Hogan would just
be another brick-in-the-wall for Donald Trump and the MAGA forces that
rule what used to be Abe Lincoln’s party.

That’s why I’m coming out right now for Angela Alsobrooks,
Peter, and proudly endorsing her
campaign to be the next United States Senator from Maryland.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17390?t=1010&amount=25&akid=1359%2E52803%2ElhkaOt ]Will you join me in super-charging Angela Alsobrooks’ Senate campaign
by making a grassroots donation right away?

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Polling against me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
I wanted to tell you first. We just got word they are polling disgusting attacks to use against our campaign.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240406-3720-footer&t=1&akid=3720%2E420207%2Exo4GUL)
Peter,
I wanted you to hear this from me first. **Our campaign just learned a poll went out across Seattle to test the waters for a primary challenge to unseat me.**
I want you to know I will not be intimidated. I am ready to beat back any attacks corporate special interests or AIPAC’s Republican megadonors send our way.
**This is the surest sign yet that I am on their target list for 2024. We can’t waste a moment.**[**Can you make a contribution of any amount right now to support my campaign?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240406.ZXDZBO&refcode=em20240406-3720&t=2&akid=3720%2E420207%2Exo4GUL)
This poll pushed out some nasty attacks against me. We’ve seen this script before: first the poll, then the attack ads.
Megadonors have already committed to spending $100 million on ads against progressive champions of color in the House. Frankly, I'm not surprised that I'm on their list.
Peter, we have to take this seriously.
My campaign has been hard at work organizing in every corner of my district for years. Our re-election effort launched last month with over 25 unions, abortion rights organizations, and local leaders endorsing our campaign. This is real grassroots power. But we can’t sit back and wait.
We must be prepared for anything to come our way. And yes that means potentially millions in nasty, sexist attack ads funded by Republican billionaires slamming the airwaves. But here is the thing: We know how to win! We know that it’s “people power” that wins elections.
I am ready for any fight that comes our way. And I hope you are ready too.
[**The moment is here. Can you make a contribution of any amount to support my campaign and protect our movement?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240406.ZXDZBO&refcode=em20240406-3720&t=3&akid=3720%2E420207%2Exo4GUL)
**[Donate](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240406.ZXDZBO&refcode=em20240406-3720&t=22&akid=3720%2E420207%2Exo4GUL)**
Solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20240406-3720-footer&t=23&refcode2=3720_420207_xo4GUL&akid=3720%2E420207%2Exo4GUL)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=3720%2E420207%2Exo4GUL)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=3720%2E420207%2Exo4GUL)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

Pennsylvania could be home to the MOST IMPORTANT Senate race in the entire country this year, and Mark Levin is taking notice.

About the most important race in the country
clean_body: About the most important race in the country Fellow American, Pennsylvania could be home to the MOST IMPORTANT Senate race in the entire country this year, and Mark Levin is taking notice. Conservatives like Levin know that if we want ANY SHOT at defeating the Washington Swamp, we MUST support outsider candidate Dave McCormick against career politician Bob Casey. Control of the United States Senate for DECADES to come could LITERALLY come down to who wins this race. 99% of people will ignore this email - will you be the 1% that steps up and supports Dave McCormick? PATRIOT: CONTRIBUTION STATUS: PENDING DEADLINE: 11:59 PM ****************************************************************************************************** Thank you, NRSC HQ ****************************************************************************************************** | Paid for by the NRSC. name: Bob Casey
subject: To-do
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2604%2E552475%2EAJuuAM)
Hi Peter -- my campaign manager, Tiernan, just showed me her to-do list. With more and more to get done each day as our campaign kicks into high gear, I wanted to help her out by reaching out to our top supporters.
[**Will you help make sure our campaign can do everything necessary to compete with my mega-millionaire opponent by chipping in $5 or any amount today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240406-2?refcode=em20240406-2&refcode2=2604_552475_AJuuAM&akid=2604%2E552475%2EAJuuAM)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240406-2?refcode=em20240406-2&refcode2=2604_552475_AJuuAM&akid=2604%2E552475%2EAJuuAM)
This is the toughest election of my career, and we’re almost certain to see hundreds of millions of dollars spent in Pennsylvania. My opponent is blanketing the Commonwealth with a seven-figure ad buy, and we’re fighting back with television ads of our own.
The only way we’ll be able to execute every part of our campaign plan, and keep the GOP from buying this Senate seat, is with your help.
[**If you can, chip in any amount so we can keep our ads on the air, campaign as hard as possible in every corner of the Commonwealth, and win this thing.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240406-2?refcode=em20240406-2&refcode2=2604_552475_AJuuAM&akid=2604%2E552475%2EAJuuAM)
Thank you, Peter, for all you do.
With gratitude,
Bob Casey

name: COURIER
subject: What happens when Fox News Attacks
body:
Here’s what happens when Fox News attacks me

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82518099/465528772/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjUxNjgyNDQtM2RmNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZTBFqsbvZYby5AifGUEJ5wcfHv9bQ8mvkz8iu-gCm_A=&emci=9656693d-3df4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=25168244-3df4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=14016711)
Hey, Peter, it’s Tara McGowan, Founder and Publisher of COURIER. In a moment, I’ll share a personal story about what happened when Fox News attacked COURIER, [**but if you already know you’re ready to do your part to hold Fox News accountable for spreading lies and hate in our communities, please consider donating $15 right now. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82518100/465528773/-593472309?refcode=20240406-EM-TaraFoxNews&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjUxNjgyNDQtM2RmNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZTBFqsbvZYby5AifGUEJ5wcfHv9bQ8mvkz8iu-gCm_A=)
Recently, we told you about how Fox News published an attack on COURIER, me, and our local newsrooms. The “report” was rife with wild conspiracy theories, insinuations, and ad hominem attacks. You know, typical Fox News stuff.
Of course, we know what happens at Fox News doesn’t stay there. Fox is a super-spreader of right-wing misinformation. When they attack, right-wing influencers and media amplify them throughout the right-wing ecosystem.
**Inevitably, those attacks become very personal and, in some cases, downright scary. Take a look for yourself at a couple of the messages/social media mentions I’ve received in the last couple of days:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82518101/465528774/-593472309?refcode=20240406-EM-TaraFoxNews&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjUxNjgyNDQtM2RmNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZTBFqsbvZYby5AifGUEJ5wcfHv9bQ8mvkz8iu-gCm_A=)
Peter, I’ll be honest: it’s **_not great_** to have your social media feed taken over by strangers tweeting vaguely menacing things at you.
But, you know what, I can take it. Why? We founded COURIER to give communities a trustworthy local news alternative to right-wing bad actors like Fox News. I’ve always known they’d come at us with everything they have to try and stop us because it’s such a critical mission.
**I promise you COURIER will never back down in the face of Fox’s or anyone else’s attacks. We know how important it is to protect democracy from right-wing misinformation right now. **
So you don’t need to worry about us. But _**everyone**_ should be worried about how bad actors like Fox News are causing division and hate to spread in our communities.
And that’s why I’m writing to ask for your support today.
[_**So, Peter, let’s show Fox News that we’re ready for a fight. Can you pitch in $15 to help us continue to fight back against right-wing misinformation factories like Fox News?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82518102/465528775/-593472309?refcode=20240406-EM-TaraFoxNews&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjUxNjgyNDQtM2RmNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZTBFqsbvZYby5AifGUEJ5wcfHv9bQ8mvkz8iu-gCm_A=)
Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | Thank you so much,
Tara McGowan

clean_body: Here’s what happens when Fox News attacks me Hey, Peter, it’s Tara McGowan, Founder and Publisher of COURIER. In a moment, I’ll share a personal story about what happened when Fox News attacked COURIER, = Recently, we told you about how Fox News published an attack on COURIER, me, and our local newsrooms. The “report” was rife with wild conspiracy theories, insinuations, and ad hominem attacks. You know, typical Fox News stuff. Of course, we know what happens at Fox News doesn’t stay there. Fox is a super-spreader of right-wing misinformation. When they attack, right-wing influencers and media amplify them throughout the right-wing ecosystem. Inevitably, those attacks become very personal and, in some cases, downright scary. Take a look for yourself at a couple of the messages/social media mentions I’ve received in the last couple of days: = Peter, I’ll be honest: it’s not great to have your social media feed taken over by strangers tweeting vaguely menacing things at you. But, you know what, I can take it. Why? We founded COURIER to give communities a trustworthy local news alternative to right-wing bad actors like Fox News. I’ve always known they’d come at us with everything they have to try and stop us because it’s such a critical mission. I promise you COURIER will never back down in the face of Fox’s or anyone else’s attacks. We know how important it is to protect democracy from right-wing misinformation right now. So you don’t need to worry about us. But everyone should be worried about how bad actors like Fox News are causing division and hate to spread in our communities. And that’s why I’m writing to ask for your support today. = Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- Thank you so much, Tara McGowan Founder & Publisher COURIER Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

body:
| As soon as I got this update, I knew I needed to share it with you immediately, folks:

**FIRST:** With polls showing me locked neck and neck with my GOP opponent, I was officially named the most vulnerable woman in the Senate.

**THEN:** Republicans zeroed in on my seat in Nevada as the one they need to flip to retake Senate control – and dark money groups like the Koch network began spending MILLIONS to defeat me.

**NOW: We just launched brand new TV ads to fight back against the GOP** and reach voters in every corner of Nevada with our message!

But getting these ads in front of voters is expensive. If we fall short of our fundraising goals, these ads will go dark, and we'll cede the airwaves to the GOP.

Folks, the only way that I can take on the GOP and their megadonor allies is with the grassroots support of people like you. **So, I'm counting on you to chip in whatever you can spare today to keep our new ads on the air.**

[_**Please, I'm humbly asking: Will you give $5 or more to my campaign and Fight for Progress right now to help keep our new TV ads on the air, win in Nevada, and defend the Senate for Democrats?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82518324/465529507/1736145590?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-04-06_1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJjYjY2ZjdlLTNkZjQtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Gp3OhLPw7lvaroFd_XPTOmd6zej0wHaUBljhMXXZpk4=)

clean_body: | As soon as I got this update, I knew I needed to share it with you immediately, folks: FIRST: With polls showing me locked neck and neck with my GOP opponent, I was officially named the most vulnerable woman in the Senate. THEN: Republicans zeroed in on my seat in Nevada as the one they need to flip to retake Senate control – and dark money groups like the Koch network began spending MILLIONS to defeat me. NOW: We just launched brand new TV ads to fight back against the GOP and reach voters in every corner of Nevada with our message! But getting these ads in front of voters is expensive. If we fall short of our fundraising goals, these ads will go dark, and we'll cede the airwaves to the GOP. Folks, the only way that I can take on the GOP and their megadonor allies is with the grassroots support of people like you. So, I'm counting on you to chip in whatever you can spare today to keep our new ads on the air. = | = | = | = | = | = I'm so grateful for your support. | **HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS **
The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19).

SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing.

Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and [download applications](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=62eeb9d0d7&e=a088917f89). Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email [disastercustomerservice@sba.gov](mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov) for more information on SBA disaster assistance.
---
|
---
| **SAFE SHELTERING RESOURCES** Sheltering in place can be difficult for anyone, and some of our neighbors might not be safe due to violence at home. If you or someone you know needs help, please visit [Safe Connections](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=3d557648d2&e=a088917f89) or call _314-531-2003_.

You can also contact [ALIVE](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=cdf5294928&e=a088917f89) at _314-993-2777_.

| **RX OUTREACH EXPANDS ELIGIBILITY **
Below is a memo from a trusted non-profit:

As a non-profit, mail-order pharmacy, Rx Outreach is uniquely positioned to help stop the spread of COVID-19 for people who are quarantined and those who may be afraid to travel outside of their homes to the clinic or pharmacy.

Rx Outreach lifted its income guidelines during this crisis so that **anyone, regardless of income, can participate in their program.**

Rx Outreach medication prices are generally 70-80% below retail and are transparent. Shipping is free.

---
|
---
| **LOW-COST INSULIN** Before COVID-19 insulin users were having a difficult time affording medication due to the tripling of the cost over the last decade. In the wake of COVID-19, it has become even more difficult for those who rely on insulin to afford the inflated cost. Eli Lilly and Company has introduced a program to purchase Basaglar insulin at significant cost savings. Please call Lilly Diabetes Solution Center at 833-808-1234 between 9 am and 9 pm, M-F to see if you qualify for these savings. More information can be found at the [Eli Lilly and Co. Website](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=88fa14ef43&e=a088917f89).

name: 2024 Election Polling
subject: will you vote this November?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
polling data shows a neck-and-neck race:
| | |
---
Friend, we've got good news and bad news: The Florida Supreme Court just ruled to keep abortion rights on the ballot this November, but they also ruled to allow Ron DeSantis’ 6-week ban. **That means that this ballot initiative is our chance to overturn DeSantis' extreme ban and restore our reproductive freedom.**
The tides are changing in Florida. And this ballot initiative has a _very_ good chance of passing. Recent polling shows that 62% of voters, including a majority of Republicans, support passing it. And a massive 75% of voters oppose the extreme six-week ban that will take effect on May 1.
This is what a powerful grassroots movement can accomplish._And that's exactly what we need to defeat Rick Scott and stop him from passing a nationwide ban on abortions._
Listen, Rick Scott wants you to believe that our home is a red state. But that couldn't be further from the truth. More and more of us are rejecting his far-right agenda every day. And polling data shows that this race is neck and neck.
But now, Rick Scott is spending millions to lie about his record and launch baseless attacks against his opponent, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell.******So we need to know if we can count on reliable voters like you to have Debbie's back this fall.********[So please, with all eyes on Florida, will you commit to voting this fall? Debbie is counting on 25,000 people to sign on before 11:59 p.m. tonight, so please add your name now:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82518487/465530107/179492461?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1054-su-nd&refcode=jtk1054-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmQzZjBlMTYtM2VmNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M6nelT3xkltVQzjOpN_geBptEzZyl8qSGK3JH0Uaytc=&emci=67ec54d8-82f2-ee11-aaf0-002248089b1e&emdi=2d3f0e16-3ef4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=3969733)**

name: Marco Rubio
subject: A roll of aluminum foil
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rubio Victory Committee
body:
I can’t explain how grateful I am that you chose to read this email. Only about 30-40% of folks open these messages, and look I get it – there are a lot of political emails being sent these days.

| |
---
| | | Friend,

I can't explain how grateful I am that you chose to read this email. Only about 30-40% of folks open these messages, and look I get it - there are a lot of political emails being sent these days.

Unfortunately, I rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to stay in touch with conservatives like you.

**With that being said, could you do me the simple favor of just reading this all the way through to the end?** If you get to the end and still don't think you have the power to make a difference, then I just want to thank you for your time.

While roughly 35% of supporters open these messages, only an average of 1% of supporters will step up to donate, which makes it difficult since I rely on Americans like you receiving this message to hit my fundraising goals.

I refuse to rely on billionaires and Wall Street executives for money. I want our conservative values fueled by the people who believe in them most - you and me.

**And you know what?** If everyone who opened this email gave just $1 - __one single dollar__ - we'd be able to hit all of our goals.
---

Growing up, my mom worked at a factory that made aluminum chairs and my father was a bartender. Their wages combined with their hard work allowed for them to buy a home and live in a good community.

**I 'm trying to restore America to the time when it wasn't unusual that a factory worker and a bartender could afford a home. I'd appreciate it if you could go above and beyond and donate the price of a roll of aluminum foil! [Democrats rely on billionaire megadonors who give thousands at a time. I rely on folks like you, who can give $3, $9, or even $18.25 to reach my goals.](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8c941e707fb64789935d0118c902fc29&_e=gpP-BEsACwJBeo1m65B-tBZuwLjURr6UosSrevEHAvFE3hHWfpLV_lSAgpYExTEDpzulRN_Pug2vhJuGFZUC4drNQsG2jS3xScANY_SeepYyakLqfRoThNN_KudG34QwElsqlF1BTVCb1LkABYJEFlPcnoKyh6HiVzVZqg7B-VWjyTYKhINoD_Y1Zxa2gTstTbnyYxzcaTs2WBmcPe0CfyiCrkwZwTlOiYaT-idFOUkcezrFUP7q2LZxhqZm38XSe1ne7UHeJ6wz25IU7P8NXEonQu8cUoS6R6OaSNufIs6rOplaumgmHDXm-tdoq2QX7dKzWOJ_9M_rQjfiMm6xq7jl8SIY-ewE_ZYoChxKcPfDcTvncCMacEmEBZutj572_3VEYteiNHp96sS2vv375v3uzNrLZjeo8KyVOlrgTRFlj_JCW609yJb_za-iLeEF "Democrats rely on billionaire megadonors who give thousands at a time. _Democrats hope I give up on you and stop sending these emails.

They also hope you stop reading these emails.

They'd love it if we both give up on our conservative values altogether._

_**I won 't give up on you, and I hope you won't quit on me or our shared values either.**_ I know a lot of folks are going to ignore this, but I need patriots like you to see what's at stake. If you think you're better off than you were 5 years ago, then I understand why you don't want to donate today.

But if you think we need to get this country back on track and restore the American Dream, please donate whatever you can before midnight.
---

clean_body: I can’t explain how grateful I am that you chose to read this email. Only about 30-40% of folks open these messages, and look I get it – there are a lot of political emails being sent these days. | | | | | Friend, I can't explain how grateful I am that you chose to read this email. Only about 30-40% of folks open these messages, and look I get it - there are a lot of political emails being sent these days. Unfortunately, I rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to stay in touch with conservatives like you. With that being said, could you do me the simple favor of just reading this all the way through to the end? If you get to the end and still don't think you have the power to make a difference, then I just want to thank you for your time. While roughly 35% of supporters open these messages, only an average of 1% of supporters will step up to donate, which makes it difficult since I rely on Americans like you receiving this message to hit my fundraising goals. I refuse to rely on billionaires and Wall Street executives for money. I want our conservative values fueled by the people who believe in them most - you and me. And you know what? If everyone who opened this email gave just $1 - one single dollar - we'd be able to hit all of our goals. | | "DONATE $1 >>" | | "DONATE WHATEVER YOU CAN >>" Growing up, my mom worked at a factory that made aluminum chairs and my father was a bartender. Their wages combined with their hard work allowed for them to buy a home and live in a good community. I 'm trying to restore America to the time when it wasn't unusual that a factory worker and a bartender could afford a home. I'd appreciate it if you could go above and beyond and donate the price of a roll of aluminum foil! "Democrats rely on billionaire megadonors who give thousands at a time. I rely on folks like you, who can give $3, $9, or even $18.25 to reach my goals." | | "CHIP IN THE PRICE OF ALUMINUM FOIL >>" Democrats hope I give up on you and stop sending these emails. They also hope you stop reading these emails. They'd love it if we both give up on our conservative values altogether. I won 't give up on you, and I hope you won't quit on me or our shared values either. I know a lot of folks are going to ignore this, but I need patriots like you to see what's at stake. If you think you're better off than you were 5 years ago, then I understand why you don't want to donate today. But if you think we need to get this country back on track and restore the American Dream, please donate whatever you can before midnight. | | "DONATE TODAY" | Marco Rubio | | | "Marco Rubio Endorses Young Kim" | "JOIN MARCO!" | Paid for by Rubio Victory Committee 1101 30th St. NW #125 Washington, DC 20007 The appearance of U.S. Department of Defense (DoD) visual information does not imply or constitute DoD endorsement.
