_— Democracy Docket, April 1, 2024_
* * *
_WASHINGTON, D.C. — An Arizona judge has dismissed yet another legal challenge to the state’s 2022 election results, this time issuing sanctions and calling the challenge “meritless” and “bad faith.”_ _The order issued today dismisses a pair of lawsuits brought by right-wing lawyer Ryan Heath on behalf of failed Republican Arizona attorney general candidate Abraham Hamadeh, Cochise County Supervisor Tom Crosby (R) and “Independent” voter David Mast seeking to decertify the results of the 2022 general election in Arizona. _ _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82519791/465535305/-1974965524?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240406_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWFmZDg3ZTItNDBmNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BJMYj8S9qDLcb_fZ5C94IBIh7F4NnLid-l6VwWuwRG4=)

This just in: a judge here in Arizona dismissed a challenge to the 2022 election results brought forward by election denier, failed AG candidate, and current AZ-08 candidate Abe Hamadeh.
The judge called the challenge to decertify the results of the 2022 general election “meritless,” and “bad faith.” This challenge would’ve removed AG Mayes from office and decertify the elections of both Governor Hobbs and AG Mayes.
Not only was the case dismissed but the court also _SANCTIONED_ both Abe Hamadeh and his legal team, claiming that “preponderance of the evidence demonstrates the existence of bad faith in the filing of this “election challenge...””

clean_body: | = | | Court Sanctions Election Deniers and Dismisses Challenge to Arizona’s 2022 Election Results — Democracy Docket, April 1, 2024 WASHINGTON, D.C. — An Arizona judge has dismissed yet another legal challenge to the state’s 2022 election results, this time issuing sanctions and calling the challenge “meritless” and “bad faith.” The order issued today dismisses a pair of lawsuits brought by right-wing lawyer Ryan Heath on behalf of failed Republican Arizona attorney general candidate Abraham Hamadeh, Cochise County Supervisor Tom Crosby (R) and “Independent” voter David Mast seeking to decertify the results of the 2022 general election in Arizona. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = This just in: a judge here in Arizona dismissed a challenge to the 2022 election results brought forward by election denier, failed AG candidate, and current AZ-08 candidate Abe Hamadeh. The judge called the challenge to decertify the results of the 2022 general election “meritless,” and “bad faith.” This challenge would’ve removed AG Mayes from office and decertify the elections of both Governor Hobbs and AG Mayes. Not only was the case dismissed but the court also SANCTIONED both Abe Hamadeh and his legal team, claiming that “preponderance of the evidence demonstrates the existence of bad faith in the filing of this “election challenge...”” = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Our entire democracy is at stake, folks. name: Jim Banks
subject: My Heart Is In My Throat :
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Banks for Senate
body:
|
---
Friend, I'm afraid I have _BAD news_. Before I reach out to Trump and J.D. Vance can you step in?

**Here's the situation:** Monday was my first major fundraising deadline of election year, and my finance team just broke the news to me: **we were 19 donations short.**

This would have been a huge blow, but we've found a way to [**extend the deadline by another 12 hours through this special donation link.**](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=5a3c240b38f74198a50ad1e6ae298410&_e=IpxtFiIE1RRYZ82zoVP8g_T2BXO9F8uMvy-si3YbKnqiNeDMVWDPN3DkuW223WWNeJW6MyBfyNrmpeKvR_DSbRKx48tDxjVwHnkCNw-bqdiwu1HiMK9OmKObEM-l5kCdBzIUYP2hbS8w4qs_AYvaR2tArZGJYFJNi9nNCZyHLnqaz4JJCsk5UdwDdGibKrnvn5ppQdy-Jq9YP79hRmteNXeG2B6To6QTyCswAQU-NwPvIAYD6YAbuh7SXjx8Uks0WUPiNoWcqu8Kx-l3QUm2h4bJAYrWgZBZufTQYv1_WpVJacYZSsWRMYFGao5RuBzQ)

While it's impossible to add anything more to my federally mandated report...we have one more chance to make our internal goal and get back on track.

So, as a personal favor to me -- [**will you stop what you're doing and make a special, one-time donation?**](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=5a3c240b38f74198a50ad1e6ae298410&_e=IpxtFiIE1RRYZ82zoVP8g_T2BXO9F8uMvy-si3YbKnqiNeDMVWDPN3DkuW223WWNeJW6MyBfyNrmpeKvR_DSbRKx48tDxjVwHnkCNw-bqdiwu1HiMK9OmKObEM-l5kCdBzIUYP2hbS8w4qs_AYvaR2tArZGJYFJNi9nNCZyHLnqgvC5Gkh74zQ7eX3i9AV98PxYe8dQMwTMgw0-UnrKmjyZPYoATDpvzzYNIQSKGbOr2RQPpl_TwYtaO39VgxAQAqjVwsVzgpbnvK1S0-1IrlobsZKh7Ev6bErssVnq6TJK0_ehbouztKzGDxSqEjPeH) Even it it's only $5...it will be the difference between completing our mission and surrendering.

I know firsthand from my time on the ground in Afghanistan: **getting the seemingly little things right matters when you're up against a determined enemy.**

My campaign, though under most people's radar right now, will be pivotal in determining who has the Senate majority, and our country is depending on your help to deliver us a victory. The Democrats know this and are already preparing to spend millions to defeat me.

[**Please, stand with me before 11:59PM.**](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=5a3c240b38f74198a50ad1e6ae298410&_e=IpxtFiIE1RRYZ82zoVP8g_T2BXO9F8uMvy-si3YbKnqiNeDMVWDPN3DkuW223WWNeJW6MyBfyNrmpeKvR_DSbRKx48tDxjVwHnkCNw-bqdiwu1HiMK9OmKObEM-l5kCdBzIUYP2hbS8w4qs_AYvaR2tArZGJYFJNi9nNCZyHLnrc4UMNXRDLXRRxaO6MWqQ2RHXFWbE5ErGsYewtpWMpBAQPqabDBZfwTR9jQM7TTmNlq5W7Cu4Trpo2yFL-D9NJ_DYHT3vKFdiD-bqCs7fZdLijHEkVCtYyglUOhBff8DZJIXm3K05c2h5qvj_Yaat5)

-Jim Banks

| Paid for by Banks for Senate

| | A Special Endorsement Announcement
---
| | This endorsement takes on special meaning for Dom Jones personally as it is truly a testament to women uplifting women.
---
| |
---
| | DPOC Chairwoman EndorsesDom Jones"California Assembly Candidate Dom Jones believes in Democracy. She believes in a woman’s right to choose. As a small business owner, Dom is an American success story. She is a problem solver. Dom Jones has my unequivocal support and endorsement for the 72nd Assembly District seat. - Ada Briceño, Chair, Democratic Party of Orange County." -Ada BricenoChairwoman of The Democratic Party of Orange County-
---
| | A Personal Note from Dom Jones: Reflecting On Ada Briceño's Endorsement
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| |
### Dear Friends & Companions,
###
It is with immense gratitude and heartfelt appreciation that I write to you today. I am deeply honored to receive the endorsement and unwavering support of Ada Briceño, Chairwoman of The Democratic Party of Orange County, for my candidacy in the 72nd Assembly District. Ada's endorsement holds profound significance for me, as a testament to friendship, strength and unity of women in leadership. Over the first two years of my political journey, Ada has been a guiding light—a mentor who exemplifies the qualities of a strong, hardworking woman leading with both compassion and grace. Her leadership and mentorship have been instrumental in shaping me into the leader I strive to be. Ada has not only shown me how to navigate the complexities of public service but has also demonstrated the importance of women supporting and uplifting each other in our shared pursuit of progress and equality. Ada's endorsement underscores the critical role women play in creating spaces for other women to thrive. Her commitment to democracy, advocacy for women's rights, and dedication to community service are qualities that have inspired me. As I embark on this journey into public service, Ada's support and guidance will remain close to my heart. I am committed to carrying forward the values she has shared with me—values of inclusivity, integrity, and resilience. Together, we must continue to encourage more women to step into leadership roles, harnessing our collective power to drive meaningful change and create a more equitable society. Let us heed the call to action and work together to build a future where women are not only represented but celebrated in every sphere of influence. Ada's endorsement serves as a poignant reminder that when women support one another, incredible things happen. In closing, I want to express my deepest gratitude to Ada Briceño for her enduring support, wisdom, and dedication to community leadership. Her example fuels my passion to serve and inspires me to strive for excellence every day. Together, let us rise as women leaders, united in purpose and driven by our shared commitment to a brighter tomorrow. With unwavering determination, Dom Jones
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| |
### MORE ANNOUCEMENTS:
---
| | In the spirit of women supporting women, Dom Jones supports and endorses an important organization of women who continue to show that women's voices have tremendous power to move us forward!Introducing:
---
| |
---
| | "We are a feminist organization and community prioritizing intersectionality, equality, and diversity."-The Feminist Uprising-
---
| |
---
| | "I am immensely proud of the visionary leadership demonstrated by Co-Founders Ashlie Brady and Jennifer Cohen. These remarkable women have pioneered an organization dedicated to uplifting women and communities, striving to elevate acceptance and dignity for all individuals within our communities, not only here in California but throughout our nation. Their work exemplifies true unity in action. That is why I wholeheartedly endorse The Feminist Uprising as one of the next transformative steps in our ongoing movement towards equality and justice. This organization embodies the principles and values essential for advancing a more inclusive and equitable society. Together, let us rally behind The Feminist Uprising and champion their efforts to empower and uplift women across the nation."-Dom Jones-

Together, let us rally behind The Feminist Uprising and champion their efforts to empower and uplift women across the nation."-Dom Jones- | | | | | | | | AS WOMEN HAVE FOUGHT IN HISTORY FOR LIBERATION... | | | | | | ...SO DO THEIR DESCENDANTS CONTINUE THIS NOBLE FIGHT TODAY. | | | | | | | | | | | | MORE ANNOUCEMENTS: | | Edify Yourself Now: Enjoy The Recorded Presentation on the Israel-Palestine Crisis, Now Available on YouTube. It’s never been more important that we have a pro-choice majority in Congress to stop the assault on reproductive rights.

name: No More Weapons to Israel via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Bernie - "Israel has killed more than 200 aid workers in 6 months. That's not an accident."
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis, while the
Biden administration takes the unconscionable step of sending 3,800 more
bombs to Israel — even after Netanyahu’s war has killed over 30,000
Palestinian civilians and 200 aid workers — Bernie continues to call for
end to U.S. support for this horrific conflict, like he did on MSNBC this
week:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16545?t=1011&akid=5736%2E5885482%2EPPO9m5 ][IMG]

How can the Biden administration justify sending more bombs to Israel,
when U.S. bombs have already killed so many civilians in Gaza? It can’t be
justified and we must amplify our calls alongside Bernie to end U.S.
support for this war.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16546?source=email-20240406&t=1012&akid=5736%2E5885482%2EPPO9m5 ]Stand with Bernie: No more weapons and not another nickel to support
Netanyahu’s atrocities in Gaza.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16546?source=email-20240406&t=1013&akid=5736%2E5885482%2EPPO9m5 ]ADD YOUR NAME

7 World Central Kitchen aid workers were killed by the Israeli military
this week. The head of the aid group, José Andrés, says it was a direct
targeted attack. And Bernie is rebuking Netanyahu’s claim that the attacks
on aid workers was an accident.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16545?t=1014&akid=5736%2E5885482%2EPPO9m5 ][IMG]

Even some of Biden’s closest allies in the Senate are calling for an end
to unconditional aid to Israel for the first time ever. But Biden doesn’t
seem to be getting the message. He hasn’t gotten the message from
Democratic voters either — who support an end to U.S. complicity in this
conflict.

“The polling is very clear: The Democratic base wants to stop funding
Netanyahu’s war machine,” Bernie said in his MSNBC interview. If Biden
doesn’t change his morally bankrupt policies in Gaza, more civilians and
aid workers will die, and he’s risking losing the election in November to
Trump.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16546?source=email-20240406&t=1015&akid=5736%2E5885482%2EPPO9m5 ]Add your name: Tell Biden that more weapons and funding for Israel is
unacceptable and immoral. His policies on Gaza must change!

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=email-20240406.UBiKcv&t=1008&akid=5736%2E5885482%2EPPO9m5 ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a

clean_body: This email reveals what the GOP is saying about California [!!] | = | Hey there — we wanted to share with you this recent email that National Republicans just sent about our U.S. Senate race here in California: = = Team — National Republicans are saying that Democrat Adam Schiff is in a “DEAD HEAT” with Republican Steve Garvey for our U.S. Senate seat here. They are even saying that this is the first time in “30 YEARS” that they feel they have a shot at flipping a Senate seat here from blue to red. If Democrats lose a Senate seat in California, our hopes of keeping our U.S. Senate Majority would go up in smoke. Guaranteed. We know that California tends to go blue in the Presidential contest, but with the stakes so high, we can’t take anything for granted in this race. = = = = = = Thank you so much for helping us prepare for every eventuality here. \- CADEM Rapid Response Team | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. # [#] Hi there,

I have been opposed to New York’s outrageous Congestion Tax from the very beginning of the planning process for this anti-environment, pro-traffic measure. That’s why I was so disappointed last week to see the New York MTA voted to implement a $15 Congestion Tax starting in just a few months.

This Congestion Tax is nothing more than a blatant cash grab that directly harms our Jersey workers and commuters. Will you sign on today to stand with me against the MTA’s Congestion Tax? [https://go.josh4congress.com/a/jg-congestion-tax-2404]

SIGN ON [https://go.josh4congress.com/a/jg-congestion-tax-2404]

I won’t stand by while our neighbors across the river vote to increase taxes on New Jersey commuters and spread cancer-causing pollutants to our communities. Please sign on to our petition today to tell the MTA to address our shared transit issues responsibly. [https://go.josh4congress.com/a/jg-congestion-tax-2404]

Thank you,

Josh Gottheimer
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. If you'd like to support his campaign click here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-footer-2020?amount=$25&refcode=footer2020] , if you'd like to unsubscribe click here. **20,323,155.** That's how many donations Joe Biden received during the 2020 campaign. **20,682** \-- Our margin of victory over Trump in Wisconsin in 2020. **80,555** \-- Our margin in Pennsylvania. **10,457** \-- Our margin in Arizona. The point is, in a race as close as the last election, every donation mattered. The early ones paved the way to our success, and the later ones sealed the win. We don't need to receive 20,323,155 donations all at once if we're going to win again. But we do need people who know how important this race is to donate what they can, when they can along the way. body:
General Mike Flynn (Retired) served as the National Security Advisor under President Donald J. Trump. General Flynn served for more than 33 years in the United States military. General Flynn is currently the Chairman of “America’s Future” and is also a bestselling author.

| **Chris Farrell's On Watch Podcast**
******Lt. Gen. Mike Flynn: Deliver the Truth, Whatever the Cost

[](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67767&L=31854&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9WWWJqRVRLaEZHdz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1hY3Rpb24rYWxlcnQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=029e7ced9177d78ccbad291a09e400fdbed7b5181041aa87312ebdfca975a648)**
General Mike Flynn (Retired) served as the National Security Advisor under President Donald J. Trump. General Flynn served for more than 33 years in the United States military. General Flynn is currently the Chairman of “America’s Future” and is also a bestselling author.

Visit the website for General Flynn’s new documentary, “Flynn: Deliver the Truth, Whatever the Cost”: [https://www.flynnmovie.com/](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67767&L=31855&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmx5bm5tb3ZpZS5jb20vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWFjdGlvbithbGVydCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=a9e251feb39f97bdcfaab7177628def46552fe1da651c799845bb8375237b660)

Friend, Republicans have spent years scheming to destroy Social Security. **And now, Trump's far-right majority on the Supreme Court could be preparing to OVERTURN this critical legislation.**
Over the past 88 years, Social Security has helped hundreds of millions of Americans pay their bills and retire with dignity. Today, nearly 67 million people receive benefits — _that's 1 in every 5 Americans!_
Social Security is, without a doubt, one of the most important — and popular — pieces of legislation ever passed. **But now, the future of this vital program rests in the hands of far-right radicals on the Supreme Court. **
These extremists have already made it clear they have no respect for precedent or the will of the American people. We cannot sit on the sidelines and watch as they strip away our benefits.**We have to make our voices heard NOW. Please, respond before 11:59 p.m. tonight to tell us:**

name: Keith
subject: A looming threat to reproductive freedom
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417 Keith Ellison for Attorney General
body:
Peter, As Minnesota’s chief legal officer, it’s my job to do everything within my power to protect Minnesotans’ constitutional rights. One of those rights in Minnesota is crystal clear: Our state constitution protects the right to abortion and reproductive health care. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82523584/465547700/176777991?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWRkMmE3Mi00ZmY0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sZkdhTcWLMhjysqfHHKp0UR_KvgTGea-3oqOPE0He_8=&emci=1bdd2a72-4ff4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=21dd2a72-4ff4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=11037791)
---
Peter,
As Minnesota’s chief legal officer, it’s my job to do everything within my power to protect Minnesotans’ constitutional rights. One of those rights in Minnesota is crystal clear: Our state constitution protects the right to abortion and reproductive health care.
In a 1995 Minnesota Supreme Court decision in a case known as _Gomez_ , the Court found that the right to privacy in our state’s constitution protects the right to an abortion. For Minnesotans, this has meant that access to abortion care has been guaranteed, even after the U.S. Supreme Court’s _Dobbs_ decision two years ago unleashed chaos across the country.
**After _Dobbs_ , more than one-third of all Americans find abortion care nearly impossible to get. But because of _Gomez_ , Minnesotans still have that freedom. But there is a looming threat.**
A 150-year-old, outdated, misogynist federal law known as the Comstock Act is still on the books. It’s widely considered a dead-letter law, but if invoked, it could be used to restrict access to safe, legal abortions everywhere across the country – including in Minnesota.
We know President Biden is a staunch ally for abortion rights and would never use the Comstock Act to interfere with Americans’ access to reproductive health care. However, we cannot count on Donald Trump’s 6-3 Supreme Court majority, the conservative federal appeals circuits below it, or a future Republican administration to do the same.
Peter, here’s the bottom line: Letting the Comstock Act continue to sit on the books invites mischief from Republicans and conservative special interests that are already attacking our rights and freedoms as we speak.
**Yesterday, I was proud to stand with Senator Tina Smith to call on Congress to repeal the Comstock Act to protect all Minnesotans’ right to a safe and legal abortion.** I will do everything in my power to protect reproductive freedom in Minnesota, but it’s never been more important for all Americans who are with me to raise their voices and be heard.
[**To make it 100% clear that we will not back down, I need to collect 10,000 pro-choice signatures in support of repealing the Comstock Act. Will you add your name right now to be counted?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82523585/465547701/176777991?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWRkMmE3Mi00ZmY0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sZkdhTcWLMhjysqfHHKp0UR_KvgTGea-3oqOPE0He_8=&emci=1bdd2a72-4ff4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=21dd2a72-4ff4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=11037791)

clean_body: Peter, As Minnesota’s chief legal officer, it’s my job to do everything within my power to protect Minnesotans’ constitutional rights. One of those rights in Minnesota is crystal clear: Our state constitution protects the right to abortion and reproductive health care. | Peter, As Minnesota’s chief legal officer, it’s my job to do everything within my power to protect Minnesotans’ constitutional rights. One of those rights in Minnesota is crystal clear: Our state constitution protects the right to abortion and reproductive health care. In a 1995 Minnesota Supreme Court decision in a case known as Gomez , the Court found that the right to privacy in our state’s constitution protects the right to an abortion. For Minnesotans, this has meant that access to abortion care has been guaranteed, even after the U.S. Supreme Court’s Dobbs decision two years ago unleashed chaos across the country. After Dobbs , more than one-third of all Americans find abortion care nearly impossible to get. But because of Gomez , Minnesotans still have that freedom. But there is a looming threat. A 150-year-old, outdated, misogynist federal law known as the Comstock Act is still on the books. It’s widely considered a dead-letter law, but if invoked, it could be used to restrict access to safe, legal abortions everywhere across the country – including in Minnesota. We know President Biden is a staunch ally for abortion rights and would never use the Comstock Act to interfere with Americans’ access to reproductive health care. However, we cannot count on Donald Trump’s 6-3 Supreme Court majority, the conservative federal appeals circuits below it, or a future Republican administration to do the same. Peter, here’s the bottom line: Letting the Comstock Act continue to sit on the books invites mischief from Republicans and conservative special interests that are already attacking our rights and freedoms as we speak. Yesterday, I was proud to stand with Senator Tina Smith to call on Congress to repeal the Comstock Act to protect all Minnesotans’ right to a safe and legal abortion. I will do everything in my power to protect reproductive freedom in Minnesota, but it’s never been more important for all Americans who are with me to raise their voices and be heard. Thank you, Keith Ellison | Prepared and paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417 Keith Ellison for Attorney General PO Box 17224 Minneapolis, MN 55417 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . name: Tamie Wilson
subject: The new GOP agenda: repeal women’s voting
body:
| |
---
They're leading us a century backward to keep women under their control. | [View in browser](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTc4OTUxODk5NDM1NTEzODEsXCJyXCI6MTE3ODk1Mjg0MTQ1NTIyNTA1fSIsInMiOiIwZmYyNjg3OTRmNDIxOWNmIn0)
| |
---
| [ ](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTc4OTUxODk5NDg3OTQyNjMsXCJyXCI6MTE3ODk1Mjg0MTQ1NTIyNTA1fSIsInMiOiI0OTc5ODVlYzI1N2ZhNjVmIn0)
---
|
---
Friend,

Republicans successfully worked for decades to overturn Roe v. Wade, stacking the courts with Christian nationalist judges and eventually packing the Supreme Court with enough Justices to deliver the final blow to reproductive rights.

Feeling bullish after their Dobbs victory in 2022, Christian nationalists have now taken over the mainstream of the GOP and are calling the shots as they seek yet even more control over women’s rights and autonomy: **taking away women's right to vote.**

This may seem like a remote, unlikely possibility, but this time around the extremists running the Christian nationalist agenda aren’t trying to hide their intentions. The GOP Gubernatorial nominee in North Carolina has said that women shouldn’t have the right to vote. I have seen several videos of influential right wing men repeating this same rhetoric just last week.

They have hijacked the Christian faith and have given new meanings to Bible scriptures. **We need to take this seriously.** (To top it off, Trump just came out with a brand new grift: selling his own line of Bibles for $59.99! It's reprehensible and truly unbelievable.)

We know they have friends in high places: Jim Jordan, who feigns Christian piety to wield power as a weapon, and House Speaker Mike Johnson—a man who has said that he was appointed by God to act as a “Moses.”

**But where they are leading us isn’t the promised land; it’s a century backward when women were the chattel property of men.**__**[](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTc4OTUxODk5NTUwODU3MjIsXCJyXCI6MTE3ODk1Mjg0MTQ1NTIyNTA1fSIsInMiOiIwN2JmZTcwZjdkOWUwMjUwIn0)
**[](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTc4OTUxODk5NjAzMjg2MDQsXCJyXCI6MTE3ODk1Mjg0MTQ1NTIyNTA1fSIsInMiOiI1M2IzYzdkYjUxYmRkNmYyIn0)
|
---
| [ ](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTc4OTUxODk5NjQ1MjI5MTAsXCJyXCI6MTE3ODk1Mjg0MTQ1NTIyNTA1fSIsInMiOiJmNDAzNDliMTc1M2NhNTZmIn0)
---
|
---
It must really burn Jordan up to have a woman leading the fight to kick him out of Congress—and to be building the strongest grassroots campaign to actually do it this year.**

Jordan is a bully who wants to ban all abortions, restrict access to birth control, and roll back voting rights for women and minorities.** This election, we can defeat extremists like Jim Jordan and send a message that we won’t tolerate this repressive agenda now or EVER!

**[But I need your help to do this. Can you contribute to my campaign so that Jordan and his extremist Christian nationalist friends will be defeated by a strong woman in November?](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTc4OTUxODk5Njg3MTcyMTUsXCJyXCI6MTE3ODk1Mjg0MTQ1NTIyNTA1fSIsInMiOiI5MGJhZGI2MjI1YWU0MDU4In0)**
|
---
| | | [ **_CONTRIBUTE_** ](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTc4OTUxODk5NzM5NjAwOTcsXCJyXCI6MTE3ODk1Mjg0MTQ1NTIyNTA1fSIsInMiOiJiMWQ1MTQyM2JjNjJmOGJiIn0)
---
|
---
Thank you! Together, we can fight hard and WIN against Jordan and his right wing allies trying to roll back our rights._

-Tamie_****
|

name: Andrei Cherny
subject: One year ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrei for Arizona** | Andrei Cherny is a former member of the U
body:
One year ago, I announced my campaign for Congress. Now we’re on the verge of the most important months of the campaign. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82523710/465548259/41388607?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240406_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzhjNGUxN2UtNTBmNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VogGC5DEMymOExBMirqkaL4Ra2CDhnQdK8-YU7COGwQ=)
---
Peter, As the proverb goes, _“a journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.”_ Exactly one year ago today, our campaign took that first step. Since then, I’ve literally walked more than 1,000 miles, knocked on thousands of doors, and worn out two pairs of shoes. [Before I share some reflections, I want to ask you to make a special anniversary contribution to fuel our campaign’s work over the next months. Defeating my opponent, David Schweikert, will be a challenge, but I know it’s one we can accomplish if we work together.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82523711/465548260/-761994045?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240406_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzhjNGUxN2UtNTBmNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VogGC5DEMymOExBMirqkaL4Ra2CDhnQdK8-YU7COGwQ=) Launching my campaign to represent AZ-01 one year ago today was not a decision I made easily or took lightly, but I did it hoping there would be folks who would join me and fight for the future of our democracy. **I have been so grateful and moved in this journey to know that, at every step, I have not walked alone.** Because of the helping hand of thousands of people, our grassroots movement has shattered all expectations and done what no other Congressional campaign in America and no other congressional campaign in Arizona history has been able to do — all thanks to your support, Peter. As the grandson of four Holocaust survivors and son of refugees from communism, democracy and freedom aren’t abstract to me, they’ve always been real. My opponent in this campaign sees the world differently. clean_body: One year ago, I announced my campaign for Congress. Now we’re on the verge of the most important months of the campaign. | = Peter, As the proverb goes, “a journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.” Exactly one year ago today, our campaign took that first step. Since then, I’ve literally walked more than 1,000 miles, knocked on thousands of doors, and worn out two pairs of shoes. = Launching my campaign to represent AZ-01 one year ago today was not a decision I made easily or took lightly, but I did it hoping there would be folks who would join me and fight for the future of our democracy. I have been so grateful and moved in this journey to know that, at every step, I have not walked alone. Because of the helping hand of thousands of people, our grassroots movement has shattered all expectations and done what no other Congressional campaign in America and no other congressional campaign in Arizona history has been able to do — all thanks to your support, Peter. As the grandson of four Holocaust survivors and son of refugees from communism, democracy and freedom aren’t abstract to me, they’ve always been real. My opponent in this campaign sees the world differently. Congressman David Schweikert tried to overturn the election on January 6th, calls climate change “folklore,” and is one of only five people in the history of the United States to be unanimously reprimanded by both parties for his ethics violations. = = I have been a businessperson, a prosecutor, and served in uniform. My wife, Stephanie, and I are raising our two kids in this community we have called home for two decades. I know we can do better. AZ-01 is the battleground district in the battleground state of 2024 — and we are now on the verge of the most important months of the campaign. All eyes are on Arizona this year with the presidential and senate elections happening, and you can bet Donald Trump himself will be paying special attention to our race, doing whatever he can to help Schweikert win. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = It means so much to have you standing alongside me in this fight. body:
How will you protect our planet this month?

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82523935/465549256/1328794144?refcode=ea.595d4ff2-50f4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ms=ea.595d4ff2-50f4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU5NWQ0ZmYyLTUwZjQtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RkjLnvo_NT0fJNl2yqvO7uXCsvdF8gPtHOmRt-pjSP8=&emci=7032cd95-6ff3-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=595d4ff2-50f4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=4823105)
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82523936/465549257/927500205?refcode=ea.595d4ff2-50f4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ms=ea.595d4ff2-50f4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU5NWQ0ZmYyLTUwZjQtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RkjLnvo_NT0fJNl2yqvO7uXCsvdF8gPtHOmRt-pjSP8=&emci=7032cd95-6ff3-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=595d4ff2-50f4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=4823105) Hey there, it’s Jane Fonda. Earth Month always sparks a bit of reflection for me. It’s a time when I look back on the past year and think about all of the progress we’ve made together — and the work we still have cut out for us ahead. If you’re anything like me, you know that our fight for a livable future can’t be won in a single day or a single month. That’s why, to me, Earth Month is about more than just 30 days on the calendar. It’s a time to celebrate the unsung heroes of our collective fight: the grassroots activists, protesters, and frontline community leaders fighting tooth and nail to protect all of our communities. It’s also a time for each of us to take stock of the opportunities we have to make a difference and renew our commitment to nurturing, protecting, and advocating for our precious planet. And that's why I'm reaching out to you. **This Earth Month, I'm eager to know: What is your 2024 Earth Month Story? What are you most excited about in the fight against the climate crisis this year?** Your story could be as simple as your plans to start a garden, opting to bike more instead of driving, attending a protest or march to advocate for policies that protect our environment, or contributing your time or money to elect climate champions who will take on the fossil fuel industry. Whatever your story is, I would be honored to hear it. **[So, what’s your story? Don't hold back. I’m all ears and can’t wait to hear from you. You might even give me a good idea or two to try out this month! Click this link to share your thoughts with me.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82523939/465549259/927500205?refcode=ea.595d4ff2-50f4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ms=ea.595d4ff2-50f4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU5NWQ0ZmYyLTUwZjQtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RkjLnvo_NT0fJNl2yqvO7uXCsvdF8gPtHOmRt-pjSP8=&emci=7032cd95-6ff3-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=595d4ff2-50f4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=4823105)** | [**SHARE YOUR STORY WITH JANE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82523940/465549260/927500205?refcode=ea.595d4ff2-50f4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ms=ea.595d4ff2-50f4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU5NWQ0ZmYyLTUwZjQtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RkjLnvo_NT0fJNl2yqvO7uXCsvdF8gPtHOmRt-pjSP8=&emci=7032cd95-6ff3-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=595d4ff2-50f4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=4823105)

name: Team Bynum
subject: True toss-up status
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANELLE BYNUM FOR CONGRESS
body:
If there was any doubt that this election is going to be close, we wanted to share what election forecasters are saying about our race...

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82524258/465550359/476240567?refcode=em_fr_2024.04.06_b1_tb_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2Q0NDIxNTktNTJmNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1y_-8Fjo5d7F8R9biVimfZMMeqzFPDCm1S3D5S1wL7M=)
If there was any doubt that this election is going to be close, we wanted to share what election forecasters are saying about our race... _**Oregon’s 5th District:**_
_Inside Elections:_**TOSS UP**
_The Cook Political Report:_**TOSS UP**

name: Harry Dunn
subject: not the news I wanted to give you
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
we're being outspent
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=21189%2E4449941%2E9qzcB0)
---
| _Our friend Harry Dunn is running for Congress in Maryland’s Third District.**_I hope you’ll read the message below from him and consider splitting a donation between Harry’s campaign and Fight for Reform._**_
---
Team – can we huddle real quick? I need to relay the level of seriousness this campaign just reached.

1️⃣ Public polling shows me and one of my opponents are neck‐and‐neck.

2️⃣ A PAC that backs election deniers and insurrection supporters is now spending $600,000 on a TV ad to support that same opponent.

3️⃣ So now we're being outspent on ads, and that's a dangerous spot to be in less than 6 weeks out from the election.

Billionaires who donate to Donald Trump, Ron Desantis, Ted Cruz, and Lauren Boebert are trying to influence this electionfolks. And if I can't raise $50,000 by tomorrow at midnight to renew my ads, they'll dominate the airwaves and crush our chance to defend democracy.
[**Can you chip in anything split between me and Fight for Reform to help me win on May 14 and help fight for reform elect state and local Dems? We need someone seasoned at protecting democracy to serve in Maryland's 3rd, and that's me »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/41543?t=7&akid=21189%2E4449941%2E9qzcB0)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Fight for Reform and Harry Dunn will go through immediately:

subject: Trump wants to cut Social Security and Medicare →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Trump: “There is a lot you can do in terms of cutting Social Security and Medicare.” | |
---
You heard it here, folks. Just a few weeks ago, Donald Trump said, “There is a lot you can do in terms of cutting” Social Security and Medicare. **What he said is not surprising -- but it is alarming, Derek.** Trump and his MAGA allies have consistently aimed to dismantle Social Security and Medicare, putting millions of Americans’ hard-earned benefits at risk. In fact, Trump included proposed cuts to Social Security and Medicare in _every single one_ of his budgets as president. Now, Trump and his MAGA allies are _still_ promoting an unpopular platform that jeopardizes seniors’ financial well-being and would leave millions of seniors with fewer benefits while giving tax cuts to their wealthy pals and big corporations. We need to make sure voters see through their cruel agenda. It's critical we have the resources to defeat Trump in November. [We must do our part to defend benefits that Americans nationwide rely on. clean_body: Trump: “There is a lot you can do in terms of cutting Social Security and Medicare.” | | You heard it here, folks. Just a few weeks ago, Donald Trump said, “There is a lot you can do in terms of cutting” Social Security and Medicare. What he said is not surprising -- but it is alarming, Derek. Trump and his MAGA allies have consistently aimed to dismantle Social Security and Medicare, putting millions of Americans’ hard-earned benefits at risk. In fact, Trump included proposed cuts to Social Security and Medicare in every single one of his budgets as president. Now, Trump and his MAGA allies are still promoting an unpopular platform that jeopardizes seniors’ financial well-being and would leave millions of seniors with fewer benefits while giving tax cuts to their wealthy pals and big corporations. We need to make sure voters see through their cruel agenda. It's critical we have the resources to defeat Trump in November. name: Johnny O
subject: Yesterday, I met with President Biden…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Johnny O for Congress
body:
It’s times like these when we must push aside partisan politics and work together.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82524774/465551925/-1004384328?refcode=BLU_EM_JOC_2024-04-06_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDU4MjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzZjZGM3ODktNTZmNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1MbzKzmtY3Trt1MCODfyd8n2bmD1on_KcwBNfl7Do7g=)
---
| Yesterday, I met with President Joe Biden as we continue working towards reopening the shipping channel, rebuilding the Francis Scott Key Bridge, and getting life–and the economy–back to normal for our community.

This work is incredibly difficult, complicated, and dangerous, and I’m grateful to the Biden Administration, as well as all of our partners on the federal, state, and local levels, for standing by our side during this difficult time.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82524775/465551926/-1004384328?refcode=BLU_EM_JOC_2024-04-06_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDU4MjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzZjZGM3ODktNTZmNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1MbzKzmtY3Trt1MCODfyd8n2bmD1on_KcwBNfl7Do7g=)
It’s times like these when we must push aside partisan politics and work together to recenter our focus back to the primary function of government– _**ensuring our neighbors' basic needs are being met.**_

Too often, partisanship in Washington gets in the way of progress, and we need leaders who will push through the noise and put our community's needs first. In Congress, I will do everything in my power to advocate for our communities at the federal level and secure the support and resources that our communities need.

[_**I hope I can count on your support as we work to bring our fight to Washington by chipping in whatever you can spare so we can continue delivering for our community.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82524776/465551927/-1004384328?refcode=BLU_EM_JOC_2024-04-06_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDU4MjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzZjZGM3ODktNTZmNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1MbzKzmtY3Trt1MCODfyd8n2bmD1on_KcwBNfl7Do7g=)

clean_body: It’s times like these when we must push aside partisan politics and work together. | = | Yesterday, I met with President Joe Biden as we continue working towards reopening the shipping channel, rebuilding the Francis Scott Key Bridge, and getting life–and the economy–back to normal for our community. This work is incredibly difficult, complicated, and dangerous, and I’m grateful to the Biden Administration, as well as all of our partners on the federal, state, and local levels, for standing by our side during this difficult time. = It’s times like these when we must push aside partisan politics and work together to recenter our focus back to the primary function of government– ensuring our neighbors' basic needs are being met. Too often, partisanship in Washington gets in the way of progress, and we need leaders who will push through the noise and put our community's needs first. In Congress, I will do everything in my power to advocate for our communities at the federal level and secure the support and resources that our communities need. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Let’s do this! Team Johnny O * | | = Paid for by Johnny O for Congress Johnny O for Congress 711 W. 40th Street, Ste 330 Baltimore, MD 21211 United States

name: Team Avlon
subject: What are your priorities?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOHN AVLON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Friends,

One of the best parts of campaigning from Huntington to Montauk is that we get to hear from people across the district. We're having real conversations every day with voters about what really matters to them.

We've heard about how we need to combat climate change. Protect women's reproductive freedoms. Invest in local transportation and digital infrastructure. And almost everyone talks about the urgent need to reduce the cost of living while improving the quality of life.
But we haven't heard from you .

We've built a powerful campaign due to the strength of the grassroots support behind John. You’re an essential part of that. But it isn't just about financial contributions. It's about adding to the conversation and making your voice heard about what YOU think the priorities should be once we take back the House. Please take a moment and add your voice now -- John reads all of them. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/GRd9EpiXu0WP0iMOOltENg2]

TAKE OUR PRIORITIES SURVEY NOW >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/GRd9EpiXu0WP0iMOOltENg2]

We're really looking forward to hearing from you. We know we've got a lot of work to do – because MAGA's basically turned being a Republican member of Congress into a no-show job.
Thank you for sharing your support and your voice.

-Team Avlon

CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/avlon-donate?refcode=EMFOOTER]

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82525065/465552870/-401216107?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTAwMDg0YjYtNThmNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XD4esRH9NOkPRqXKYg4Z2bHgwkdT64vBY-_1X4E3abM=)
Hi there,

I want to thank you for your ongoing support of my campaign to defeat MAGA David Schweikert and flip AZ-01 blue. **I’m proud to share that we had a great close to end-of-quarter fundraising push, and are in a strong position headed into spring thanks to your generosity.**

It’s clear Arizonans are fired up for a change in their representation. It’s time to replace Schweikert with fearless, ethical leadership. And with your help, we’re one step closer to making that a reality.

It’s been a busy few weeks as we ramp up our efforts to win this seat. Read along to get the latest from the campaign trail.

Sincerely,

Marlene
| ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82525066/465552871/-1414337131?refcode=em-4.6.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTAwMDg0YjYtNThmNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XD4esRH9NOkPRqXKYg4Z2bHgwkdT64vBY-_1X4E3abM=)****
---

* * *

**In case you missed it, I participated in the first debate of the race for AZ-01 earlier this week.** I was the only woman on the stage. Participating in a debate like this was crucial in helping get voters on our side and spreading awareness about our movement.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82525067/465552872/-1414337131?refcode=em-4.6.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTAwMDg0YjYtNThmNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XD4esRH9NOkPRqXKYg4Z2bHgwkdT64vBY-_1X4E3abM=)
**Back in March, I was proud to spend International Women’s Day fighting for our reproductive rights.** This is my top priority and in Congress, I’ll fight for women’s right to an abortion regardless of their zip code.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82525068/465552873/-1414337131?refcode=em-4.6.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTAwMDg0YjYtNThmNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XD4esRH9NOkPRqXKYg4Z2bHgwkdT64vBY-_1X4E3abM=)
**Last week, I spoke with voters in North Scottsdale and Phoenix at different Democratic clubs.** Now that I’m officially on the ballot, this is especially important. We do this one vote at a time!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82525069/465552874/-1414337131?refcode=em-4.6.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTAwMDg0YjYtNThmNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XD4esRH9NOkPRqXKYg4Z2bHgwkdT64vBY-_1X4E3abM=)
**I didn’t stop there, I’ve spent hours in the community knocking on doors and making sure everyone knows about this critical race.** It’ll take all of us to defeat Schweikert.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82525070/465552875/-1414337131?refcode=em-4.6.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTAwMDg0YjYtNThmNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XD4esRH9NOkPRqXKYg4Z2bHgwkdT64vBY-_1X4E3abM=)
In addition to our work on the campaign trail, **we’ve recently received the endorsements of the American Federation of Government Employees, former AZ Dem Party Chair Felecia Rotellini, Ironworkers Local 75, and Teamsters Local 104.** I’m proud to be the only labor endorsed candidate in this race.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82525071/465552876/-1414337131?refcode=em-4.6.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTAwMDg0YjYtNThmNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XD4esRH9NOkPRqXKYg4Z2bHgwkdT64vBY-_1X4E3abM=)
Thank you,

Marlene

P.S. [**Together, we’re moving closer to our ultimate goal of unseating MAGA David Schweikert, flipping AZ-01 blue, and clinching the House majority for Democrats. Will you chip in $3 now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82525072/465552877/-1414337131?refcode=em-4.6.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTAwMDg0YjYtNThmNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XD4esRH9NOkPRqXKYg4Z2bHgwkdT64vBY-_1X4E3abM=)

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: We have an official opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We're going up against Donald Trump's handpicked candidate.
Derek, Ohio's primary is over, and now, it's official: **We're going up against Donald Trump's handpicked candidate Bernie Moreno in the race experts say could decide Senate control.**
And it's not just Moreno we're up against. National Republicans are going ALL IN to flip this seat red – they're already spending record amounts to defeat me. We need to fight back ASAP, or we could risk entering the general election at a disadvantage.
**So I'm personally asking:[Please, will you split $5 or more now between my campaign and John Fetterman’s to help me defend Ohio's critical seat and keep the Senate blue?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240406-1?refcode=em20240406-1-8900&refcode2=8900_434096_4vzANp&akid=8900%2E434096%2E4vzANp)**
In case you need a reminder, my opponent and I couldn't be more different:
* He wants a national abortion ban, I want to restore Roe v. Wade.
* He protects the wealthiest 1%, I defend American workers.
* He'll do Trump's and McConnell's bidding in the Senate, I'm a champion for democracy.

Unfortunately, that's not all. Moreno is also writing his campaign million-dollar checks, and now that he's through the primary, the GOP will be funneling even more money into this race. **They're trying to buy this Senate seat because they know they don't have a grassroots movement behind them like we do.**
**But that also means I'm relying on folks like you to power us to victory, one $5 donation at a time.[So please, will you split a $5 donation between my campaign and John Fetterman’s to help us defeat our GOP opponent, win in Ohio, and keep the Senate blue?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240406-1?refcode=em20240406-1-8900&refcode2=8900_434096_4vzANp&akid=8900%2E434096%2E4vzANp)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240406-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240406-1-8900&amount=5&refcode2=8900_434096_4vzANp&akid=8900%2E434096%2E4vzANp)**
**[Donate another amount »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240406-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240406-1-8900&refcode2=8900_434096_4vzANp&akid=8900%2E434096%2E4vzANp)**
Your support means the world – especially now. Thank you,
Sherrod Brown

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20240406-8900-footer&t=1&refcode2=8900_434096_4vzANp&akid=8900%2E434096%2E4vzANp)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8900%2E434096%2E4vzANp)

name: Chailuv Gidwani
subject: Campaign update for Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress
body:
Making sure you’re in the know about everything we’ve been up to

[|
---](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/3eYmERe75uDspyQsBheKVQ~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRn9D1zP0QhaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubW9yc2Vmb3Jjb25ncmVzcy5jb20vVwNzcGNCCmYQirgRZmwRV6FSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAt)
| | We’ve had some major news drop in the tight race for California’s 3rd district and I want to make sure you saw them! First, did you know that Jessica is the only woman challenger in a swing district in California to move forward after the March 5th primary? In a year when reproductive rights are on the ballot, it’s more important than ever that we elect strong pro-choice women to represent us in Washington! | | [DONATE TO JESSICA »](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/Xe4GxHJZYp7_ZsWi0DISsQ~~/AAUS1gA~~)
---
Also, we’ve been endorsed by a plethora of local and national organizations! From the Sacramento Bee newspaper to Future Forum PAC, Reproductive Freedom for All, and the League of Conservation Voters, Jessica is building a MASSIVE coalition of folks supporting her run to flip CA-03 from red to blue.
But above all else, Jessica and the team have been working around the clock to meet with voters, discuss the issues that matter most to us, and knocking on doors across the district to have personal, deep conversations about what’s at stake in the 2024 election. Without supporters like YOU, none of this would be possible, Peter.
[](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/2k60GYlbu-Nmbm1hlwQrCQ~~/AAUS1gA~~)
[**Help us keep up this momentum by donating to our grassroots-powered campaign! Your donations are what give us the supplies to support our volunteers, reach new voters, and oppose Kiley’s far-right dark money investments.**](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/HHs2VCRMC5CCW9kXD3J_dw~~/AAUS1gA~~)
Thanks as always for being such an integral part of the team,
– Chailuv Gidwani
Finance Director
Jesssica Morse for Congress

| | Every year Trump was in the White House, he tried cutting Social Security and Medicare. Every budget he introduced would have slashed hard-earned benefits for millions of Americans. And every year **_– he failed._**

Trump didn’t fail because Republicans objected. **He failed because Democrats stood up to defend the benefits millions of Americans earned.**

Extreme MAGA Republicans don’t like it when we call them out for wanting to cut Social Security and Medicare. Every budget he introduced would have slashed hard-earned benefits for millions of Americans. And every year – he failed. Trump didn’t fail because Republicans objected. He failed because Democrats stood up to defend the benefits millions of Americans earned. Extreme MAGA Republicans don’t like it when we call them out for wanting to cut Social Security and Medicare. They know doing so is not sound public policy or even a popular thing to do – and that’s exactly why we need your help. A lot of Georgians still don’t know how Trump plans to put Social Security and Medicare on the chopping block, and we need your help to amplify that message across Georgia. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Democrats have blocked GOP attempts to cut Social Security and Medicare before, but we NEED to win in 2024 to continue to do so. = Thank you, GA Dems | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: They're trying to buy this Senate seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
We have an official opponent
| | |
---
Friend, Ohio's primary is over, and now, it's official: **We're going up against Donald Trump's handpicked candidate, Bernie Moreno, in the race experts say could decide Senate control.**
And it's not just Moreno we're up against. National Republicans are going ALL IN to flip this seat red – they're already spending record amounts to defeat me. We need to fight back ASAP, or we could risk entering the general election at a disadvantage.
**So I'm personally asking:[Please, will you split $5 or more now between my campaign and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell's to help me defend Ohio's critical seat and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82525340/465553860/1885005583?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1021-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmQzMmRmNTMtNTlmNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=r102vpfeECwgg51r00d1VmyzKMTB6EmbXBrytsW2gD0=)**
In case you need a reminder, my opponent and I couldn't be more different:
* He wants a national abortion ban, **I want to restore Roe v. Wade.**
* He protects the wealthiest 1%, **I defend American workers.**
* He'll do Trump's and McConnell's bidding in the Senate, **I'm a champion for democracy.**

Unfortunately, that's not all. Moreno is also writing his campaign million-dollar checks, and now that he's through the primary, the GOP will be funneling even more money into this race. **They're trying to buy this Senate seat because they know they don't have a grassroots movement behind them like we do.**
**But that also means I'm relying on folks like you to power us to victory, one $5 donation at a time.[So please, will you split a $5 donation between my campaign and Debbie's to help us defeat our GOP opponents, win in Ohio, and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82525341/465553861/1885005583?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1021-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmQzMmRmNTMtNTlmNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=r102vpfeECwgg51r00d1VmyzKMTB6EmbXBrytsW2gD0=)**

name: Congressman Gaetz
subject: Stand with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz
body:
America is the greatest country that has ever existed. Let us all endeavor to keep it that way.

|
---
Fellow American,

When you hired me eight years ago, I made a promise to you. I promised to put America FIRST and never apologize for American progress. We will never cave to the cancel culture.

[**With your help, we have never been closer to draining the swamp and defeating the Radical Left for being the monsters that they are.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=cbf9a408c6e44349be000bcfd7216393&_e=KNVBIxzqkfqX0VvZKmCDYDrecC_VJq2nt0cr6Jk63S74ajxAQGWbEOmqOxhtQZjWLGobzVaPD_vCazm7h2oo-ZV4uqPBnobyee3Hu6X9nQ5ds3v3wC1vAK2p8-GkjUWB661yyerim9X67yP6V7WLhSHdJtDVw6ILKamyiKzqNoqV_04Z8e_EVq6I9_zA0RMZAQdtbOewgNPKwJz1cA4sl5494e5NrgZ7E6eTOGnLjF-gnAPu0G3PeNi39fQ7pRUml08CHKtNxHcOyZ4AnNng_LfgePB_GNDTRajMu7GUwR6c5KwOnGK5M3wYWAvXuXoYX5hVWaPZQp6K6EtU1uMSxJ1xz2dP3yD0gTUi30BZ7llQRNN5cwjBZvc65ffHBaU9)
| [ **STAND WITH MATT GAETZ** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=cbf9a408c6e44349be000bcfd7216393&_e=KNVBIxzqkfqX0VvZKmCDYDrecC_VJq2nt0cr6Jk63S74ajxAQGWbEOmqOxhtQZjWLGobzVaPD_vCazm7h2oo-ZV4uqPBnobyee3Hu6X9nQ5ds3v3wC1vAK2p8-GkjUWB661yyerim9X67yP6V7WLhSHdJtDVw6ILKamyiKzqNoqV_04Z8e_EVq6I9_zA0RMZAQdtbOewgNPKwJz1cA4sl5494e5NrgZ7E6eTOGnLjF8SdEnvgWqZ_oqbkgtForWIS5Du69HiOz1QydIIKQ7J_Z7yiyaaUh4xBgnNjEV0OVyUO6B9QfTE7lVK8NdSbozf_poJfm3ZTg7Nir1Ky4GSUmPl7Hq20d01S3P323XQQoXrkaTNQUQIVfDS0EcTkYCM)
---

We do it not for personal gain but because we love the United States of America. We believe in what this nation was built on and the principles that make it great.

**_This is why 2024 is so important. It is our final chance to save America from the disastrous liberal policies. If they continue to lead the charge, our borders will remain wide open, inflation will continue to skyrocket, our communities will not be safe, our economy will crash, and America Last will be the motto._**

I will not sit back and let this happen. Democrats want a path that appeases the Woke Agenda and leads to higher taxes, fewer jobs, and more money in THEIR pockets. The Liberal Elites running our country don’t work for you. **They work for special interests and personal gain.**

As a Member of Congress, I will never stop standing up for YOU and putting America First. Do I have your support in 2024? I cannot do this alone.
[ **STAND WITH MATT GAETZ** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=cbf9a408c6e44349be000bcfd7216393&_e=KNVBIxzqkfqX0VvZKmCDYDrecC_VJq2nt0cr6Jk63S74ajxAQGWbEOmqOxhtQZjWLGobzVaPD_vCazm7h2oo-ZV4uqPBnobyee3Hu6X9nQ5ds3v3wC1vAK2p8-GkjUWB661yyerim9X67yP6V7WLhSHdJtDVw6ILKamyiKzqNoqV_04Z8e_EVq6I9_zA0RMZAQdtbOewgNPKwJz1cA4sl5494e5NrgZ7E6eTOGnLjF-DkHH_2Pq03YoiZ3EbZxowkI7d_AmGfGGyUSUE3Jeoai9sm8tSHbDWDh5kfGJ6dXT3RJ82JqoX6Tl-6_eyMOe7iiHn5omHtVicb-aiZPkjLJ5rXxqU03yV4vj20u6CCeooA1hRvYXnXCNqi_wwe3fe)
---

Thank you for fueling the fight,

Congressman Matt Gaetz

I work _for the people_ -- NOT the politicians.
[](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=cbf9a408c6e44349be000bcfd7216393&_e=KNVBIxzqkfqX0VvZKmCDYDrecC_VJq2nt0cr6Jk63S74ajxAQGWbEOmqOxhtQZjWLGobzVaPD_vCazm7h2oo-ZV4uqPBnobyee3Hu6X9nQ5ds3v3wC1vAK2p8-GkjUWB661yyerim9X67yP6V7WLhSHdJtDVw6ILKamyiKzqNopwScuigOne8DQnPRiFDfp2oZslRqmhojzSf5LzgjQGC_lP5MDEhHvmIzZAjA-DFGkIfn_x0JbsM2A8-TiytFPYpDSiCiyEn4DomEoRjmQSrR-GxiikkMhvpfAsotUNbS_GzBM5oWycdrxP3quaXEpiDlYBnIm9AVTmQ51DF45ZMvOLf0ZboyWe4lWjCWwM8pk%3D) I'm Matt Gaetz, and I am fighting to drain the CORRUPT D.C. swamp & defend the America First Movement. Always.

_I cannot be bought because I am 100% funded by the people._

I stood up for you when it mattered. I'm humbly asking you to do the same by chipping in $25 or any amount RIGHT AWAY.

[**STAND WITH MATT**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=cbf9a408c6e44349be000bcfd7216393&_e=KNVBIxzqkfqX0VvZKmCDYDrecC_VJq2nt0cr6Jk63S74ajxAQGWbEOmqOxhtQZjWLGobzVaPD_vCazm7h2oo-ZV4uqPBnobyee3Hu6X9nQ5ds3v3wC1vAK2p8-GkjUWB661yyerim9X67yP6V7WLhSHdJtDVw6ILKamyiKzqNoqV_04Z8e_EVq6I9_zA0RMZAQdtbOewgNPKwJz1cA4sl5494e5NrgZ7E6eTOGnLjF8qi9PrPJxeC-JHyFUoc9UzfvuZRoXFn-jMaSPEHaHvQvqUxPt7ooQPTJh6rkhe6By1vLeICjbcvh6LpXrDmD5inzYClZld-S_EJjS82rfTqhm6dBuq3T8F3xc32UW9gBUFdjmuDKckenwLCShsVG6G)

name: Kevin Lincoln
subject: Congress needs Marines
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR BY

KEVIN LINCOLN FOR CONGRESS<-
body:
Fellow American,

As a Marine, I’ve faced a lot of challenges on behalf of our country.

In the Marine Corps, I always had others at my side...

-> ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4096387.1794.1.cb9066bb976a81d97c9b0bf723ecf13c )<-

The fight I’m engaged in now for our country is a whole other kind of challenge.

In _this_ fight to win \*\*battleground House seat CA-9\*\* and protect a GOP majority that can get our nation back on track, \*\*it’s you I need by my side.\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4096387.1795.1.cb913e63f5432101561b816d0c635bd6 )

- Deadly fentanyl pours over our open borders.

- High inflation on everything from food to fuel continues to plague American families.

- Woke agendas displace American values.

- Criminals receive deference, and law enforcement is demonized.

- The needs of other nations are placed ahead of those of our own people.

\*\*As a Marine Corps veteran, and as a local Mayor, I need your help to flip this seat and get to Congress so we have leaders in Washington who will fight for THIS country and ITS people.\*\*

Our Republican House majority hangs by a thread, and adding this seat will strengthen our ability to stand up to and stop the radical agendas being pushed by D.C. politicians and bureaucrats.

\*\*Congress needs more Marines. Will you please stand with me and rush any support you can today to help us win this seat, protect the House, and ensure America has leaders who will fight for us FIRST?\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4096387.1796.1.7c4a087e51e6998a08e92abb53428971 )

Thank you,

\*\*Kevin Lincoln\*\*

Veteran, USMC

GOP Nominee, CA-9

-> \*\*SEND A MARINE TO CONGRESS »\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4096387.1797.1.9818a5b35bbd7b663663ad1868b8b83e )<-

->

->\*\*Meet Kevin Lincoln

\*\*<-

My name is Kevin Lincoln, and my story, is the Valley’s story. I am a 3rd generation Stocktonian, raising a 4th generation in the city I love. I’m the grandson of Mexican immigrants, and my stepfather is an Army veteran.

Like many Stocktonians, my family has overcome economic setbacks. My own father struggled to survive on these streets, and was at one time, homeless. But I never let adversity define me. I joined the Marines and served in the White House Military Office, assigned to Marine One. I graduated college while working full-time and raising a family. I’ve worked in corporate America and served our community as a pastor, and as a non-profit leader.

I’m blessed with a beautiful wife, Bonnie, and two amazing children. I’ve lived a life of service, but the greatest honor of my life has been giving back to my community, through serving as Mayor of my hometown, Stockton.

-> \*\* SEND KEVIN TO CONGRESS ➞ \*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4096387.1798.1.565ab81968cfdcacd93e2b0fdbde0875 )<-

<-

->

\*\*_Like_, _Follow_, and _Subscribe_!\*\*

( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4096387.1790.1.7fc6c6530c9d391247d740e8a59b9a60 ) ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4096387.1791.1.bd7a09052df58d914b28e3bafbef3ab0 ) ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4096387.1792.1.6fbfb31a393fe455ee419aad1d7db257 ) ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4096387.1793.1.65ccd74b5cf88d56db8ef15eb24a991a )

<-

In this fight to win \\battleground House seat CA-9\\ and protect a GOP majority that can get our nation back on track, \\it’s you I need by my side.\\ ( ) - Deadly fentanyl pours over our open borders. - High inflation on everything from food to fuel continues to plague American families. - Woke agendas displace American values. - Criminals receive deference, and law enforcement is demonized. - The needs of other nations are placed ahead of those of our own people. \\As a Marine Corps veteran, and as a local Mayor, I need your help to flip this seat and get to Congress so we have leaders in Washington who will fight for THIS country and ITS people.\\ Our Republican House majority hangs by a thread, and adding this seat will strengthen our ability to stand up to and stop the radical agendas being pushed by D.C. politicians and bureaucrats. \\Congress needs more Marines. Will you please stand with me and rush any support you can today to help us win this seat, protect the House, and ensure America has leaders who will fight for us FIRST?\\ ( ) Thank you, \\Kevin Lincoln\\ Veteran, USMC GOP Nominee, CA-9 -> \\SEND A MARINE TO CONGRESS »\\ ( )<- -> ->\\Meet Kevin Lincoln \\<- My name is Kevin Lincoln, and my story, is the Valley’s story. I am a 3rd generation Stocktonian, raising a 4th generation in the city I love. I’m the grandson of Mexican immigrants, and my stepfather is an Army veteran. Like many Stocktonians, my family has overcome economic setbacks. My own father struggled to survive on these streets, and was at one time, homeless. But I never let adversity define me. I joined the Marines and served in the White House Military Office, assigned to Marine One. I graduated college while working full-time and raising a family. I’ve worked in corporate America and served our community as a pastor, and as a non-profit leader. I’m blessed with a beautiful wife, Bonnie, and two amazing children. I’ve lived a life of service, but the greatest honor of my life has been giving back to my community, through serving as Mayor of my hometown, Stockton. -> \\ SEND KEVIN TO CONGRESS ➞ \\ ( )<- <- -> \\Like, Follow, and Subscribe!\\ ( ) ( ) ( ) ( ) <- -> Kevin Lincoln is a former member of the U.S. Marine Corps. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Marine Corps or the Department of Defense. <- -> -> ->PAID FOR BY KEVIN LINCOLN FOR CONGRESS<- <-

name: Bob Casey
subject: Sponsor our advertising
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2605%2E552475%2EdrqI7t)
Hi Peter,
It’s official -- we’re on the air. My campaign has ads running across the Commonwealth. Let me explain why this is important.
_Running TV ads is expensive -- especially in a battleground like Pennsylvania._ Being in an “expensive media market” may sound like an insider term, but it means it costs more to run ads here than in many other places across the Nation.
That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter. **I need your support to help me keep our ads running.**
[**Will you consider donating $5 or more today to keep my ads on the air?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240406-3?refcode=em20240406-3&recurring=1&refcode2=2605_552475_drqI7t&akid=2605%2E552475%2EdrqI7t)
**[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240406-3?refcode=em20240406-3&recurring=1&refcode2=2605_552475_drqI7t&akid=2605%2E552475%2EdrqI7t)**
My mega-millionaire opponent, David McCormick, is spending incredible amounts on TV ads to blanket Pennsylvania’s airwaves. Since he has nearly endless resources, including billionaire backers on Wall Street, it’s easier for him to make these kinds of investments at the drop of a hat.
Unlike McCormick, I’m relying on folks like you to keep these ads on the air. Think of it like a sponsorship of sorts -- it only takes $5, or whatever you can, to help us get our message out there.
[**Please, Peter, chip in $5 to help sponsor my advertising campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240406-3?refcode=em20240406-3&recurring=1&refcode2=2605_552475_drqI7t&akid=2605%2E552475%2EdrqI7t)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240406-3?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240406-3-el&refcode2=2605_552475_drqI7t&akid=2605%2E552475%2EdrqI7t) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240406-3?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240406-3-el&refcode2=2605_552475_drqI7t&akid=2605%2E552475%2EdrqI7t) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240406-3?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240406-3-el&refcode2=2605_552475_drqI7t&akid=2605%2E552475%2EdrqI7t) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240406-3?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240406-3-el&refcode2=2605_552475_drqI7t&akid=2605%2E552475%2EdrqI7t) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240406-3?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240406-3-el&refcode2=2605_552475_drqI7t&akid=2605%2E552475%2EdrqI7t) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240406-3?recurring=1&refcode=em20240406-3&refcode2=2605_552475_drqI7t&akid=2605%2E552475%2EdrqI7t)

name: Katie Porter
subject: Every Member of Congress has a choice when it comes to this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
A lobbyist came up to me and said “Well, I guess you’re one of the new Members we’ll never see.” I asked him why. He said it was because I didn’t take corporate PAC money.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=38817%2E3422442%2EpUmCMG)
Derek, it’s Katie Porter.
A few years ago I attended a reception for newly elected Members in DC. A lobbyist came up to me and said “Well, I guess you’re one of the new Members we’ll never see.” I asked him why. He said it was because I didn’t take corporate PAC money.
**Since that day, I’ve said clearly—if lobbyists want to meet with me, they better bring their good ideas, not their checkbooks.**
As Members of the House, we are one vote of 435. That often means only a fraction of the bills we want to pass will ever become law. **But we all have a choice to make when it comes to corporate PAC money.** As Members of Congress, we’re privileged to be in positions of power, and we should use our power to stand up to the status quo and corporate special interests.
But unfortunately, this attitude isn’t the norm in Washington. Too many politicians are beholden to corporate PAC and lobbyist money and a system of legalized corruption. Our housing crisis, climate change, and rising prices are a direct result of this system, which puts corporate profits ahead of people.
**That’s why I started Truth to Power, an organization dedicated to supporting Democrats who reject corporate PAC money.** These candidates can only compete because of grassroots support, and so your donation helps us make all the difference. **[I hope you’ll consider joining me by giving a $5 contribution to Truth to Power today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20240406?refcode=em20240406-38817&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=38817_3422442_pUmCMG&akid=38817%2E3422442%2EpUmCMG)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20240406?refcode=em20240406-38817&refcode2=38817_3422442_pUmCMG&akid=38817%2E3422442%2EpUmCMG)
Thanks for considering,
Katie Porter

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20240406-38817&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=38817_3422442_pUmCMG&akid=38817%2E3422442%2EpUmCMG)**
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=38817%2E3422442%2EpUmCMG).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

We've lost a lot of ground fighting back against the radical ideologies and manifestos from my far-left colleagues, and it seems as if every time they open their mouths, money pours in from their base. We've been presented with a serious opportunity to make up some ground....I 'm talking as seriously as the business end of a .45. | I'll keep it real because I always do.
