name: Ruben Gallego
subject: My decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
I want to talk to you about my decision to launch this campaign in the first place. |
---
Peter,

This is the election year, and now that our first FEC deadline of 2024 has passed, every dollar we’ve raised and every donation we’ve received will be public.

Besides the day we launched, this is the most important time of the campaign so far.

But hang on a minute. Put that aside for a second. Because right now, I want to talk to you about my decision to launch this campaign in the first place.

When I made the decision to run for Senate in Arizona, it was to take back this seat from Kyrsten Sinema. Replace her vote in the Senate with someone who actually cares about the people of our state.

That was reason enough for me.

But now, Sinema is out and Kari Lake is running against me. The MAGA Queen. Someone who has no problem lying, spreading misinformation — even calling for her supporters to commit violence on behalf of Donald Trump.

I lived through January 6th. I heard the shouts from the mob while I was on the House floor, barricading the doors and helping my colleagues evacuate to safety. I know what Kari Lake means for our democracy.

So today, this campaign is not just about getting another vote in the Senate. It’s not just about our priorities. It still is those things, but it’s about defending our democracy now, too.

And that is a lot of pressure. Trust me... I’m feeling it. I expect you are, too. But you are not alone in this fight. I’m with you, and thousands of others are, too.

Right now, a lot of them are making donations ahead of our deadline. They’re hoping that you will join them. Because they know that is how we will win this race.

So please, I am asking you very humbly:

[Can you please split $15 to our campaign and Defeat Republicans? That’s the only way we’ll hold the Senate. That’s the only way we’ll defend it from Kari Lake. ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82526429/465557895/573412721?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240406_1_3&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3ZWUyZDA2LTY3ZjQtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-rgM61-uzji0JtsM26FqVpUtEEqcdKQ2hIUaW6tQTwE=)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below._ | [DONATE $5 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82526431/465557897/573412721?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240406_1_3&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3ZWUyZDA2LTY3ZjQtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-rgM61-uzji0JtsM26FqVpUtEEqcdKQ2hIUaW6tQTwE=) [DONATE $15 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82526432/465557899/573412721?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240406_1_3&express_lane=true&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3ZWUyZDA2LTY3ZjQtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-rgM61-uzji0JtsM26FqVpUtEEqcdKQ2hIUaW6tQTwE=) [DONATE $25 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82526433/465557900/573412721?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240406_1_3&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3ZWUyZDA2LTY3ZjQtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-rgM61-uzji0JtsM26FqVpUtEEqcdKQ2hIUaW6tQTwE=) [OTHER AMOUNT »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82526435/465557901/573412721?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240406_1_3&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3ZWUyZDA2LTY3ZjQtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-rgM61-uzji0JtsM26FqVpUtEEqcdKQ2hIUaW6tQTwE=)
---

There’s an old motto in the Marines: “First to Fight.” That always stuck with me. And you have my word: I’m not going to back down.

I am proud to be in this fight with you, Peter. Thank you for your support.

Semper Fi,

Ruben

Fellow patriot,

My Democrat opponent, Sherrod Brown, had a MASSIVE fundraising haul last quarter – _he’s announced $12 million!_

Even though we also had a very strong quarter – spurred by winning the primary election last month – \*\*we’re behind the Democrats in this race, there's no denying it.\*\*

It’s extremely clear that we can’t let up or lose a single day in this fight, _not when Brown and the Left are putting up these kinds of numbers._

We must keep donations flowing non-stop into our campaign to stay in this fight and maintain our path to victory.

This means we need _any_ support you can send. \*\*_» Will you chip in just $5 or more today?_\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4146407.1811.1.67acc4b2c689cdd1511bd143673bc41b )

-> \*\*_RUSH YOUR SUPPORT_ »\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4146407.1812.1.7baebd68843c8e33972362dc207455f8 )<-

The Senate majority and the ability to reverse the disastrous Biden agenda hinges on this race in Ohio – we can’t rest on our laurels.

\*\*Please chip in anything you can today to help us offset the Democrats’ fundraising machine.\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4146407.1813.1.fc48bab0f5174ad6c6543b487d6cd3ea )

\*\*Meet Bernie Moreno:\*\*

( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4146407.1815.1.8b7b9eaa0e88be8bed2677aa9176c9a7 ) Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

body:
Close your eyes and think about it.

|
#
---
Peter, Close your eyes and think about where we’ll be 7 months from now. It will be November 6, 2024. Voters across the country will already have cast their ballots in the 2024 election. You might not know who will control the White House yet, but you’ll probably know if Mazie’s won re-election — and therefore, you’ll know whether Democrats hung on to their razor-thin majority. The Senate map is the toughest it’s been for Democrats in years. And by now, you’ll have already heard _plenty_ from us about how important every grassroots donation is to get us across the finish line. **So on November 6, the _last_ thing we want for you, Peter, is to wake up and wonder if there’s anything more you could have done.** [**Chipping in when you can — and as early as you can — is the number one thing you can do to help defend Mazie’s seat and preserve Senate Democrats’ majority. name: Don Trump Jr.
subject: Are you still with us on TEAM TRUMP?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=ca422136b3eb4e1dad7d1443fd349eba&_e=LRhxqmpw9uLB2KI3u4SKOD47pyW8H1V2i4JQWJq4HrpOn9J-meIg22aR4xHuuBQ-w9TyerrhyFFXF6ddVyO4edSKGUk7T87ssHZj4XsizsU4F6e4hq2zJegKadXfJXAGPiuP17ndK4IXTT85qOlG32DQsnfTDC48WOgkyrNeEOPSxN9LJr2QotKDdUCX4ISjo4jXe9Xh2V-LzCfHxtE7fxm2P7qCHObetgP7UK0Es0RHK4CETB16QxBpVJTnDKdPandAHJWcVVjk25XhIMAWPUYd5lVRAKYiLX0vofrAozo9y7_rNx8WaEUAJaaxbtB9Vi4pGDUhIHQi2bSrpmNutgaZFJ-OkLMl4YJ0rGPohaOqn7XbiMPE_vAgiby9BQf9)
---
Peter, the media is trying to diminish my father’s support across America, so I had to reach out.

[**_... have you given up on my father’s mission to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN?_**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=ca422136b3eb4e1dad7d1443fd349eba&_e=LRhxqmpw9uLB2KI3u4SKOD47pyW8H1V2i4JQWJq4HrpOn9J-meIg22aR4xHuuBQ-w9TyerrhyFFXF6ddVyO4edSKGUk7T87ssHZj4XsizsU4F6e4hq2zJegKadXfJXAGPiuP17ndK4IXTT85qOlG32DQsnfTDC48WOgkyrNeEOPSxN9LJr2QotKDdUCX4ISjo4jXe9Xh2V-LzCfHxtE7f4uuIxL-NHzXAao9rGG8M2XDuGfLkU0UJXspEKy-JjWNOqRFTbRBA25wc3gL1TtIxsXTOcRNQOXLiwom_2Umi2ztbOSlbbjwwXsZ79ppFqPNAj39F155VNC0rDAr1XWNCIpk4hj4wrBoV_oQA5xKuWB3ryrVctiKKImNw1_w6m_9)
This is going to be one of the most important presidential elections in American history, and with sleepy Joe Biden willing to pull every corrupt trick to stop my father, I need to know if I can count on you.

Folks,

I’m more nervous than a cat in a room full of rocking chairs.

I reached out the other day about how I won’t be able to hold down the front lines much longer without the resources and support from strong conservatives like yourself.

A LOT of my supporters responded, but I was just alerted – you still have not.

My request is simple. I just need $1 from you, Friend.

If you feel up to the task of pitching in, you can do so here: **[[LINK]](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=bd8d36defd6c4e9199c9cb30d848bab1&_e=_Lyx1BSOG5ft6_uifRXrds5nIBlo992fiQydNKaYXFGfsmvXWcPGbZzRzsGVkabiP3y8KoAbcynuDdFIwWPR170qLwMuq8-4xiHagiZs9DKLrd5Sr1_wFMGJzX0U0RTpsGlojfhU1yptcjNVhMvVNt9IpqAkfI7x0O9ynEB-8w0I-_qvpuNUpPlNf7kfGOMTURxNr456Q_NuZutoNxTT2djR6gM_lI1zj1QyjYy7rXDT3zGECbK9BXVzsoq8QUaAXNG761cg45medWCPsE2gFGtgcDC77yfRzDzpk2ZC1V2b7c8_xfhOBuC_ZottYIsoip1Jp24bsbD5EGX_xDhRM0OjPPQCX5oAdfi_1hl_Cjh-NlwRqjSikixq3anyo1f2)**

I'm up a creek without a paddle, and my pirogue just sprung a huge leak.

I can manage to hold down the front lines, but I won’t be able to much longer without the resources and support from strong, conservative patriots like yourself.

subject: Conserving our wildlife
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
Show your support for conserving our wildlife today >> [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82527266/465560992/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20240406_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDBhOGNiMi03MGY0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xTxo8l2kUrBurqY71msiwaxa_KQ1vl3NtBrs1E-hihE=&emci=cf1c5b85-ccf2-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=c00a8cb2-70f4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=252045)
---
Folks, Future generations should have the opportunity to appreciate an abundance of wildlife and the wetlands that sustain them. That’s why Martin is introducing legislation to reauthorize the _North American Wetlands Conservation Act_ to support our country’s most effective wetlands restoration program. This would expand access to clean drinking water, invest in our outdoor recreation economy, and conserve wildlife and their habitats. **[Will you join Martin in fighting to reauthorize the _North American Wetlands Conservation Act_? Add your name to show your support:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82527267/465560993/-217721462?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20240406_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDBhOGNiMi03MGY0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xTxo8l2kUrBurqY71msiwaxa_KQ1vl3NtBrs1E-hihE=&emci=cf1c5b85-ccf2-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=c00a8cb2-70f4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=252045)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82527268/465560994/-217721462?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20240406_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDBhOGNiMi03MGY0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xTxo8l2kUrBurqY71msiwaxa_KQ1vl3NtBrs1E-hihE=&emci=cf1c5b85-ccf2-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=c00a8cb2-70f4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=252045)

clean_body: Show your support for conserving our wildlife today >> Folks, Future generations should have the opportunity to appreciate an abundance of wildlife and the wetlands that sustain them. That’s why Martin is introducing legislation to reauthorize the North American Wetlands Conservation Act to support our country’s most effective wetlands restoration program. This would expand access to clean drinking water, invest in our outdoor recreation economy, and conserve wildlife and their habitats. | Thank you for speaking up, Team Heinrich | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. body:
Three-term GOP U.S. Senator Jack Danforth isn’t holding back
#
Peter — you won’t believe the latest quote from Josh Hawley’s former mentor:
**"I think what [Hawley]'s done is just _unforgivable_ as far as being the U.S. Senator is concerned... I said at the time that supporting him was the biggest mistake I have ever made in my life. And I still believe that."**
— Jack Danforth, Missouri’s three-term GOP U.S. Senator
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45149?refcode=em20240406-5213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5213%2E614464%2ErLT-A3)**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45149?refcode=em20240406-5213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5213%2E614464%2ErLT-A3)
This isn’t the first time that Danforth has condemned Hawley’s actions on January 6th. **But let’s start at the beginning:**
**FIRST —** In 2018, former Missouri Senator Jack Danforth recruited Josh Hawley to run for U.S. Senate. Danforth even cleared the crowded field of Republican challengers in Hawley’s primary to help him win the seat.
**THEN —** On January 6, 2021, Josh Hawley showed the world that he’s a coward and a fraud by raising his fist then running for his life at the U.S. Capitol.
**NOW —** Danforth and a handful of Hawley’s other mentors + mega-donors are refusing to support his re-election campaign — and recent reports from _Morning Consult_ found Hawley’s approvals plummeting among Missouri voters.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45149?refcode=em20240406-5213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=5213%2E614464%2ErLT-A3)
**Republicans and Democrats across Missouri agree: We can’t afford another six years of Josh Hawley representing us in the U.S. Senate.**
**[DEFEAT HAWLEY: CHIP IN →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45149?refcode=em20240406-5213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=5213%2E614464%2ErLT-A3)**
Now here’s why we urgently need your help, Peter:
Every dollar we raise gives us an opportunity to keep exposing Hawley as a fraud and a coward — and allows us to reach voters with Lucas’ election-winning message every day between now and November 5.
That’s what it’ll take to win this race. **So now we’re asking you:**
**[Can you chip in $10 or just whatever you can today so we can get Lucas’ message in front of Missouri voters and continue to hold Josh Hawley accountable for embarrassing our state and betraying our country? Lucas doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs, so your support today really will make a big impact on our grassroots campaign.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45149?refcode=em20240406-5213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=5213%2E614464%2ErLT-A3)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45150?refcode=em20240406-5213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=6&akid=5213%2E614464%2ErLT-A3) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45150?refcode=em20240406-5213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=7&akid=5213%2E614464%2ErLT-A3) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45150?refcode=em20240406-5213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=8&akid=5213%2E614464%2ErLT-A3) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45150?refcode=em20240406-5213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=9&akid=5213%2E614464%2ErLT-A3) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45150?refcode=em20240406-5213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=10&akid=5213%2E614464%2ErLT-A3) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45150?refcode=em20240406-5213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=11&akid=5213%2E614464%2ErLT-A3) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45149?refcode=em20240406-5213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=5213%2E614464%2ErLT-A3)
